authors_text: Shiyu Su,Qiaochu Zhang,Mohsen Hassanpourghadi,Juzheng Liu,Rezwan A Rasul,Mike Shuo-Wei Chen
title: Analog/Mixed-Signal Circuit Synthesis Enabled by the Advancements of Circuit Architectures and Machine Learning Algorithms
title_zh: 电路架构和机器学习算法的进步实现了模拟/混合信号电路综合
comment: PREPRINT - accepted at IEEE/ACM Asia and South Pacific Design Automation Conference (ASP-DAC), 2022
comments: PREPRINT - accepted at IEEE/ACM Asia and South Pacific Design Automation Conference (ASP-DAC), 2022
abstract: Analog mixed-signal (AMS) circuit architecture has evolved towards more digital friendly due to technology scaling and demand for higher flexibility/reconfigurability. Meanwhile, the design complexity and cost of AMS circuits has substantially increased due to the necessity of optimizing the circuit sizing, layout, and verification of a complex AMS circuit. On the other hand, machine learning (ML) algorithms have been under exponential growth over the past decade and actively exploited by the electronic design automation (EDA) community. This paper will identify the opportunities and challenges brought about by this trend and overview several emerging AMS design methodologies that are enabled by the recent evolution of AMS circuit architectures and machine learning algorithms. Specifically, we will focus on using neural-network-based surrogate models to expedite the circuit design parameter search and layout iterations. Lastly, we will demonstrate the rapid synthesis of several AMS circuit examples from specification to silicon prototype, with significantly reduced human intervention.
summary: Analog mixed-signal (AMS) circuit architecture has evolved towards more digital friendly due to technology scaling and demand for higher flexibility/reconfigurability. Meanwhile, the design complexity and cost of AMS circuits has substantially increased due to the necessity of optimizing the circuit sizing, layout, and verification of a complex AMS circuit. On the other hand, machine learning (ML) algorithms have been under exponential growth over the past decade and actively exploited by the electronic design automation (EDA) community. This paper will identify the opportunities and challenges brought about by this trend and overview several emerging AMS design methodologies that are enabled by the recent evolution of AMS circuit architectures and machine learning algorithms. Specifically, we will focus on using neural-network-based surrogate models to expedite the circuit design parameter search and layout iterations. Lastly, we will demonstrate the rapid synthesis of several AMS circuit examples from specification to silicon prototype, with significantly reduced human intervention.
abstract_zh: 由于技术扩展和对更高灵活性/可重构性的需求，模拟混合信号 (AMS) 电路架构已朝着更加数字友好的方向发展。同时，由于需要优化复杂AMS电路的电路尺寸、布局和验证，AMS电路的设计复杂性和成本大幅增加。另一方面，机器学习 (ML) 算法在过去十年中呈指数级增长，并受到电子设计自动化 (EDA) 社区的积极利用。本文将确定这一趋势带来的机遇和挑战，并概述由 AMS 电路架构和机器学习算法的最新发展所支持的几种新兴 AMS 设计方法。具体来说，我们将专注于使用基于神经网络的代理模型来加快电路设计参数搜索和布局迭代。最后，我们将演示从规范到硅原型的几个 AMS 电路示例的快速综合，并显着减少人工干预。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了通过电路架构演进和机器学习算法提升模拟/混合信号电路综合效率的方法。
AI.motivation: 随着技术缩放和灵活性需求增加，模拟混合信号电路设计复杂度与成本显著上升，亟需借助机器学习算法优化设计流程。
AI.method: 采用基于神经网络的代理模型加速电路参数搜索与布局迭代，并通过从规格到硅原型的快速综合验证方法。
AI.result: 成功展示了多个模拟混合信号电路的快速综合案例，显著减少了人工干预并验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习与电路架构创新的结合为AMS设计提供了高效解决方案，但需进一步解决可扩展性与通用性挑战。

authors_text: Mingfei Gao,Le Xue,Chetan Ramaiah,Chen Xing,Ran Xu,Caiming Xiong
title: Value Retrieval with Arbitrary Queries for Form-like Documents
title_zh: 对类似表单的文档进行任意查询的值检索
abstract: We propose value retrieval with arbitrary queries for form-like documents to reduce human effort of processing forms. Unlike previous methods that only address a fixed set of field items, our method predicts target value for an arbitrary query based on the understanding of the layout and semantics of a form. To further boost model performance, we propose a simple document language modeling (SimpleDLM) strategy to improve document understanding on large-scale model pre-training. Experimental results show that our method outperforms previous designs significantly and the SimpleDLM further improves our performance on value retrieval by around 17% F1 score compared with the state-of-the-art pre-training method. Code is available at https://github.com/salesforce/QVR-SimpleDLM.
summary: We propose value retrieval with arbitrary queries for form-like documents to reduce human effort of processing forms. Unlike previous methods that only address a fixed set of field items, our method predicts target value for an arbitrary query based on the understanding of the layout and semantics of a form. To further boost model performance, we propose a simple document language modeling (SimpleDLM) strategy to improve document understanding on large-scale model pre-training. Experimental results show that our method outperforms previous designs significantly and the SimpleDLM further improves our performance on value retrieval by around 17% F1 score compared with the state-of-the-art pre-training method. Code is available at https://github.com/salesforce/QVR-SimpleDLM.
abstract_zh: 我们提出对类似表单的文档进行任意查询的值检索，以减少处理表单的人力。与以前仅处理一组固定字段项的方法不同，我们的方法根据对表单布局和语义的理解来预测任意查询的目标值。为了进一步提高模型性能，我们提出了一种简单文档语言建模（SimpleDLM）策略来提高大规模模型预训练的文档理解。实验结果表明，我们的方法显着优于以前的设计，并且与最先进的预训练方法相比，SimpleDLM 进一步将我们的值检索性能提高了约 17% F1 分数。代码可在 https://github.com/salesforce/QVR-SimpleDLM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对类似表格的文档进行任意查询值检索的方法，通过理解文档布局和语义来减少人工处理表格的工作量。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅能处理固定字段的表格查询，难以应对复杂多变的任意查询需求，需提升模型对文档结构和语义的理解能力。
AI.method: 基于文档布局与语义预测任意查询目标值，并提出SimpleDLM策略通过大规模预训练优化文档理解能力。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著优于现有方案，SimpleDLM策略使F1分数相比最先进预训练方法提升约17%。
AI.conclusion: 新方法有效解决了任意查询值检索问题，SimpleDLM策略显著提升性能，代码已开源供研究使用。

authors_text: A S M Mahmudul Hasan,Ferdous Sohel,Dean Diepeveen,Hamid Laga,Michael G. K. Jones
title: Weed Recognition using Deep Learning Techniques on Class-imbalanced Imagery
title_zh: 使用深度学习技术对类不平衡图像进行杂草识别
comment: The paper is accepted by Crop and Pasture Science journal (https://www.publish.csiro.au/CP/justaccepted/CP21626)
comments: The paper is accepted by Crop and Pasture Science journal (https://www.publish.csiro.au/CP/justaccepted/CP21626)
abstract: Most weed species can adversely impact agricultural productivity by competing for nutrients required by high-value crops. Manual weeding is not practical for large cropping areas. Many studies have been undertaken to develop automatic weed management systems for agricultural crops. In this process, one of the major tasks is to recognise the weeds from images. However, weed recognition is a challenging task. It is because weed and crop plants can be similar in colour, texture and shape which can be exacerbated further by the imaging conditions, geographic or weather conditions when the images are recorded. Advanced machine learning techniques can be used to recognise weeds from imagery. In this paper, we have investigated five state-of-the-art deep neural networks, namely VGG16, ResNet-50, Inception-V3, Inception-ResNet-v2 and MobileNetV2, and evaluated their performance for weed recognition. We have used several experimental settings and multiple dataset combinations. In particular, we constructed a large weed-crop dataset by combining several smaller datasets, mitigating class imbalance by data augmentation, and using this dataset in benchmarking the deep neural networks. We investigated the use of transfer learning techniques by preserving the pre-trained weights for extracting the features and fine-tuning them using the images of crop and weed datasets. We found that VGG16 performed better than others on small-scale datasets, while ResNet-50 performed better than other deep networks on the large combined dataset.
summary: Most weed species can adversely impact agricultural productivity by competing for nutrients required by high-value crops. Manual weeding is not practical for large cropping areas. Many studies have been undertaken to develop automatic weed management systems for agricultural crops. In this process, one of the major tasks is to recognise the weeds from images. However, weed recognition is a challenging task. It is because weed and crop plants can be similar in colour, texture and shape which can be exacerbated further by the imaging conditions, geographic or weather conditions when the images are recorded. Advanced machine learning techniques can be used to recognise weeds from imagery. In this paper, we have investigated five state-of-the-art deep neural networks, namely VGG16, ResNet-50, Inception-V3, Inception-ResNet-v2 and MobileNetV2, and evaluated their performance for weed recognition. We have used several experimental settings and multiple dataset combinations. In particular, we constructed a large weed-crop dataset by combining several smaller datasets, mitigating class imbalance by data augmentation, and using this dataset in benchmarking the deep neural networks. We investigated the use of transfer learning techniques by preserving the pre-trained weights for extracting the features and fine-tuning them using the images of crop and weed datasets. We found that VGG16 performed better than others on small-scale datasets, while ResNet-50 performed better than other deep networks on the large combined dataset.
abstract_zh: 大多数杂草种类会争夺高价值作物所需的养分，从而对农业生产力产生不利影响。人工除草对于大面积种植区域来说并不实用。已经进行了许多研究来开发农作物的自动杂草管理系统。在此过程中，主要任务之一是从图像中识别杂草。然而，杂草识别是一项具有挑战性的任务。这是因为杂草和农作物在颜色、纹理和形状上可能相似，记录图像时的成像条件、地理或天气条件可能会进一步加剧这种情况。先进的机器学习技术可用于从图像中识别杂草。在本文中，我们研究了五种最先进的深度神经网络，即 VGG16、ResNet-50、Inception-V3、Inception-ResNet-v2 和 MobileNetV2，并评估了它们的杂草识别性能。我们使用了多种实验设置和多个数据集组合。特别是，我们通过组合几个较小的数据集，通过数据增强减轻类别不平衡，并使用该数据集对深度神经网络进行基准测试，构建了一个大型杂草作物数据集。我们通过保留用于提取特征的预训练权重并使用农作物和杂草数据集的图像对其进行微调来研究迁移学习技术的使用。我们发现 VGG16 在小规模数据集上的表现优于其他网络，而 ResNet-50 在大型组合数据集上的表现优于其他深度网络。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在类别不平衡的农业图像中使用深度学习技术进行杂草识别的方法。
AI.motivation: 人工除草效率低，而杂草与作物在颜色、纹理和形状上相似，导致自动识别难度大，需借助深度学习技术解决这一问题。
AI.method: 对比了VGG16、ResNet-50等五种深度网络，通过数据增强缓解类别不平衡，并采用迁移学习进行特征提取与微调。
AI.result: VGG16在小数据集上表现更优，ResNet-50在大规模组合数据集上效果最佳。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习模型结合迁移学习可有效提升杂草识别性能，不同模型适用于不同规模的数据集。

tldr: 本文研究了在类别不平衡的农业图像中使用深度学习技术进行杂草识别的方法。
motivation: 人工除草效率低，而杂草与作物在颜色、纹理和形状上相似，导致自动识别难度大，需借助深度学习技术解决这一问题。
method: 对比了VGG16、ResNet-50等五种深度网络，通过数据增强缓解类别不平衡，并采用迁移学习进行特征提取与微调。
result: VGG16在小数据集上表现更优，ResNet-50在大规模组合数据集上效果最佳。
conclusion: 深度学习模型结合迁移学习可有效提升杂草识别性能，不同模型适用于不同规模的数据集。
search_text: Weed Recognition using Deep Learning Techniques on Class-imbalanced Imagery 使用深度学习技术对类不平衡图像进行杂草识别 Most weed species can adversely impact agricultural productivity by competing for nutrients required by high-value crops. Manual weeding is not practical for large cropping areas. Many studies have been undertaken to develop automatic weed management systems for agricultural crops. In this process, one of the major tasks is to recognise the weeds from images. However, weed recognition is a challenging task. It is because weed and crop plants can be similar in colour, texture and shape which can be exacerbated further by the imaging conditions, geographic or weather conditions when the images are recorded. Advanced machine learning techniques can be used to recognise weeds from imagery. In this paper, we have investigated five state-of-the-art deep neural networks, namely VGG16, ResNet-50, Inception-V3, Inception-ResNet-v2 and MobileNetV2, and evaluated their performance for weed recognition. We have used several experimental settings and multiple dataset combinations. In particular, we constructed a large weed-crop dataset by combining several smaller datasets, mitigating class imbalance by data augmentation, and using this dataset in benchmarking the deep neural networks. We investigated the use of transfer learning techniques by preserving the pre-trained weights for extracting the features and fine-tuning them using the images of crop and weed datasets. We found that VGG16 performed better than others on small-scale datasets, while ResNet-50 performed better than other deep networks on the large combined dataset. 大多数杂草种类会争夺高价值作物所需的养分，从而对农业生产力产生不利影响。人工除草对于大面积种植区域来说并不实用。已经进行了许多研究来开发农作物的自动杂草管理系统。在此过程中，主要任务之一是从图像中识别杂草。然而，杂草识别是一项具有挑战性的任务。这是因为杂草和农作物在颜色、纹理和形状上可能相似，记录图像时的成像条件、地理或天气条件可能会进一步加剧这种情况。先进的机器学习技术可用于从图像中识别杂草。在本文中，我们研究了五种最先进的深度神经网络，即 VGG16、ResNet-50、Inception-V3、Inception-ResNet-v2 和 MobileNetV2，并评估了它们的杂草识别性能。我们使用了多种实验设置和多个数据集组合。特别是，我们通过组合几个较小的数据集，通过数据增强减轻类别不平衡，并使用该数据集对深度神经网络进行基准测试，构建了一个大型杂草作物数据集。我们通过保留用于提取特征的预训练权重并使用农作物和杂草数据集的图像对其进行微调来研究迁移学习技术的使用。我们发现 VGG16 在小规模数据集上的表现优于其他网络，而 ResNet-50 在大型组合数据集上的表现优于其他深度网络。 本文研究了在类别不平衡的农业图像中使用深度学习技术进行杂草识别的方法。 A S M Mahmudul Hasan,Ferdous Sohel,Dean Diepeveen,Hamid Laga,Michael G. K. Jones cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Xiaoling Hu
title: Structure-Aware Image Segmentation with Homotopy Warping
title_zh: 具有同伦扭曲的结构感知图像分割
abstract: Besides per-pixel accuracy, topological correctness is also crucial for the segmentation of images with fine-scale structures, e.g., satellite images and biomedical images. In this paper, by leveraging the theory of digital topology, we identify pixels in an image that are critical for topology. By focusing on these critical pixels, we propose a new homotopy warping loss to train deep image segmentation networks for better topological accuracy. To efficiently identify these topologically critical pixels, we propose a new algorithm exploiting the distance transform. The proposed algorithm, as well as the loss function, naturally generalize to different topological structures in both 2D and 3D settings. The proposed loss function helps deep nets achieve better performance in terms of topology-aware metrics, outperforming state-of-the-art structure/topology-aware segmentation methods.
summary: Besides per-pixel accuracy, topological correctness is also crucial for the segmentation of images with fine-scale structures, e.g., satellite images and biomedical images. In this paper, by leveraging the theory of digital topology, we identify pixels in an image that are critical for topology. By focusing on these critical pixels, we propose a new homotopy warping loss to train deep image segmentation networks for better topological accuracy. To efficiently identify these topologically critical pixels, we propose a new algorithm exploiting the distance transform. The proposed algorithm, as well as the loss function, naturally generalize to different topological structures in both 2D and 3D settings. The proposed loss function helps deep nets achieve better performance in terms of topology-aware metrics, outperforming state-of-the-art structure/topology-aware segmentation methods.
abstract_zh: 除了每像素精度之外，拓扑正确性对于具有精细尺度结构的图像（例如卫星图像和生物医学图像）的分割也至关重要。在本文中，通过利用数字拓扑理论，我们识别图像中对拓扑至关重要的像素。通过关注这些关键像素，我们提出了一种新的同伦扭曲损失来训练深度图像分割网络以获得更好的拓扑精度。为了有效地识别这些拓扑关键像素，我们提出了一种利用距离变换的新算法。所提出的算法以及损失函数可以自然地推广到 2D 和 3D 设置中的不同拓扑结构。所提出的损失函数有助于深度网络在拓扑感知指标方面实现更好的性能，优于最先进的结构/拓扑感知分割方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于同伦变形的结构感知图像分割方法，通过识别拓扑关键像素并设计相应损失函数提升分割结果的拓扑正确性。
AI.motivation: 传统图像分割方法侧重像素级精度，但对具有精细结构的图像（如卫星/生物医学图像）而言，拓扑结构的准确性同样关键，现有方法在拓扑保持方面存在不足。
AI.method: 基于数字拓扑理论识别拓扑关键像素，结合距离变换算法高效定位关键区域，并设计同伦变形损失函数训练深度网络，方法适用于2D/3D场景。
AI.result: 在拓扑感知评价指标上优于现有结构/拓扑感知分割方法，显著提升复杂结构图像的分割准确性。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合拓扑理论与深度学习，提出的同伦变形损失函数能有效提升图像分割的拓扑正确性，为精细结构分割提供新思路。

authors_text: Ehsan Imani,Wei Hu,Martha White
title: Representation Alignment in Neural Networks
title_zh: 神经网络中的表示对齐
abstract: It is now a standard for neural network representations to be trained on large, publicly available datasets, and used for new problems. The reasons for why neural network representations have been so successful for transfer, however, are still not fully understood. In this paper we show that, after training, neural network representations align their top singular vectors to the targets. We investigate this representation alignment phenomenon in a variety of neural network architectures and find that (a) alignment emerges across a variety of different architectures and optimizers, with more alignment arising from depth (b) alignment increases for layers closer to the output and (c) existing high-performance deep CNNs exhibit high levels of alignment. We then highlight why alignment between the top singular vectors and the targets can speed up learning and show in a classic synthetic transfer problem that representation alignment correlates with positive and negative transfer to similar and dissimilar tasks.
summary: It is now a standard for neural network representations to be trained on large, publicly available datasets, and used for new problems. The reasons for why neural network representations have been so successful for transfer, however, are still not fully understood. In this paper we show that, after training, neural network representations align their top singular vectors to the targets. We investigate this representation alignment phenomenon in a variety of neural network architectures and find that (a) alignment emerges across a variety of different architectures and optimizers, with more alignment arising from depth (b) alignment increases for layers closer to the output and (c) existing high-performance deep CNNs exhibit high levels of alignment. We then highlight why alignment between the top singular vectors and the targets can speed up learning and show in a classic synthetic transfer problem that representation alignment correlates with positive and negative transfer to similar and dissimilar tasks.
abstract_zh: 现在，它已成为在大型公开可用数据集上进行训练并用于解决新问题的神经网络表示的标准。然而，神经网络表示在迁移方面如此成功的原因仍不完全清楚。在本文中，我们表明，训练后，神经网络表示将其顶部奇异向量与目标对齐。我们研究了各种神经网络架构中的这种表示对齐现象，发现（a）对齐出现在各种不同的架构和优化器中，深度引起更多对齐（b）靠近输出的层的对齐增加，以及（c）现有的高性能深度 CNN 表现出高水平的对齐。然后，我们强调为什么顶部奇异向量和目标之间的对齐可以加速学习，并在经典的综合迁移问题中表明表示对齐与相似和不相似任务的正向和负向迁移相关。

AI.tldr: 本文研究神经网络表示在训练后与目标数据对齐的现象，分析其影响因素及对迁移学习的效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管神经网络表示在迁移学习中表现优异，但其成功机制尚不明确。本文旨在揭示表示对齐现象及其对学习效率和迁移性能的影响。
AI.method: 通过多种神经网络架构和优化器实验，分析不同层级的表示对齐程度，并在合成迁移任务中验证对齐与迁移效果的相关性。
AI.result: 发现对齐现象普遍存在于不同架构中，深度网络和靠近输出层的层级对齐更显著，高性能CNN具有高对齐性，且对齐程度与正负迁移相关。
AI.conclusion: 表示对齐是提升学习效率和迁移性能的关键因素，深度网络与输出层的对齐特性为迁移学习模型设计提供理论依据。

authors_text: Shounak Das,Ryan Watson,Jason Gross
title: Review of Factor Graphs for Robust GNSS Applications
title_zh: 稳健 GNSS 应用因子图回顾
abstract: Factor graphs have recently emerged as an alternative solution method for GNSS positioning. In this article, we review how factor graphs are implemented in GNSS, some of their advantages over Kalman Filters, and their importance in making positioning solutions more robust to degraded measurements. We also talk about how factor graphs can be an important tool for the field radio-navigation community.
summary: Factor graphs have recently emerged as an alternative solution method for GNSS positioning. In this article, we review how factor graphs are implemented in GNSS, some of their advantages over Kalman Filters, and their importance in making positioning solutions more robust to degraded measurements. We also talk about how factor graphs can be an important tool for the field radio-navigation community.
abstract_zh: 因子图最近已成为 GNSS 定位的替代解决方案。在本文中，我们回顾了因子图在 GNSS 中的实现方式、它们相对于卡尔曼滤波器的一些优势，以及它们在使定位解决方案对退化测量更稳健方面的重要性。我们还讨论了因子图如何成为现场无线电导航社区的重要工具。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了因子图在GNSS定位中的实现方法，分析其相较于卡尔曼滤波的优势，并探讨其在恶劣测量条件下的鲁棒性提升。
AI.motivation: 传统GNSS定位方法在测量退化场景下鲁棒性不足，需探索更可靠的解决方案以应对复杂环境下的定位需求。
AI.method: 通过文献回顾与对比分析，总结因子图在GNSS中的实现方式，重点比较其与卡尔曼滤波在处理非线性、多源误差及实时性方面的差异。
AI.result: 因子图能有效提升GNSS在测量退化场景下的定位鲁棒性，且为无线电导航领域提供了新的算法工具与研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 因子图是增强GNSS定位可靠性的重要技术路径，未来需进一步结合实际场景优化其计算效率与适用性。

search_text: Review of Factor Graphs for Robust GNSS Applications 稳健 GNSS 应用因子图回顾 Factor graphs have recently emerged as an alternative solution method for GNSS positioning. In this article, we review how factor graphs are implemented in GNSS, some of their advantages over Kalman Filters, and their importance in making positioning solutions more robust to degraded measurements. We also talk about how factor graphs can be an important tool for the field radio-navigation community. 因子图最近已成为 GNSS 定位的替代解决方案。在本文中，我们回顾了因子图在 GNSS 中的实现方式、它们相对于卡尔曼滤波器的一些优势，以及它们在使定位解决方案对退化测量更稳健方面的重要性。我们还讨论了因子图如何成为现场无线电导航社区的重要工具。 本文综述了因子图在GNSS定位中的实现方法，分析其相较于卡尔曼滤波的优势，并探讨其在恶劣测量条件下的鲁棒性提升。 Shounak Das,Ryan Watson,Jason Gross cs.RO

authors_text: Zifeng Ding,Yunpu Ma,Bailan He,Volker Tresp
title: A Simple But Powerful Graph Encoder for Temporal Knowledge Graph Completion
title_zh: 一种简单但功能强大的图编码器，用于完成时间知识图
abstract: Knowledge graphs contain rich knowledge about various entities and the relational information among them, while temporal knowledge graphs (TKGs) describe and model the interactions of the entities over time. In this context, automatic temporal knowledge graph completion (TKGC) has gained great interest. Recent TKGC methods integrate advanced deep learning techniques, e.g., Transformers, and achieve superior model performance. However, this also introduces a large number of excessive parameters, which brings a heavier burden for parameter optimization. In this paper, we propose a simple but powerful graph encoder for TKGC, called TARGCN. TARGCN is parameter-efficient, and it extensively explores every entity's temporal context for learning contextualized representations. We find that instead of adopting various kinds of complex modules, it is more beneficial to efficiently capture the temporal contexts of entities. We experiment TARGCN on three benchmark datasets. Our model can achieve a more than 46% relative improvement on the GDELT dataset compared with state-of-the-art TKGC models. Meanwhile, it outperforms the strongest baseline on the ICEWS05-15 dataset with around 18% fewer parameters.
summary: Knowledge graphs contain rich knowledge about various entities and the relational information among them, while temporal knowledge graphs (TKGs) describe and model the interactions of the entities over time. In this context, automatic temporal knowledge graph completion (TKGC) has gained great interest. Recent TKGC methods integrate advanced deep learning techniques, e.g., Transformers, and achieve superior model performance. However, this also introduces a large number of excessive parameters, which brings a heavier burden for parameter optimization. In this paper, we propose a simple but powerful graph encoder for TKGC, called TARGCN. TARGCN is parameter-efficient, and it extensively explores every entity's temporal context for learning contextualized representations. We find that instead of adopting various kinds of complex modules, it is more beneficial to efficiently capture the temporal contexts of entities. We experiment TARGCN on three benchmark datasets. Our model can achieve a more than 46% relative improvement on the GDELT dataset compared with state-of-the-art TKGC models. Meanwhile, it outperforms the strongest baseline on the ICEWS05-15 dataset with around 18% fewer parameters.
abstract_zh: 知识图包含有关各种实体的丰富知识以及它们之间的关系信息，而时态知识图（TKG）则描述和建模实体随时间的交互。在这种背景下，自动时序知识图补全（TKGC）引起了人们的极大兴趣。最近的 TKGC 方法集成了先进的深度学习技术，例如 Transformer，并实现了卓越的模型性能。然而这也引入了大量过多的参数，给参数优化带来了较重的负担。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单但功能强大的 TKGC 图形编码器，称为 TARGCN。 TARGCN 是参数高效的，它广泛探索每个实体的时间上下文以学习上下文表示。我们发现，与其采用各种复杂的模块，不如有效地捕获实体的时间上下文更有利。我们在三个基准数据集上对 TARGCN 进行实验。与最先进的 TKGC 模型相比，我们的模型可以在 GDELT 数据集上实现超过 46% 的相对改进。同时，它的性能优于 ICEWS05-15 数据集上最强的基线，参数减少了约 18%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TARGCN的参数高效的图编码器，用于改进时序知识图谱补全任务。
AI.motivation: 现有时序知识图谱补全方法依赖复杂模块（如Transformer），导致参数冗余且优化困难，需设计更高效的模型。
AI.method: 通过深入挖掘实体的时序上下文信息，设计参数高效的TARGCN模型，避免使用复杂结构以捕捉时序依赖关系。
AI.result: 在GDELT数据集上相对提升46%，在ICEWS05-15数据集上参数量减少18%且性能优于最强基线。
AI.conclusion: TARGCN通过聚焦时序上下文建模，在保持高性能的同时显著降低参数量，验证了简单结构的有效性。

authors_text: Young-Suk Lee,Ramon Fernandez Astudillo,Thanh Lam Hoang,Tahira Naseem,Radu Florian,Salim Roukos
title: Maximum Bayes Smatch Ensemble Distillation for AMR Parsing
title_zh: 用于 AMR 解析的最大贝叶斯匹配集成蒸馏
abstract: AMR parsing has experienced an unprecendented increase in performance in the last three years, due to a mixture of effects including architecture improvements and transfer learning. Self-learning techniques have also played a role in pushing performance forward. However, for most recent high performant parsers, the effect of self-learning and silver data augmentation seems to be fading. In this paper we propose to overcome this diminishing returns of silver data by combining Smatch-based ensembling techniques with ensemble distillation. In an extensive experimental setup, we push single model English parser performance to a new state-of-the-art, 85.9 (AMR2.0) and 84.3 (AMR3.0), and return to substantial gains from silver data augmentation. We also attain a new state-of-the-art for cross-lingual AMR parsing for Chinese, German, Italian and Spanish. Finally we explore the impact of the proposed technique on domain adaptation, and show that it can produce gains rivaling those of human annotated data for QALD-9 and achieve a new state-of-the-art for BioAMR.
summary: AMR parsing has experienced an unprecendented increase in performance in the last three years, due to a mixture of effects including architecture improvements and transfer learning. Self-learning techniques have also played a role in pushing performance forward. However, for most recent high performant parsers, the effect of self-learning and silver data augmentation seems to be fading. In this paper we propose to overcome this diminishing returns of silver data by combining Smatch-based ensembling techniques with ensemble distillation. In an extensive experimental setup, we push single model English parser performance to a new state-of-the-art, 85.9 (AMR2.0) and 84.3 (AMR3.0), and return to substantial gains from silver data augmentation. We also attain a new state-of-the-art for cross-lingual AMR parsing for Chinese, German, Italian and Spanish. Finally we explore the impact of the proposed technique on domain adaptation, and show that it can produce gains rivaling those of human annotated data for QALD-9 and achieve a new state-of-the-art for BioAMR.
abstract_zh: 由于架构改进和迁移学习等综合作用，AMR 解析在过去三年中经历了前所未有的性能提升。自学技术也在推动绩效进步方面发挥了作用。然而，对于最近的高性能解析器来说，自学习和银数据增强的效果似乎正在减弱。在本文中，我们建议通过将基于 Smatch 的集成技术与集成蒸馏相结合来克服白银数据收益递减的问题。在广泛的实验设置中，我们将单模型英语解析器性能提升到了新的最先进水平，85.9 (AMR2.0) 和 84.3 (AMR3.0)，并从银数据增强中恢复了可观的收益。我们还实现了中文、德语、意大利语和西班牙语跨语言 AMR 解析的最新技术。最后，我们探讨了所提出的技术对领域适应的影响，并表明它可以产生与 QALD-9 的人类注释数据相媲美的增益，并实现 BioAMR 的新的最先进技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合Smatch集成与蒸馏技术的AMR解析方法，以提升单模型性能及跨语言适应能力。
AI.motivation: 现有AMR解析器因自学习与银数据增强效果减弱，需新方法突破性能瓶颈并恢复银数据价值。
AI.method: 通过最大贝叶斯Smatch集成蒸馏技术，融合多模型预测并优化知识蒸馏过程，提升单模型表现。
AI.result: 英语AMR2.0达85.9、AMR3.0达84.3，跨语言解析（中德意西）及BioAMR、QALD-9领域适应均达新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效克服银数据边际效益，显著提升AMR解析性能，适用于多语言及领域自适应场景。

authors_text: Puya Amiri,Arsène Pérard-Gayot,Richard Membarth,Philipp Slusallek,Roland Leißa,Sebastian Hack
title: FLOWER: A comprehensive dataflow compiler for high-level synthesis
title_zh: FLOWER：用于高级综合的综合数据流编译器
abstract: FPGAs have found their way into data centers as accelerator cards, making reconfigurable computing more accessible for high-performance applications. At the same time, new high-level synthesis compilers like Xilinx Vitis and runtime libraries such as XRT attract software programmers into the reconfigurable domain. While software programmers are familiar with task-level and data-parallel programming, FPGAs often require different types of parallelism. For example, data-driven parallelism is mandatory to obtain satisfactory hardware designs for pipelined dataflow architectures. However, software programmers are often not acquainted with dataflow architectures - resulting in poor hardware designs. In this work we present FLOWER, a comprehensive compiler infrastructure that provides automatic canonical transformations for high-level synthesis from a domain-specific library. This allows programmers to focus on algorithm implementations rather than low-level optimizations for dataflow architectures. We show that FLOWER allows to synthesize efficient implementations for high-performance streaming applications targeting System-on-Chip and FPGA accelerator cards, in the context of image processing and computer vision.
summary: FPGAs have found their way into data centers as accelerator cards, making reconfigurable computing more accessible for high-performance applications. At the same time, new high-level synthesis compilers like Xilinx Vitis and runtime libraries such as XRT attract software programmers into the reconfigurable domain. While software programmers are familiar with task-level and data-parallel programming, FPGAs often require different types of parallelism. For example, data-driven parallelism is mandatory to obtain satisfactory hardware designs for pipelined dataflow architectures. However, software programmers are often not acquainted with dataflow architectures - resulting in poor hardware designs. In this work we present FLOWER, a comprehensive compiler infrastructure that provides automatic canonical transformations for high-level synthesis from a domain-specific library. This allows programmers to focus on algorithm implementations rather than low-level optimizations for dataflow architectures. We show that FLOWER allows to synthesize efficient implementations for high-performance streaming applications targeting System-on-Chip and FPGA accelerator cards, in the context of image processing and computer vision.
abstract_zh: FPGA 已作为加速卡进入数据中心，使高性能应用更容易实现可重构计算。与此同时，新的高级综合编译器（如 Xilinx Vitis）和运行时库（如 XRT）吸引了软件程序员进入可重构领域。虽然软件程序员熟悉任务级和数据并行编程，但 FPGA 通常需要不同类型的并行性。例如，数据驱动的并行性是为管道数据流架构获得令人满意的硬件设计所必需的。然而，软件程序员通常不熟悉数据流架构，从而导致硬件设计不佳。在这项工作中，我们展示了 FLOWER，一个全面的编译器基础设施，它为特定领域库的高级综合提供自动规范转换。这使得程序员能够专注于算法实现，而不是数据流架构的低级优化。我们证明，在图像处理和计算机视觉的背景下，FLOWER 可以综合针对片上系统和 FPGA 加速器卡的高性能流应用程序的高效实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FLOWER编译器，通过自动数据流转换实现高效硬件设计，使软件程序员无需掌握低级优化即可完成FPGA加速器开发。
AI.motivation: 软件程序员缺乏数据流架构知识，导致FPGA硬件设计效率低下，需自动化工具降低开发门槛并提升性能。
AI.method: 构建FLOWER编译器基础设施，提供基于领域特定库的自动规范转换，将算法实现与数据流优化解耦。
AI.result: 在图像处理和计算机视觉场景中，FLOWER成功生成针对SoC和FPGA加速卡的高性能流应用实现。
AI.conclusion: FLOWER通过自动化数据流转换显著提升开发效率，为FPGA在高性能计算领域的应用提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Boyang Deng,Charles R. Qi,Mahyar Najibi,Thomas Funkhouser,Yin Zhou,Dragomir Anguelov
title: Revisiting 3D Object Detection From an Egocentric Perspective
title_zh: 从自我中心的角度重新审视 3D 物体检测
abstract: 3D object detection is a key module for safety-critical robotics applications such as autonomous driving. For these applications, we care most about how the detections affect the ego-agent's behavior and safety (the egocentric perspective). Intuitively, we seek more accurate descriptions of object geometry when it's more likely to interfere with the ego-agent's motion trajectory. However, current detection metrics, based on box Intersection-over-Union (IoU), are object-centric and aren't designed to capture the spatio-temporal relationship between objects and the ego-agent. To address this issue, we propose a new egocentric measure to evaluate 3D object detection, namely Support Distance Error (SDE). Our analysis based on SDE reveals that the egocentric detection quality is bounded by the coarse geometry of the bounding boxes. Given the insight that SDE would benefit from more accurate geometry descriptions, we propose to represent objects as amodal contours, specifically amodal star-shaped polygons, and devise a simple model, StarPoly, to predict such contours. Our experiments on the large-scale Waymo Open Dataset show that SDE better reflects the impact of detection quality on the ego-agent's safety compared to IoU; and the estimated contours from StarPoly consistently improve the egocentric detection quality over recent 3D object detectors.
summary: 3D object detection is a key module for safety-critical robotics applications such as autonomous driving. For these applications, we care most about how the detections affect the ego-agent's behavior and safety (the egocentric perspective). Intuitively, we seek more accurate descriptions of object geometry when it's more likely to interfere with the ego-agent's motion trajectory. However, current detection metrics, based on box Intersection-over-Union (IoU), are object-centric and aren't designed to capture the spatio-temporal relationship between objects and the ego-agent. To address this issue, we propose a new egocentric measure to evaluate 3D object detection, namely Support Distance Error (SDE). Our analysis based on SDE reveals that the egocentric detection quality is bounded by the coarse geometry of the bounding boxes. Given the insight that SDE would benefit from more accurate geometry descriptions, we propose to represent objects as amodal contours, specifically amodal star-shaped polygons, and devise a simple model, StarPoly, to predict such contours. Our experiments on the large-scale Waymo Open Dataset show that SDE better reflects the impact of detection quality on the ego-agent's safety compared to IoU; and the estimated contours from StarPoly consistently improve the egocentric detection quality over recent 3D object detectors.
abstract_zh: 3D 物体检测是自动驾驶等安全关键型机器人应用的关键模块。对于这些应用程序，我们最关心的是检测如何影响自我代理的行为和安全（自我中心的角度）。直观上，当物体的几何形状更有可能干扰自我主体的运动轨迹时，我们会寻求更准确的描述。然而，当前基于框交集（IoU）的检测指标是以对象为中心的，并不是为了捕获对象和自我代理之间的时空关系而设计的。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的自我中心度量来评估 3D 对象检测，即支持距离误差（SDE）。我们基于 SDE 的分析表明，以自我为中心的检测质量受到边界框的粗略几何形状的限制。鉴于 SDE 将受益于更准确的几何描述，我们建议将对象表示为非模态轮廓，特别是非模态星形多边形，并设计一个简单的模型 StarPoly 来预测此类轮廓。我们在大规模 Waymo 开放数据集上的实验表明，与 IoU 相比，SDE 更好地反映了检测质量对 ego-agent 安全性的影响；与最近的 3D 物体检测器相比，StarPoly 的估计轮廓持续提高了以自我为中心的检测质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从自车视角评估3D物体检测的新方法，以提升自动驾驶等安全关键应用的检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有检测指标（如IoU）以物体为中心，无法反映物体与自车之间的时空关系，而实际应用中需关注检测结果对自车行为与安全的影响。
AI.method: 提出支持距离误差（SDE）作为新评估指标，并设计StarPoly模型，通过预测物体的模态星形多边形轮廓提升几何描述精度。
AI.result: 在Waymo数据集上的实验表明，SDE比IoU更准确反映检测质量对自车安全的影响，StarPoly显著提升自车视角下的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 从自车视角重新定义检测评估体系，可有效提升安全关键场景中3D物体检测的实用性与安全性。

authors_text: Dylan J. A. Brenneis,Adam S. Parker,Michael Bradley Johanson,Andrew Butcher,Elnaz Davoodi,Leslie Acker,Matthew M. Botvinick,Joseph Modayil,Adam White,Patrick M. Pilarski
title: Assessing Human Interaction in Virtual Reality With Continually Learning Prediction Agents Based on Reinforcement Learning Algorithms: A Pilot Study
title_zh: 使用基于强化学习算法的持续学习预测代理来评估虚拟现实中的人类交互：一项试点研究
abstract: Artificial intelligence systems increasingly involve continual learning to enable flexibility in general situations that are not encountered during system training. Human interaction with autonomous systems is broadly studied, but research has hitherto under-explored interactions that occur while the system is actively learning, and can noticeably change its behaviour in minutes. In this pilot study, we investigate how the interaction between a human and a continually learning prediction agent develops as the agent develops competency. Additionally, we compare two different agent architectures to assess how representational choices in agent design affect the human-agent interaction. We develop a virtual reality environment and a time-based prediction task wherein learned predictions from a reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm augment human predictions. We assess how a participant's performance and behaviour in this task differs across agent types, using both quantitative and qualitative analyses. Our findings suggest that human trust of the system may be influenced by early interactions with the agent, and that trust in turn affects strategic behaviour, but limitations of the pilot study rule out any conclusive statement. We identify trust as a key feature of interaction to focus on when considering RL-based technologies, and make several recommendations for modification to this study in preparation for a larger-scale investigation. A video summary of this paper can be found at https://youtu.be/oVYJdnBqTwQ .
summary: Artificial intelligence systems increasingly involve continual learning to enable flexibility in general situations that are not encountered during system training. Human interaction with autonomous systems is broadly studied, but research has hitherto under-explored interactions that occur while the system is actively learning, and can noticeably change its behaviour in minutes. In this pilot study, we investigate how the interaction between a human and a continually learning prediction agent develops as the agent develops competency. Additionally, we compare two different agent architectures to assess how representational choices in agent design affect the human-agent interaction. We develop a virtual reality environment and a time-based prediction task wherein learned predictions from a reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm augment human predictions. We assess how a participant's performance and behaviour in this task differs across agent types, using both quantitative and qualitative analyses. Our findings suggest that human trust of the system may be influenced by early interactions with the agent, and that trust in turn affects strategic behaviour, but limitations of the pilot study rule out any conclusive statement. We identify trust as a key feature of interaction to focus on when considering RL-based technologies, and make several recommendations for modification to this study in preparation for a larger-scale investigation. A video summary of this paper can be found at https://youtu.be/oVYJdnBqTwQ .
abstract_zh: 人工智能系统越来越多地涉及持续学习，以在系统训练期间未遇到的一般情况下实现灵活性。人类与自主系统的交互已得到广泛研究，但迄今为止的研究尚未充分探索系统主动学习时发生的交互，这些交互可以在几分钟内显着改变其行为。在这项试点研究中，我们研究了人类和不断学习的预测代理之间的交互如何随着代理能力的发展而发展。此外，我们还比较了两种不同的代理架构，以评估代理设计中的代表性选择如何影响人机交互。我们开发了一个虚拟现实环境和一个基于时间的预测任务，其中从强化学习（RL）算法中学到的预测增强了人类的预测。我们使用定量和定性分析来评估参与者在此任务中的表现和行为在不同代理类型之间的差异。我们的研究结果表明，人类对系统的信任可能会受到与代理的早期互动的影响，而这种信任反过来会影响战略行为，但试点研究的局限性排除了任何结论性的陈述。在考虑基于强化学习的技术时，我们将信任视为交互的一个关键特征，并提出了一些修改本研究的建议，为更大规模的调查做准备。本文的视频摘要可以在 https://youtu.be/oVYJdnBqTwQ 找到。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过虚拟现实环境研究人类与持续学习的强化学习预测代理的交互，比较两种代理架构对人机交互的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未充分探索系统在主动学习过程中行为快速变化时的人机交互，需明确信任在RL技术交互中的关键作用。
AI.method: 构建虚拟现实预测任务环境，采用强化学习算法设计两种代理架构，通过定量与定性分析比较参与者在不同代理下的表现与行为差异。
AI.result: 早期交互影响人类对系统的信任度，进而影响策略行为，但试点研究存在局限性，无法得出结论性结论。
AI.conclusion: 信任是RL技术人机交互的核心要素，需优化研究设计以开展更大规模的验证。

search_text: Assessing Human Interaction in Virtual Reality With Continually Learning Prediction Agents Based on Reinforcement Learning Algorithms: A Pilot Study 使用基于强化学习算法的持续学习预测代理来评估虚拟现实中的人类交互：一项试点研究 Artificial intelligence systems increasingly involve continual learning to enable flexibility in general situations that are not encountered during system training. Human interaction with autonomous systems is broadly studied, but research has hitherto under-explored interactions that occur while the system is actively learning, and can noticeably change its behaviour in minutes. In this pilot study, we investigate how the interaction between a human and a continually learning prediction agent develops as the agent develops competency. Additionally, we compare two different agent architectures to assess how representational choices in agent design affect the human-agent interaction. We develop a virtual reality environment and a time-based prediction task wherein learned predictions from a reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm augment human predictions. We assess how a participant's performance and behaviour in this task differs across agent types, using both quantitative and qualitative analyses. Our findings suggest that human trust of the system may be influenced by early interactions with the agent, and that trust in turn affects strategic behaviour, but limitations of the pilot study rule out any conclusive statement. We identify trust as a key feature of interaction to focus on when considering RL-based technologies, and make several recommendations for modification to this study in preparation for a larger-scale investigation. A video summary of this paper can be found at https://youtu.be/oVYJdnBqTwQ . 人工智能系统越来越多地涉及持续学习，以在系统训练期间未遇到的一般情况下实现灵活性。人类与自主系统的交互已得到广泛研究，但迄今为止的研究尚未充分探索系统主动学习时发生的交互，这些交互可以在几分钟内显着改变其行为。在这项试点研究中，我们研究了人类和不断学习的预测代理之间的交互如何随着代理能力的发展而发展。此外，我们还比较了两种不同的代理架构，以评估代理设计中的代表性选择如何影响人机交互。我们开发了一个虚拟现实环境和一个基于时间的预测任务，其中从强化学习（RL）算法中学到的预测增强了人类的预测。我们使用定量和定性分析来评估参与者在此任务中的表现和行为在不同代理类型之间的差异。我们的研究结果表明，人类对系统的信任可能会受到与代理的早期互动的影响，而这种信任反过来会影响战略行为，但试点研究的局限性排除了任何结论性的陈述。在考虑基于强化学习的技术时，我们将信任视为交互的一个关键特征，并提出了一些修改本研究的建议，为更大规模的调查做准备。本文的视频摘要可以在 https://youtu.be/oVYJdnBqTwQ 找到。 该论文通过虚拟现实环境研究人类与持续学习的强化学习预测代理的交互，比较两种代理架构对人机交互的影响。 Dylan J. authors_text: Shahar Avin,Haydn Belfield,Miles Brundage,Gretchen Krueger,Jasmine Wang,Adrian Weller,Markus Anderljung,Igor Krawczuk,David Krueger,Jonathan Lebensold,Tegan Maharaj,Noa Zilberman
title: Filling gaps in trustworthy development of AI
title_zh: 填补人工智能可信发展的​​空白
abstract: The range of application of artificial intelligence (AI) is vast, as is the potential for harm. Growing awareness of potential risks from AI systems has spurred action to address those risks, while eroding confidence in AI systems and the organizations that develop them. A 2019 study found over 80 organizations that published and adopted "AI ethics principles'', and more have joined since. But the principles often leave a gap between the "what" and the "how" of trustworthy AI development. Such gaps have enabled questionable or ethically dubious behavior, which casts doubts on the trustworthiness of specific organizations, and the field more broadly. There is thus an urgent need for concrete methods that both enable AI developers to prevent harm and allow them to demonstrate their trustworthiness through verifiable behavior. Below, we explore mechanisms (drawn from arXiv:2004.07213) for creating an ecosystem where AI developers can earn trust - if they are trustworthy. Better assessment of developer trustworthiness could inform user choice, employee actions, investment decisions, legal recourse, and emerging governance regimes.
summary: The range of application of artificial intelligence (AI) is vast, as is the potential for harm. Growing awareness of potential risks from AI systems has spurred action to address those risks, while eroding confidence in AI systems and the organizations that develop them. A 2019 study found over 80 organizations that published and adopted "AI ethics principles'', and more have joined since. But the principles often leave a gap between the "what" and the "how" of trustworthy AI development. Such gaps have enabled questionable or ethically dubious behavior, which casts doubts on the trustworthiness of specific organizations, and the field more broadly. There is thus an urgent need for concrete methods that both enable AI developers to prevent harm and allow them to demonstrate their trustworthiness through verifiable behavior. Below, we explore mechanisms (drawn from arXiv:2004.07213) for creating an ecosystem where AI developers can earn trust - if they are trustworthy. Better assessment of developer trustworthiness could inform user choice, employee actions, investment decisions, legal recourse, and emerging governance regimes.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）的应用范围非常广泛，潜在的危害也非常广泛。人们对人工智能系统潜在风险的认识不断增强，促使人们采取行动应对这些风险，但同时也削弱了人们对人工智能系统及其开发组织的信心。 2019 年的一项研究发现，已有 80 多个组织发布并采用了“人工智能道德原则”，并且自此加入了更多组织。但这些原则往往在值得信赖的人工智能开发的“内容”和“如何”之间留下了差距。这种差距导致了可疑或道德上可疑的行为，这使人们对特定组织和更广泛的领域的可信度产生怀疑。因此，迫切需要具体的方法，使人工智能开发人员能够防止伤害，并允许他们通过以下方式证明自己的可信度：下面，我们探索了创建一个生态系统的机制（取自 arXiv:2004.07213），如果人工智能开发人员值得信赖，那么更好地评估开发人员的可信度可以为用户选择、员工行为、投资决策、法律追索和新兴治理制度提供信息。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决AI可信开发中伦理原则与实践之间的差距，提出可验证的方法以建立开发者可信度。
AI.motivation: 现有AI伦理原则未能有效防止不当行为，导致信任危机，需具体方法评估开发者可信度以恢复信心。
AI.method: 借鉴arXiv:2004.07213的研究，探索建立开发者可信生态系统的机制，通过可验证行为证明可信度。
AI.result: 提出可验证的评估机制，帮助开发者预防危害并展示可信度，影响用户选择、投资决策及治理模式。
AI.conclusion: 需通过具体评估方法增强AI开发可信度，促进更有效的行业治理与社会信任构建。

authors_text: Xinshi Chen,Yan Zhu,Haowen Xu,Mengyang Liu,Liang Xiong,Muhan Zhang,Le Song
title: Efficient Dynamic Graph Representation Learning at Scale
title_zh: 大规模高效动态图表示学习
abstract: Dynamic graphs with ordered sequences of events between nodes are prevalent in real-world industrial applications such as e-commerce and social platforms. However, representation learning for dynamic graphs has posed great computational challenges due to the time and structure dependency and irregular nature of the data, preventing such models from being deployed to real-world applications. To tackle this challenge, we propose an efficient algorithm, Efficient Dynamic Graph lEarning (EDGE), which selectively expresses certain temporal dependency via training loss to improve the parallelism in computations. We show that EDGE can scale to dynamic graphs with millions of nodes and hundreds of millions of temporal events and achieve new state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance.
summary: Dynamic graphs with ordered sequences of events between nodes are prevalent in real-world industrial applications such as e-commerce and social platforms. However, representation learning for dynamic graphs has posed great computational challenges due to the time and structure dependency and irregular nature of the data, preventing such models from being deployed to real-world applications. To tackle this challenge, we propose an efficient algorithm, Efficient Dynamic Graph lEarning (EDGE), which selectively expresses certain temporal dependency via training loss to improve the parallelism in computations. We show that EDGE can scale to dynamic graphs with millions of nodes and hundreds of millions of temporal events and achieve new state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance.
abstract_zh: 节点之间具有有序事件序列的动态图在现实世界的工业应用（例如电子商务和社交平台）中很普遍。然而，由于时间和结构依赖性以及数据的不规则性质，动态图的表示学习带来了巨大的计算挑战，阻碍了此类模型部署到实际应用中。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种有效的算法，即高效动态图学习（EDGE），它通过训练损失选择性地表达某些时间依赖性，以提高计算的并行性。我们证明 EDGE 可以扩展到具有数百万个节点和数亿个时间事件的动态图，并实现新的最先进 (SOTA) 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的动态图表示学习算法EDGE，以解决大规模动态图数据的计算挑战。
AI.motivation: 动态图在工业场景中普遍存在，但现有方法因时间依赖性和数据不规则性导致计算效率低下，难以实际部署。
AI.method: 通过设计选择性表达时间依赖性的训练损失函数，提升计算并行性，提出EDGE算法。
AI.result: EDGE可扩展至数百万节点和数十亿时间事件，达到新的最先进性能指标。
AI.conclusion: EDGE在保持效果的同时显著提升动态图表示学习的效率，适合实际工业场景应用。

search_text: Efficient Dynamic Graph Representation Learning at Scale 大规模高效动态图表示学习 Dynamic graphs with ordered sequences of events between nodes are prevalent in real-world industrial applications such as e-commerce and social platforms. However, representation learning for dynamic graphs has posed great computational challenges due to the time and structure dependency and irregular nature of the data, preventing such models from being deployed to real-world applications. To tackle this challenge, we propose an efficient algorithm, Efficient Dynamic Graph lEarning (EDGE), which selectively expresses certain temporal dependency via training loss to improve the parallelism in computations. We show that EDGE can scale to dynamic graphs with millions of nodes and hundreds of millions of temporal events and achieve new state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance. 节点之间具有有序事件序列的动态图在现实世界的工业应用（例如电子商务和社交平台）中很普遍。然而，由于时间和结构依赖性以及数据的不规则性质，动态图的表示学习带来了巨大的计算挑战，阻碍了此类模型部署到实际应用中。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种有效的算法，即高效动态图学习（EDGE），它通过训练损失选择性地表达某些时间依赖性，以提高计算的并行性。我们证明 EDGE 可以扩展到具有数百万个节点和数亿个时间事件的动态图，并实现新的最先进 (SOTA) 性能。 本文提出了一种高效的动态图表示学习算法EDGE，以解决大规模动态图数据的计算挑战。 Xinshi Chen,Yan Zhu,Haowen Xu,Mengyang Liu,Liang Xiong,Muhan Zhang,Le Song cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Jakub Kowalski,Maksymilian Mika,Wojciech Pawlik,Jakub Sutowicz,Marek Szykuła,Mark H. M. Winands
title: Split Moves for Monte-Carlo Tree Search
title_zh: 蒙特卡洛树搜索的分割移动
abstract: In many games, moves consist of several decisions made by the player. These decisions can be viewed as separate moves, which is already a common practice in multi-action games for efficiency reasons. Such division of a player move into a sequence of simpler / lower level moves is called \emph{splitting}. So far, split moves have been applied only in forementioned straightforward cases, and furthermore, there was almost no study revealing its impact on agents' playing strength. Taking the knowledge-free perspective, we aim to answer how to effectively use split moves within Monte-Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) and what is the practical impact of split design on agents' strength. This paper proposes a generalization of MCTS that works with arbitrarily split moves. We design several variations of the algorithm and try to measure the impact of split moves separately on efficiency, quality of MCTS, simulations, and action-based heuristics. The tests are carried out on a set of board games and performed using the Regular Boardgames General Game Playing formalism, where split strategies of different granularity can be automatically derived based on an abstract description of the game. The results give an overview of the behavior of agents using split design in different ways. We conclude that split design can be greatly beneficial for single- as well as multi-action games.
summary: In many games, moves consist of several decisions made by the player. These decisions can be viewed as separate moves, which is already a common practice in multi-action games for efficiency reasons. Such division of a player move into a sequence of simpler / lower level moves is called \emph{splitting}. So far, split moves have been applied only in forementioned straightforward cases, and furthermore, there was almost no study revealing its impact on agents' playing strength. Taking the knowledge-free perspective, we aim to answer how to effectively use split moves within Monte-Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) and what is the practical impact of split design on agents' strength. This paper proposes a generalization of MCTS that works with arbitrarily split moves. We design several variations of the algorithm and try to measure the impact of split moves separately on efficiency, quality of MCTS, simulations, and action-based heuristics. The tests are carried out on a set of board games and performed using the Regular Boardgames General Game Playing formalism, where split strategies of different granularity can be automatically derived based on an abstract description of the game. The results give an overview of the behavior of agents using split design in different ways. We conclude that split design can be greatly beneficial for single- as well as multi-action games.
abstract_zh: 在许多游戏中，行动由玩家做出的多个决定组成。这些决策可以被视为单独的动作，出于效率原因，这已经是多动作游戏中的常见做法。将玩家的动作划分为一系列更简单/较低级别的动作称为\emph{分裂}。到目前为止，分步走法仅适用于上述简单的情况，而且几乎没有研究揭示其对智能体棋力的影响。从无知识的角度来看，我们的目标是回答如何在蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）中有效地使用分割动作，以及分割设计对智能体强度的实际影响是什么。本文提出了适用于任意分割动作的 MCTS 的推广。我们设计了该算法的几种变体，并尝试分别测量分步移动对 MCTS 的效率、质量、模拟和基于动作的启发法的影响。测试是在一组棋盘游戏上进行的，并使用常规棋盘游戏通用游戏玩法形式进行，其中可以根据游戏的抽象描述自动导出不同粒度的分割策略。结果概述了以不同方式使用拆分设计的代理的行为。我们的结论是，分体设计对于单动作游戏和多动作游戏都非常有益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于任意分割动作的蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）通用化方法，并分析了分割设计对智能体性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未系统探讨分割动作对MCTS效率及智能体实力的具体影响，需明确如何有效应用分割动作并评估其实际效果。
AI.method: 设计多种MCTS算法变体，通过Regular Boardgames General Game Playing框架在多款棋盘游戏中测试不同粒度的分割策略，分别评估其对效率、搜索质量、模拟和启发式方法的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明分割设计显著提升单动作与多动作游戏的智能体表现，不同分割粒度对效率和搜索质量有差异化影响。
AI.conclusion: 分割设计能有效增强单动作及多动作游戏的智能体性能，为MCTS在复杂决策场景的应用提供理论支持。

authors_text: Samuel Alexander,Arthur Paul Pedersen
title: Representation and Invariance in Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 强化学习中的表示和不变性
abstract: Researchers have formalized reinforcement learning (RL) in different ways. If an agent in one RL framework is to run within another RL framework's environments, the agent must first be converted, or mapped, into that other framework. Whether or not this is possible depends on not only the RL frameworks in question and but also how intelligence itself is measured. In this paper, we lay foundations for studying relative-intelligence-preserving mappability between RL frameworks. We define two types of mappings, called weak and strong translations, between RL frameworks and prove that existence of these mappings enables two types of intelligence comparison according to the mappings preserving relative intelligence. We investigate the existence or lack thereof of these mappings between: (i) RL frameworks where agents go first and RL frameworks where environments go first; and (ii) twelve different RL frameworks differing in terms of whether or not agents or environments are required to be deterministic. In the former case, we consider various natural mappings between agent-first and environment-first RL and vice versa; we show some positive results (some such mappings are strong or weak translations) and some negative results (some such mappings are not). In the latter case, we completely characterize which of the twelve RL-framework pairs admit weak translations, under the assumption of integer-valued rewards and some additional mild assumptions.
summary: Researchers have formalized reinforcement learning (RL) in different ways. If an agent in one RL framework is to run within another RL framework's environments, the agent must first be converted, or mapped, into that other framework. Whether or not this is possible depends on not only the RL frameworks in question and but also how intelligence itself is measured. In this paper, we lay foundations for studying relative-intelligence-preserving mappability between RL frameworks. We define two types of mappings, called weak and strong translations, between RL frameworks and prove that existence of these mappings enables two types of intelligence comparison according to the mappings preserving relative intelligence. We investigate the existence or lack thereof of these mappings between: (i) RL frameworks where agents go first and RL frameworks where environments go first; and (ii) twelve different RL frameworks differing in terms of whether or not agents or environments are required to be deterministic. In the former case, we consider various natural mappings between agent-first and environment-first RL and vice versa; we show some positive results (some such mappings are strong or weak translations) and some negative results (some such mappings are not). In the latter case, we completely characterize which of the twelve RL-framework pairs admit weak translations, under the assumption of integer-valued rewards and some additional mild assumptions.
abstract_zh: 研究人员以不同的方式将强化学习（RL）形式化。如果一个 RL 框架中的代理要在另一个 RL 框架的环境中运行，则必须首先将代理转换或映射到另一个框架中。这是否可能不仅取决于所讨论的强化学习框架，还取决于智力本身的测量方式。在本文中，我们为研究 RL 框架之间的相对智能保留可映射性奠定了基础。我们在强化学习框架之间定义了两种类型的映射，称为弱翻译和强翻译，并证明这些映射的存在使得根据保留相对智能的映射可以进行两种类型的智能比较。我们研究以下之间是否存在这些映射：（i）代理优先的强化学习框架和环境优先的强化学习框架； (ii) 十二种不同的强化学习框架，其不同之处在于代理或环境是否需要确定性。在前一种情况下，我们考虑代理优先和环境优先 RL 之间的各种自然映射，反之亦然；我们展示了一些积极的结果（一些这样的映射是强翻译或弱翻译）和一些消极的结果（一些这样的映射不是）。在后一种情况下，我们在整数值奖励和一些额外的温和假设的假设下，完全表征了 12 个 RL 框架对中哪些允许弱翻译。

AI.tldr: 本文研究强化学习框架间的可转换性，定义弱/强翻译映射以比较不同框架下的智能体相对智能。
AI.motivation: 不同RL框架间缺乏统一的智能度量标准，阻碍了跨框架的智能体比较与迁移，需建立框架间可转换的理论基础。
AI.method: 通过形式化定义弱/强翻译映射，分析两类框架（智能体优先/环境优先）及十二种确定性差异框架间的映射存在性，并结合整数奖励假设进行数学证明。
AI.result: 证明部分框架对存在强/弱翻译映射，部分不可转换；完全刻画了十二种框架对在整数奖励下的弱翻译可行性。
AI.conclusion: 建立了跨RL框架智能比较的理论基础，揭示了框架设计对智能度量的影响，为统一RL理论提供了方向。

authors_text: Micheal Caracciolo,Owen Casciotti,Christopher Lloyd,Ernesto Sola-Thomas,Matthew Weaver,Kyle Bielby,Md Abdul Baset Sarker,Masudul H. Imtiaz
title: Autonomous Navigation System from Simultaneous Localization and Mapping
title_zh: 同时定位和测绘的自主导航系统
abstract: This paper presents the development of a Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) based Autonomous Navigation system. The motivation for this study was to find a solution for navigating interior spaces autonomously. Interior navigation is challenging as it can be forever evolving. Solving this issue is necessary for multitude of services, like cleaning, the health industry, and in manufacturing industries. The focus of this paper is the description of the SLAM-based software architecture developed for this proposed autonomous system. A potential application of this system, oriented to a smart wheelchair, was evaluated. Current interior navigation solutions require some sort of guiding line, like a black line on the floor. With this proposed solution, interiors do not require renovation to accommodate this solution. The source code of this application has been made open source so that it could be re-purposed for a similar application. Also, this open-source project is envisioned to be improved by the broad open-source community upon past its current state.
summary: This paper presents the development of a Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) based Autonomous Navigation system. The motivation for this study was to find a solution for navigating interior spaces autonomously. Interior navigation is challenging as it can be forever evolving. A potential application of this system, oriented to a smart wheelchair, was evaluated. Current interior navigation solutions require some sort of guiding line, like a black line on the floor. With this proposed solution, interiors do not require renovation to accommodate this solution. The source code of this application has been made open source so that it could be re-purposed for a similar application. Also, this open-source project is envisioned to be improved by the broad open-source community upon past its current state.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了基于同步定位和建图（SLAM）的自主导航系统的开发。这项研究的动机是寻找一种自主导航室内空间的解决方案。内部导航具有挑战性，因为它可能会不断发展。解决这个问题对于清洁、健康行业和制造业等众多服务业来说是必要的。本文的重点是描述为该自主系统开发的基于 SLAM 的软件架构。评估了该系统面向智能轮椅的潜在应用。当前的内部导航解决方案需要某种引导线，例如地板上的黑线。通过这个提议的解决方案，内部不需要改造来适应这个解决方案。该应用程序的源代码已开源，以便可以将其重新用于类似的应用程序。此外，该开源项目预计将由广泛的开源社区在过去的现状基础上进行改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于同时定位与地图构建（SLAM）的自主导航系统，用于解决室内环境的自主导航问题。
AI.motivation: 现有室内导航方案依赖地板引导线等固定设施，无法适应动态变化的环境，而该系统无需环境改造即可实现自主导航，适用于清洁、医疗和制造等行业。
AI.method: 开发了基于SLAM的软件架构，并针对智能轮椅场景进行了应用评估，系统源代码已开源以供社区改进。
AI.result: 实现了无需环境改造的自主导航方案，开源代码为后续改进提供了基础，社区可基于此扩展应用。
AI.conclusion: 该系统有效解决了动态室内环境的自主导航难题，开源模式促进了技术共享与迭代优化。

authors_text: Akshay Badola,Cherian Roy,Vineet Padmanabhan,Rajendra Lal
title: Decomposing the Deep: Finding Class Specific Filters in Deep CNNs
title_zh: 分解深层：在深层 CNN 中寻找特定类别的过滤器
comment: 22 pages, 5 figures, 8 tables. github repo: https://github.com/akshaybadola/cnn-class-specific-filters-with-histogram. Preprint submitted to Elsevier. This version contains visualization of filters and ablation study w.r.t. influential features
comments: 22 pages, 5 figures, 8 tables. github repo: https://github.com/akshaybadola/cnn-class-specific-filters-with-histogram. Preprint submitted to Elsevier. This version contains visualization of filters and ablation study w.r.t. influential features
abstract: Interpretability of Deep Neural Networks has become a major area of exploration. Although these networks have achieved state of the art accuracy in many tasks, it is extremely difficult to interpret and explain their decisions. In this work we analyze the final and penultimate layers of Deep Convolutional Networks and provide an efficient method for identifying subsets of features that contribute most towards the network's decision for a class. We demonstrate that the number of such features per class is much lower in comparison to the dimension of the final layer and therefore the decision surface of Deep CNNs lies on a low dimensional manifold and is proportional to the network depth. Our methods allow to decompose the final layer into separate subspaces which is far more interpretable and has a lower computational cost as compared to the final layer of the full network.
summary: Interpretability of Deep Neural Networks has become a major area of exploration. Although these networks have achieved state of the art accuracy in many tasks, it is extremely difficult to interpret and explain their decisions. In this work we analyze the final and penultimate layers of Deep Convolutional Networks and provide an efficient method for identifying subsets of features that contribute most towards the network's decision for a class. We demonstrate that the number of such features per class is much lower in comparison to the dimension of the final layer and therefore the decision surface of Deep CNNs lies on a low dimensional manifold and is proportional to the network depth. Our methods allow to decompose the final layer into separate subspaces which is far more interpretable and has a lower computational cost as compared to the final layer of the full network.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络的可解释性已成为一个主要的探索领域。尽管这些网络在许多任务中实现了最先进的准确性，但解释和解释它们的决策却极其困难。在这项工作中，我们分析了深度卷积网络的最后一层和倒数第二层，并提供了一种有效的方法来识别对网络的类别决策贡献最大的特征子集。我们证明，与最后一层的维度相比，每类此类特征的数量要少得多，因此深度 CNN 的决策面位于低维流形上，并且与网络深度成正比。我们的方法允许将最后一层分解为单独的子空间，与整个网络的最后一层相比，这更容易解释，并且计算成本更低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种方法，通过分解深度卷积神经网络（CNN）的最终层，识别对特定类别决策贡献最大的特征子集，以提高模型的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络虽在多项任务中表现优异，但其决策过程难以解释。现有方法缺乏对最终层特征贡献的有效分析，导致模型可解释性不足。
AI.method: 通过分析CNN最终层和倒数第二层，提出一种高效方法，将最终层分解为多个子空间，每个子空间对应特定类别的关键特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，每个类别的关键特征数量远低于最终层的维度，证明深度CNN的决策表面位于低维流形上，且与网络深度相关。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分解最终层子空间，显著提升了模型可解释性，同时降低了计算成本，为理解深度CNN的决策机制提供了新视角。

authors_text: Kranthi Kumar Lella,Alphonse PJA
title: A literature review on COVID-19 disease diagnosis from respiratory sound data
title_zh: 利用呼吸音数据诊断COVID-19疾病的文献综述
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.07285
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.07285
abstract: The World Health Organization (WHO) has announced a COVID-19 was a global pandemic in March 2020. It was initially started in china in the year 2019 December and affected an expanding number of nations in various countries in the last few months. In this particular situation, many techniques, methods, and AI-based classification algorithms are put in the spotlight in reacting to fight against it and reduce the rate of such a global health crisis. COVID-19's main signs are heavy temperature, different cough, cold, breathing shortness, and a combination of loss of sense of smell and chest tightness. The digital world is growing day by day, in this context digital stethoscope can read all of these symptoms and diagnose respiratory disease. In this study, we majorly focus on literature reviews of how SARS-CoV-2 is spreading and in-depth analysis of the diagnosis of COVID-19 disease from human respiratory sounds like cough, voice, and breath by analyzing the respiratory sound parameters. We hope this review will provide an initiative for the clinical scientists and researcher's community to initiate open access, scalable, and accessible work in the collective battle against COVID-19.
summary: The World Health Organization (WHO) has announced a COVID-19 was a global pandemic in March 2020. It was initially started in china in the year 2019 December and affected an expanding number of nations in various countries in the last few months. In this particular situation, many techniques, methods, and AI-based classification algorithms are put in the spotlight in reacting to fight against it and reduce the rate of such a global health crisis. COVID-19's main signs are heavy temperature, different cough, cold, breathing shortness, and a combination of loss of sense of smell and chest tightness. The digital world is growing day by day, in this context digital stethoscope can read all of these symptoms and diagnose respiratory disease. In this study, we majorly focus on literature reviews of how SARS-CoV-2 is spreading and in-depth analysis of the diagnosis of COVID-19 disease from human respiratory sounds like cough, voice, and breath by analyzing the respiratory sound parameters. We hope this review will provide an initiative for the clinical scientists and researcher's community to initiate open access, scalable, and accessible work in the collective battle against COVID-19.
abstract_zh: 世界卫生组织 (WHO) 于 2020 年 3 月宣布新冠肺炎 (COVID-19) 为全球大流行病。它最初于 2019 年 12 月在中国开始，并在过去几个月中影响了越来越多的国家。在这种特殊情况下，许多技术、方法和基于人工智能的分类算法成为人们关注的焦点，以应对这种情况并降低这种全球健康危机的发生率。 COVID-19的主要症状是高烧、不同程度的咳嗽、感冒、呼吸急促以及嗅觉丧失和胸闷。数字世界正在日益发展，在这种背景下，数字听诊器可以读取所有这些症状并诊断呼吸道疾病。在本研究中，我们主要对SARS-CoV-2如何传播进行文献综述，并通过分析呼吸音参数，深入分析从咳嗽、说话、呼吸等人类呼吸音诊断COVID-19疾病。我们希望本次审查将为临床科学家和研究人员社区提供一项倡议，以在对抗 COVID-19 的集体战斗中启动开放获取、可扩展且可访问的工作。

AI.tldr: 综述利用呼吸声数据（如咳嗽、语音、呼吸）诊断COVID-19的现有研究，并分析其参数
AI.motivation: 通过分析呼吸声参数提供一种非侵入性、可扩展的诊断方法，以应对全球疫情带来的挑战
AI.method: 系统回顾和分析现有文献，探讨SARS-CoV-2的传播情况及呼吸声数据在诊断中的应用
AI.result: 总结了呼吸声数据分析在诊断中的潜力，并强调了开放数据共享和跨学科合作的重要性
AI.conclusion: 呼吸声数据分析是一种有前景的辅助诊断工具，需进一步研究和标准化以推动实际应用

search_text: A literature review on COVID-19 disease diagnosis from respiratory sound data 利用呼吸音数据诊断COVID-19疾病的文献综述 The World Health Organization (WHO) has announced a COVID-19 was a global pandemic in March 2020. It was initially started in china in the year 2019 December and affected an expanding number of nations in various countries in the last few months. In this particular situation, many techniques, methods, and AI-based classification algorithms are put in the spotlight in reacting to fight against it and reduce the rate of such a global health crisis. COVID-19's main signs are heavy temperature, different cough, cold, breathing shortness, and a combination of loss of sense of smell and chest tightness. The digital world is growing day by day, in this context digital stethoscope can read all of these symptoms and diagnose respiratory disease. In this study, we majorly focus on literature reviews of how SARS-CoV-2 is spreading and in-depth analysis of the diagnosis of COVID-19 disease from human respiratory sounds like cough, voice, and breath by analyzing the respiratory sound parameters. We hope this review will provide an initiative for the clinical scientists and researcher's community to initiate open access, scalable, and accessible work in the collective battle against COVID-19. 世界卫生组织 (WHO) 于 2020 年 3 月宣布新冠肺炎 (COVID-19) 为全球大流行病。它最初于 2019 年 12 月在中国开始，并在过去几个月中影响了越来越多的国家。在这种特殊情况下，许多技术、方法和基于人工智能的分类算法成为人们关注的焦点，以应对这种情况并降低这种全球健康危机的发生率。 COVID-19的主要症状是高烧、不同程度的咳嗽、感冒、呼吸急促以及嗅觉丧失和胸闷。数字世界正在日益发展，在这种背景下，数字听诊器可以读取所有这些症状并诊断呼吸道疾病。在本研究中，我们主要对SARS-CoV-2如何传播进行文献综述，并通过分析呼吸音参数，深入分析从咳嗽、说话、呼吸等人类呼吸音诊断COVID-19疾病。我们希望本次审查将为临床科学家和研究人员社区提供一项倡议，以在对抗 COVID-19 的集体战斗中启动开放获取、可扩展且可访问的工作。 综述利用呼吸声数据（如咳嗽、语音、呼吸）诊断COVID-19的现有研究，并分析其参数 Kranthi Kumar Lella,Alphonse PJA cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Asad Khan,E. A. Huerta,Prayush Kumar
title: AI and extreme scale computing to learn and infer the physics of higher order gravitational wave modes of quasi-circular, spinning, non-precessing binary black hole mergers
title_zh: 人工智能和超大规模计算，用于学习和推断准圆形、旋转、非进动双黑洞合并的高阶引力波模式的物理原理
abstract: We use artificial intelligence (AI) to learn and infer the physics of higher order gravitational wave modes of quasi-circular, spinning, non precessing binary black hole mergers. We trained AI models using 14 million waveforms, produced with the surrogate model NRHybSur3dq8, that include modes up to $\ell \leq 4$ and $(5,5)$, except for $(4,0)$ and $(4,1)$, that describe binaries with mass-ratios $q\leq8$, individual spins $s^z_{\{1,2\}}\in[-0.8, 0.8]$, and inclination angle $θ\in[0,π]$.Our probabilistic AI surrogates can accurately constrain the mass-ratio, individual spins, effective spin, and inclination angle of numerical relativity waveforms that describe such signal manifold. We compared the predictions of our AI models with Gaussian process regression, random forest, k-nearest neighbors, and linear regression, and with traditional Bayesian inference methods through the PyCBC Inference toolkit, finding that AI outperforms all these approaches in terms of accuracy, and are between three to four orders of magnitude faster than traditional Bayesian inference methods. Our AI surrogates were trained within 3.4 hours using distributed training on 1,536 NVIDIA V100 GPUs in the Summit supercomputer.
summary: We use artificial intelligence (AI) to learn and infer the physics of higher order gravitational wave modes of quasi-circular, spinning, non precessing binary black hole mergers. We trained AI models using 14 million waveforms, produced with the surrogate model NRHybSur3dq8, that include modes up to $\ell \leq 4$ and $(5,5)$, except for $(4,0)$ and $(4,1)$, that describe binaries with mass-ratios $q\leq8$, individual spins $s^z_{\{1,2\}}\in[-0.8, 0.8]$, and inclination angle $θ\in[0,π]$.Our probabilistic AI surrogates can accurately constrain the mass-ratio, individual spins, effective spin, and inclination angle of numerical relativity waveforms that describe such signal manifold. We compared the predictions of our AI models with Gaussian process regression, random forest, k-nearest neighbors, and linear regression, and with traditional Bayesian inference methods through the PyCBC Inference toolkit, finding that AI outperforms all these approaches in terms of accuracy, and are between three to four orders of magnitude faster than traditional Bayesian inference methods. Our AI surrogates were trained within 3.4 hours using distributed training on 1,536 NVIDIA V100 GPUs in the Summit supercomputer.
abstract_zh: 我们使用人工智能（AI）来学习和推断准圆形、旋转、非进动双黑洞合并的高阶引力波模式的物理原理。我们使用代理模型 NRHybSur3dq8 生成的 1400 万个波形训练了 AI 模型，其中包括高达 $\ell \leq 4$ 和 $(5,5)$ 的模式，但 $(4,0)$ 和 $(4,1)$ 除外，它们描述了质量比 $q\leq8$ 的二进制文件，单个自旋 $s^z_{\{1,2\}}\in[-0.8, 0.8]$ 和倾角 $θ\in[0,π]$。我们的概率 AI 代理可以准确地约束描述此类信号流形的数值相对论波形的质量比、单个自旋、有效自旋和倾角。我们通过 PyCBC Inference 工具包将人工智能模型的预测与高斯过程回归、随机森林、k 最近邻和线性回归以及传统贝叶斯推理方法进行了比较，发现人工智能在准确性方面优于所有这些方法，并且比传统贝叶斯推理方法快三到四个数量级。我们的 AI 代理在 Summit 超级计算机的 1,536 个 NVIDIA V100 GPU 上使用分布式训练，在 3.4 小时内接受了训练。

AI.tldr: 该论文利用人工智能和超大规模计算技术，学习并推断准圆轨道、自旋且非进动的双黑洞合并产生的高阶引力波模式的物理特性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理高维参数空间和大规模引力波数据时存在效率瓶颈，亟需更高效的参数估计和波形建模技术。
AI.method: 基于1400万组数值相对论波形数据，采用概率AI代理模型（Surrogate Model）进行训练，使用Summit超算的1536块V100 GPU进行分布式训练，对比了多种传统机器学习与贝叶斯推断方法。
AI.result: AI模型在质量比、自旋参数等关键物理量的估计精度上超越传统方法，计算速度比贝叶斯推断快3-4个数量级，训练耗时仅3.4小时。
AI.conclusion: AI代理模型为高精度、高效率的引力波参数估计提供了新范式，可显著提升多信使天文学研究能力。

authors_text: Matthew Walmer,Karan Sikka,Indranil Sur,Abhinav Shrivastava,Susmit Jha
title: Dual-Key Multimodal Backdoors for Visual Question Answering
title_zh: 用于视觉问答的双键多模式后门
comment: Published as conference paper at CVPR 2022. 22 pages, 11 figures, 12 tables
comments: Published as conference paper at CVPR 2022. 22 pages, 11 figures, 12 tables
abstract: The success of deep learning has enabled advances in multimodal tasks that require non-trivial fusion of multiple input domains. Although multimodal models have shown potential in many problems, their increased complexity makes them more vulnerable to attacks. A Backdoor (or Trojan) attack is a class of security vulnerability wherein an attacker embeds a malicious secret behavior into a network (e.g. targeted misclassification) that is activated when an attacker-specified trigger is added to an input. In this work, we show that multimodal networks are vulnerable to a novel type of attack that we refer to as Dual-Key Multimodal Backdoors. This attack exploits the complex fusion mechanisms used by state-of-the-art networks to embed backdoors that are both effective and stealthy. Instead of using a single trigger, the proposed attack embeds a trigger in each of the input modalities and activates the malicious behavior only when both the triggers are present. We present an extensive study of multimodal backdoors on the Visual Question Answering (VQA) task with multiple architectures and visual feature backbones. A major challenge in embedding backdoors in VQA models is that most models use visual features extracted from a fixed pretrained object detector. This is challenging for the attacker as the detector can distort or ignore the visual trigger entirely, which leads to models where backdoors are over-reliant on the language trigger. We tackle this problem by proposing a visual trigger optimization strategy designed for pretrained object detectors. Through this method, we create Dual-Key Backdoors with over a 98% attack success rate while only poisoning 1% of the training data. Finally, we release TrojVQA, a large collection of clean and trojan VQA models to enable research in defending against multimodal backdoors.
summary: The success of deep learning has enabled advances in multimodal tasks that require non-trivial fusion of multiple input domains. Although multimodal models have shown potential in many problems, their increased complexity makes them more vulnerable to attacks. A Backdoor (or Trojan) attack is a class of security vulnerability wherein an attacker embeds a malicious secret behavior into a network (e.g. targeted misclassification) that is activated when an attacker-specified trigger is added to an input. In this work, we show that multimodal networks are vulnerable to a novel type of attack that we refer to as Dual-Key Multimodal Backdoors. This attack exploits the complex fusion mechanisms used by state-of-the-art networks to embed backdoors that are both effective and stealthy. Instead of using a single trigger, the proposed attack embeds a trigger in each of the input modalities and activates the malicious behavior only when both the triggers are present. We present an extensive study of multimodal backdoors on the Visual Question Answering (VQA) task with multiple architectures and visual feature backbones. A major challenge in embedding backdoors in VQA models is that most models use visual features extracted from a fixed pretrained object detector. This is challenging for the attacker as the detector can distort or ignore the visual trigger entirely, which leads to models where backdoors are over-reliant on the language trigger. We tackle this problem by proposing a visual trigger optimization strategy designed for pretrained object detectors. Through this method, we create Dual-Key Backdoors with over a 98% attack success rate while only poisoning 1% of the training data. Finally, we release TrojVQA, a large collection of clean and trojan VQA models to enable research in defending against multimodal backdoors.
abstract_zh: 深度学习的成功使得多模态任务取得了进步，这些任务需要多个输入域的重要融合。尽管多模态模型在许多问题上显示出潜力，但其复杂性的增加使它们更容易受到攻击。后门（或特洛伊木马）攻击是一类安全漏洞，其中攻击者将恶意秘密行为嵌入到网络中（例如有针对性的错误分类），当攻击者指定的触发器添加到输入时，该攻击就会被激活。在这项工作中，我们表明多模式网络容易受到一种新型攻击，我们将其称为双密钥多模式后门。这种攻击利用最先进的网络所使用的复杂融合机制来嵌入有效且隐蔽的后门。所提出的攻击不是使用单个触发器，而是在每个输入模式中嵌入一个触发器，并且仅当两个触发器都存在时才激活恶意行为。我们对具有多种架构和视觉特征主干的视觉问答（VQA）任务中的多模式后门进行了广泛的研究。在 VQA 模型中嵌入后门的一个主要挑战是，大多数模型使用从固定的预训练目标检测器中提取的视觉特征。这对攻击者来说是一个挑战，因为检测器可能会完全扭曲或忽略视觉触发，从而导致后门过度依赖语言触发的模型。我们通过提出一种专为预训练目标检测器设计的视觉触发优化策略来解决这个问题。通过这种方法，我们创建了攻击成功率超过 98% 的双密钥后门，而仅毒害了 1% 的训练数据。最后，我们发布了 TrojVQA，这是一个大量干净和特洛伊木马 VQA 模型的集合，可用于防御多模式后门的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对视觉问答（VQA）任务的新型双重密钥多模态后门攻击方法，通过在视觉和语言模态中分别嵌入触发器实现隐蔽的恶意行为激活。
AI.motivation: 多模态模型因融合机制复杂而易受攻击，传统单触发器后门在VQA任务中因依赖固定预训练视觉特征提取器而效果受限，需设计更隐蔽且有效的攻击方案。
AI.method: 设计双重触发器机制，在视觉和语言模态分别植入触发器，仅当两者同时存在时激活后门；提出针对预训练目标检测器的视觉触发器优化策略，提升攻击成功率。
AI.result: 在多个VQA模型架构上实现超过98%的攻击成功率，仅需污染1%的训练数据，并发布包含干净模型和后门模型的TrojVQA数据集。
AI.conclusion: 双重密钥后门揭示了多模态模型的安全隐患，为后续防御研究提供了基准数据集和攻击范式，强调了多模态系统安全防护的重要性。
