ai_content_json.result: 在多个VQA模型架构上实现超过98%的攻击成功率，仅需污染1%的训练数据，并发布包含干净模型和后门模型的TrojVQA数据集。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 双重密钥后门揭示了多模态模型的安全隐患，为后续防御研究提供了基准数据集和攻击范式，强调了多模态系统安全防护的重要性。

tldr: 本文提出一种针对视觉问答（VQA）任务的新型双重密钥多模态后门攻击方法，通过在视觉和语言模态中分别嵌入触发器实现隐蔽的恶意行为激活。
motivation: 多模态模型因融合机制复杂而易受攻击，传统单触发器后门在VQA任务中因依赖固定预训练视觉特征提取器而效果受限，需设计更隐蔽且有效的攻击方案。
method: 设计双重触发器机制，在视觉和语言模态分别植入触发器，仅当两者同时存在时激活后门；提出针对预训练目标检测器的视觉触发器优化策略，提升攻击成功率。
result: 在多个VQA模型架构上实现超过98%的攻击成功率，仅需污染1%的训练数据，并发布包含干净模型和后门模型的TrojVQA数据集。
conclusion: 双重密钥后门揭示了多模态模型的安全隐患，为后续防御研究提供了基准数据集和攻击范式，强调了多模态系统安全防护的重要性。
search_text: Dual-Key Multimodal Backdoors for Visual Question Answering 用于视觉问答的双键多模式后门 The success of deep learning has enabled advances in multimodal tasks that require non-trivial fusion of multiple input domains. Although multimodal models have shown potential in many problems, their increased complexity makes them more vulnerable to attacks. A Backdoor (or Trojan) attack is a class of security vulnerability wherein an attacker embeds a malicious secret behavior into a network (e.g. targeted misclassification) that is activated when an attacker-specified trigger is added to an input. In this work, we show that multimodal networks are vulnerable to a novel type of attack that we refer to as Dual-Key Multimodal Backdoors. This attack exploits the complex fusion mechanisms used by state-of-the-art networks to embed backdoors that are both effective and stealthy. Instead of using a single trigger, the proposed attack embeds a trigger in each of the input modalities and activates the malicious behavior only when both the triggers are present. We present an extensive study of multimodal backdoors on the Visual Question Answering (VQA) task with multiple architectures and visual feature backbones. A major challenge in embedding backdoors in VQA models is that most models use visual features extracted from a fixed pretrained object detector. This is challenging for the attacker as the detector can distort or ignore the visual trigger entirely, which leads to models where backdoors are over-reliant on the language trigger. We tackle this problem by proposing a visual trigger optimization strategy designed for pretrained object detectors. Through this method, we create Dual-Key Backdoors with over a 98% attack success rate while only poisoning 1% of the training data. Finally, we release TrojVQA, a large collection of clean and trojan VQA models to enable research in defending against multimodal backdoors. 深度学习的成功使得多模态任务取得了进步，这些任务需要多个输入域的重要融合。尽管多模态模型在许多问题上显示出潜力，但其复杂性的增加使它们更容易受到攻击。后门（或特洛伊木马）攻击是一类安全漏洞，其中攻击者将恶意秘密行为嵌入到网络中（例如有针对性的错误分类），当攻击者指定的触发器添加到输入时，该攻击就会被激活。在这项工作中，我们表明多模式网络容易受到一种新型攻击，我们将其称为双密钥多模式后门。这种攻击利用最先进的网络所使用的复杂融合机制来嵌入有效且隐蔽的后门。所提出的攻击不是使用单个触发器，而是在每个输入模式中嵌入一个触发器，并且仅当两个触发器都存在时才激活恶意行为。我们对具有多种架构和视觉特征主干的视觉问答（VQA）任务中的多模式后门进行了广泛的研究。在 VQA 模型中嵌入后门的一个主要挑战是，大多数模型使用从固定的预训练目标检测器中提取的视觉特征。这对攻击者来说是一个挑战，因为检测器可能会完全扭曲或忽略视觉触发，从而导致后门过度依赖语言触发的模型。我们通过提出一种专为预训练目标检测器设计的视觉触发优化策略来解决这个问题。通过这种方法，我们创建了攻击成功率超过 98% 的双密钥后门，而仅毒害了 1% 的训练数据。最后，我们发布了 TrojVQA，这是一个大量干净和特洛伊木马 VQA 模型的集合，可用于防御多模式后门的研究。 本文提出一种针对视觉问答（VQA）任务的新型双重密钥多模态后门攻击方法，通过在视觉和语言模态中分别嵌入触发器实现隐蔽的恶意行为激活。 Matthew Walmer,Karan Sikka,Indranil Sur,Abhinav Shrivastava,Susmit Jha cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Yunzhong Hou,Zhongdao Wang,Shengjin Wang,Liang Zheng
title: Adaptive Affinity for Associations in Multi-Target Multi-Camera Tracking
title_zh: 多目标多摄像机跟踪中关联的自适应亲和力
comment: This paper appears in: IEEE Transactions on Image Processing
comments: This paper appears in: IEEE Transactions on Image Processing
abstract: Data associations in multi-target multi-camera tracking (MTMCT) usually estimate affinity directly from re-identification (re-ID) feature distances. However, we argue that it might not be the best choice given the difference in matching scopes between re-ID and MTMCT problems. Re-ID systems focus on global matching, which retrieves targets from all cameras and all times. In contrast, data association in tracking is a local matching problem, since its candidates only come from neighboring locations and time frames. In this paper, we design experiments to verify such misfit between global re-ID feature distances and local matching in tracking, and propose a simple yet effective approach to adapt affinity estimations to corresponding matching scopes in MTMCT. Instead of trying to deal with all appearance changes, we tailor the affinity metric to specialize in ones that might emerge during data associations. To this end, we introduce a new data sampling scheme with temporal windows originally used for data associations in tracking. Minimizing the mismatch, the adaptive affinity module brings significant improvements over global re-ID distance, and produces competitive performance on CityFlow and DukeMTMC datasets.
summary: Data associations in multi-target multi-camera tracking (MTMCT) usually estimate affinity directly from re-identification (re-ID) feature distances. However, we argue that it might not be the best choice given the difference in matching scopes between re-ID and MTMCT problems. Re-ID systems focus on global matching, which retrieves targets from all cameras and all times. In contrast, data association in tracking is a local matching problem, since its candidates only come from neighboring locations and time frames. In this paper, we design experiments to verify such misfit between global re-ID feature distances and local matching in tracking, and propose a simple yet effective approach to adapt affinity estimations to corresponding matching scopes in MTMCT. Instead of trying to deal with all appearance changes, we tailor the affinity metric to specialize in ones that might emerge during data associations. To this end, we introduce a new data sampling scheme with temporal windows originally used for data associations in tracking. Minimizing the mismatch, the adaptive affinity module brings significant improvements over global re-ID distance, and produces competitive performance on CityFlow and DukeMTMC datasets.
abstract_zh: 多目标多摄像机跟踪 (MTMCT) 中的数据关联通常直接根据重新识别 (re-ID) 特征距离来估计相似度。然而，我们认为，考虑到 re-ID 和 MTMCT 问题之间的匹配范围的差异，这可能不是最佳选择。 Re-ID 系统专注于全局匹配，可随时从所有摄像头检索目标。相反，跟踪中的数据关联是一个局部匹配问题，因为它的候选者仅来自邻近的位置和时间帧。在本文中，我们设计了实验来验证全局重识别特征距离与跟踪中的局部匹配之间的这种不匹配，并提出了一种简单而有效的方法来使亲和力估计适应 MTMCT 中相应的匹配范围。我们没有尝试处理所有外观变化，而是定制亲和力度量以专门处理数据关联期间可能出现的变化。为此，我们引入了一种新的数据采样方案，其时间窗口最初用于跟踪中的数据关联。自适应亲和力模块最大限度地减少了不匹配，显着改进了全局重识别距离，并在 CityFlow 和 DukeMTMC 数据集上产生了具有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文针对多目标多摄像头跟踪中的数据关联问题，提出自适应关联性方法以提升跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法直接使用全局重识别特征距离进行关联，但忽略了跟踪任务中局部时空匹配的特性，导致匹配不准确。
AI.method: 设计基于时间窗口的数据采样方案，引入自适应关联模块，使特征距离度量更贴合局部匹配需求。
AI.result: 在CityFlow和DukeMTMC数据集上显著优于全局重识别方法，取得具有竞争力的跟踪效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过适配局部匹配范围的关联性建模，有效解决了全局特征与跟踪任务间的不匹配问题。

conclusion: 通过适配局部匹配范围的关联性建模，有效解决了全局特征与跟踪任务间的不匹配问题。

authors_text: Daniel Mox,Vijay Kumar,Alejandro Ribeiro
title: Learning Connectivity-Maximizing Network Configurations
title_zh: 学习连接 - 最大化网络配置
abstract: In this letter we propose a data-driven approach to optimizing the algebraic connectivity of a team of robots. While a considerable amount of research has been devoted to this problem, we lack a method that scales in a manner suitable for online applications for more than a handful of agents. To that end, we propose a supervised learning approach with a convolutional neural network (CNN) that learns to place communication agents from an expert that uses an optimization-based strategy. We demonstrate the performance of our CNN on canonical line and ring topologies, 105k randomly generated test cases, and larger teams not seen during training. We also show how our system can be applied to dynamic robot teams through a Unity-based simulation. After training, our system produces connected configurations over an order of magnitude faster than the optimization-based scheme for teams of 10-20 agents.
summary: In this letter we propose a data-driven approach to optimizing the algebraic connectivity of a team of robots. While a considerable amount of research has been devoted to this problem, we lack a method that scales in a manner suitable for online applications for more than a handful of agents. To that end, we propose a supervised learning approach with a convolutional neural network (CNN) that learns to place communication agents from an expert that uses an optimization-based strategy. We demonstrate the performance of our CNN on canonical line and ring topologies, 105k randomly generated test cases, and larger teams not seen during training. We also show how our system can be applied to dynamic robot teams through a Unity-based simulation. After training, our system produces connected configurations over an order of magnitude faster than the optimization-based scheme for teams of 10-20 agents.
abstract_zh: 在这封信中，我们提出了一种数据驱动的方法来优化机器人团队的代数连接。尽管针对这个问题进行了大量的研究，但我们缺乏一种能够以适合多个代理的在线应用程序的方式进行扩展的方法。为此，我们提出了一种使用卷积神经网络（CNN）的监督学习方法，该方法学习使用基于优化的策略来放置来自专家的通信代理。我们展示了 CNN 在规范线型和环形拓扑、105k 随机生成的测试用例以及训练期间未见过的较大团队上的性能。我们还展示了如何通过基于 Unity 的模拟将我们的系统应用于动态机器人团队。训练后，对于 10-20 名智能体团队，我们的系统生成连接配置的速度比基于优化的方案快一个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动方法，利用卷积神经网络（CNN）优化机器人团队的代数连通性，解决现有方法在在线应用中的扩展性不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有优化机器人团队连通性的方法在在线应用中扩展性差，难以处理超过少量代理的场景，亟需更高效解决方案。
AI.method: 采用监督学习框架，训练CNN从基于优化策略的专家系统中学习通信代理部署，通过线型/环型拓扑、105k随机测试案例及Unity动态模拟验证性能。
AI.result: 训练后系统在10-20代理团队中生成连通配置的速度较传统优化方法快10倍，且在未见过的更大团队和动态场景中表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持配置质量的同时显著提升计算效率，为大规模动态机器人团队的在线连通性优化提供可行方案。

We demonstrate the performance of our CNN on canonical line and ring topologies, 105k randomly generated test cases, and larger teams not seen during training. We also show how our system can be applied to dynamic robot teams through a Unity-based simulation. After training, our system produces connected configurations over an order of magnitude faster than the optimization-based scheme for teams of 10-20 agents. 在这封信中，我们提出了一种数据驱动的方法来优化机器人团队的代数连接。尽管针对这个问题进行了大量的研究，但我们缺乏一种能够以适合多个代理的在线应用程序的方式进行扩展的方法。为此，我们提出了一种使用卷积神经网络（CNN）的监督学习方法，该方法学习使用基于优化的策略来放置来自专家的通信代理。我们展示了 CNN 在规范线型和环形拓扑、105k 随机生成的测试用例以及训练期间未见过的较大团队上的性能。我们还展示了如何通过基于 Unity 的模拟将我们的系统应用于动态机器人团队。训练后，对于 10-20 名智能体团队，我们的系统生成连接配置的速度比基于优化的方案快一个数量级。 本文提出一种数据驱动方法，利用卷积神经网络（CNN）优化机器人团队的代数连通性，解决现有方法在在线应用中的扩展性不足问题。 Daniel Mox,Vijay Kumar,Alejandro Ribeiro cs.RO,cs.LG,cs.MA,cs.NI

authors_text: Niv Cohen,Ron Abutbul,Yedid Hoshen
title: Out-of-Distribution Detection Without Class Labels
title_zh: 没有类别标签的分布外检测
abstract: Out-of-distribution detection seeks to identify novelties, samples that deviate from the norm. The task has been found to be quite challenging, particularly in the case where the normal data distribution consists of multiple semantic classes (e.g., multiple object categories). To overcome this challenge, current approaches require manual labeling of the normal images provided during training. In this work, we tackle multi-class novelty detection without class labels. Our simple but effective solution consists of two stages: we first discover "pseudo-class" labels using unsupervised clustering. Then using these pseudo-class labels, we are able to use standard supervised out-of-distribution detection methods. We verify the performance of our method by a favorable comparison to the state-of-the-art, and provide extensive analysis and ablations.
summary: Out-of-distribution detection seeks to identify novelties, samples that deviate from the norm. The task has been found to be quite challenging, particularly in the case where the normal data distribution consists of multiple semantic classes (e.g., multiple object categories). To overcome this challenge, current approaches require manual labeling of the normal images provided during training. In this work, we tackle multi-class novelty detection without class labels. Our simple but effective solution consists of two stages: we first discover "pseudo-class" labels using unsupervised clustering. Then using these pseudo-class labels, we are able to use standard supervised out-of-distribution detection methods. We verify the performance of our method by a favorable comparison to the state-of-the-art, and provide extensive analysis and ablations.
abstract_zh: 分布外检测旨在识别新颖性、偏离规范的样本。人们发现该任务非常具有挑战性，特别是在正常数据分布由多个语义类（例如，多个对象类别）组成的情况下。为了克服这一挑战，当前的方法需要对训练期间提供的正常图像进行手动标记。在这项工作中，我们解决了没有类标签的多类新颖性检测。我们简单但有效的解决方案包括两个阶段：我们首先使用无监督聚类发现“伪类”标签。然后使用这些伪类标签，我们能够使用标准的监督分布外检测方法。我们通过与最先进的方法进行有利的比较来验证我们的方法的性能，并提供广泛的分析和消融。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需类别标签的多类分布外检测方法，通过无监督聚类生成伪类别标签后应用标准检测技术。
AI.motivation: 现有分布外检测方法依赖人工标注的类别标签，限制了其在实际场景中的应用，尤其当正常数据包含多个语义类别时挑战更大。
AI.method: 两阶段方法：首先使用无监督聚类算法发现数据中的伪类别标签，随后基于这些伪标签应用传统监督式分布外检测方法。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个基准数据集上优于现有最先进方法，并通过消融实验验证了各组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的无监督伪标签生成策略有效解决了多类分布外检测中的标签依赖问题，为实际应用提供了更灵活的解决方案。

authors_text: Laura Kart,Niv Cohen
title: Approaches Toward Physical and General Video Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 物理和一般视频异常检测的方法
abstract: In recent years, many works have addressed the problem of finding never-seen-before anomalies in videos. Yet, most work has been focused on detecting anomalous frames in surveillance videos taken from security cameras. Meanwhile, the task of anomaly detection (AD) in videos exhibiting anomalous mechanical behavior, has been mostly overlooked. Anomaly detection in such videos is both of academic and practical interest, as they may enable automatic detection of malfunctions in many manufacturing, maintenance, and real-life settings. To assess the potential of the different approaches to detect such anomalies, we evaluate two simple baseline approaches: (i) Temporal-pooled image AD techniques. (ii) Density estimation of videos represented with features pretrained for video-classification. Development of such methods calls for new benchmarks to allow evaluation of different possible approaches. We introduce the Physical Anomalous Trajectory or Motion (PHANTOM) dataset, which contains six different video classes. Each class consists of normal and anomalous videos. The classes differ in the presented phenomena, the normal class variability, and the kind of anomalies in the videos. We also suggest an even harder benchmark where anomalous activities should be spotted on highly variable scenes.
summary: In recent years, many works have addressed the problem of finding never-seen-before anomalies in videos. Yet, most work has been focused on detecting anomalous frames in surveillance videos taken from security cameras. Meanwhile, the task of anomaly detection (AD) in videos exhibiting anomalous mechanical behavior, has been mostly overlooked. Anomaly detection in such videos is both of academic and practical interest, as they may enable automatic detection of malfunctions in many manufacturing, maintenance, and real-life settings. To assess the potential of the different approaches to detect such anomalies, we evaluate two simple baseline approaches: (i) Temporal-pooled image AD techniques. (ii) Density estimation of videos represented with features pretrained for video-classification. Development of such methods calls for new benchmarks to allow evaluation of different possible approaches. We introduce the Physical Anomalous Trajectory or Motion (PHANTOM) dataset, which contains six different video classes. Each class consists of normal and anomalous videos. The classes differ in the presented phenomena, the normal class variability, and the kind of anomalies in the videos. We also suggest an even harder benchmark where anomalous activities should be spotted on highly variable scenes.
abstract_zh: 近年来，许多工作都解决了在视频中发现前所未见的异常现象的问题。然而，大多数工作都集中在检测安全摄像机拍摄的监控视频中的异常帧。与此同时，在表现出异常机械行为的视频中进行异常检测（AD）的任务大多被忽视。此类视频中的异常检测既具有学术意义又具有实际意义，因为它们可以自动检测许多制造、维护和现实生活中的故障。为了评估不同方法检测此类异常的潜力，我们评估了两种简单的基线方法：（i）时间池图像 AD 技术。 (ii) 用预先训练用于视频分类的特征表示的视频的密度估计。此类方法的开发需要新的基准来评估不同的可能方法。我们介绍物理异常轨迹或运动（PHANTOM）数据集，其中包含六个不同的视频类别。每个类别都包含正常和异常视频。这些类别在呈现的现象、正常类别变异性以及视频中的异常类型方面有所不同。我们还建议采用更严格的基准，在高度可变的场景中发现异常活动。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在研究物理视频异常检测方法，并构建新的基准数据集以评估不同检测方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多集中于监控视频中的异常检测，而机械行为异常检测在工业等场景中具有重要应用价值，但尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 通过评估两种基线方法（时间池化图像AD技术与预训练特征的密度估计），并构建PHANTOM数据集作为新的评估基准。
AI.result: 实验验证了两种方法在PHANTOM数据集上的可行性，并展示了数据集在评估异常检测方法中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为物理视频异常检测提供了基础方法和基准，未来需探索更高效算法以应对复杂场景。

authors_text: Hongxu Yin,Arash Vahdat,Jose Alvarez,Arun Mallya,Jan Kautz,Pavlo Molchanov
title: AdaViT: Adaptive Tokens for Efficient Vision Transformer
title_zh: AdaViT：高效视觉变压器的自适应代币
abstract: We introduce A-ViT, a method that adaptively adjusts the inference cost of vision transformer (ViT) for images of different complexity. A-ViT achieves this by automatically reducing the number of tokens in vision transformers that are processed in the network as inference proceeds. We reformulate Adaptive Computation Time (ACT) for this task, extending halting to discard redundant spatial tokens. The appealing architectural properties of vision transformers enables our adaptive token reduction mechanism to speed up inference without modifying the network architecture or inference hardware. We demonstrate that A-ViT requires no extra parameters or sub-network for halting, as we base the learning of adaptive halting on the original network parameters. We further introduce distributional prior regularization that stabilizes training compared to prior ACT approaches. On the image classification task (ImageNet1K), we show that our proposed A-ViT yields high efficacy in filtering informative spatial features and cutting down on the overall compute. The proposed method improves the throughput of DeiT-Tiny by 62% and DeiT-Small by 38% with only 0.3% accuracy drop, outperforming prior art by a large margin. Project page at https://a-vit.github.io/
summary: We introduce A-ViT, a method that adaptively adjusts the inference cost of vision transformer (ViT) for images of different complexity. A-ViT achieves this by automatically reducing the number of tokens in vision transformers that are processed in the network as inference proceeds. We reformulate Adaptive Computation Time (ACT) for this task, extending halting to discard redundant spatial tokens. The appealing architectural properties of vision transformers enables our adaptive token reduction mechanism to speed up inference without modifying the network architecture or inference hardware. We demonstrate that A-ViT requires no extra parameters or sub-network for halting, as we base the learning of adaptive halting on the original network parameters. We further introduce distributional prior regularization that stabilizes training compared to prior ACT approaches. On the image classification task (ImageNet1K), we show that our proposed A-ViT yields high efficacy in filtering informative spatial features and cutting down on the overall compute. The proposed method improves the throughput of DeiT-Tiny by 62% and DeiT-Small by 38% with only 0.3% accuracy drop, outperforming prior art by a large margin. Project page at https://a-vit.github.io/
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 A-ViT，一种针对不同复杂度的图像自适应调整视觉变换器（ViT）的推理成本的方法。 A-ViT 通过自动减少视觉转换器中的标记数量来实现这一目标，这些标记在推理过程中在网络中进行处理。我们为此任务重新制定了自适应计算时间（ACT），延长了暂停时间以丢弃冗余的空间标记。视觉转换器具有吸引力的架构特性使我们的自适应令牌缩减机制能够加速推理，而无需修改网络架构或推理硬件。我们证明 A-ViT 不需要额外的参数或子网络来停止，因为我们将自适应停止的学习基于原始网络参数。我们进一步引入了分布式先验正则化，与之前的 ACT 方法相比，它可以稳定训练。在图像分类任务 (ImageNet1K) 上，我们表明我们提出的 A-ViT 在过滤信息空间特征和减少整体计算方面具有高效能。所提出的方法将 DeiT-Tiny 的吞吐量提高了 62%，将 DeiT-Small 的吞吐量提高了 38%，而准确率仅下降了 0.3%，大大优于现有技术。项目页面 https://a-vit.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文提出A-ViT方法，通过自适应调整视觉Transformer的token数量以提升推理效率。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉Transformer计算成本固定，难以适应不同复杂度图像的推理需求，需更高效的动态计算方法。
AI.method: 改革自适应计算时间（ACT）机制，扩展停止策略以丢弃冗余token，基于原始网络参数学习自适应停止，引入分布先验正则化稳定训练。
AI.result: 在ImageNet1K上，A-ViT使DeiT-Tiny吞吐量提升62%、DeiT-Small提升38%，仅损失0.3%准确率，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: A-ViT无需额外参数或硬件修改，通过动态token减少显著提升ViT推理效率，验证了自适应计算的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出A-ViT方法，通过自适应调整视觉Transformer的token数量以提升推理效率。
ai_content.motivation: 传统视觉Transformer计算成本固定，难以适应不同复杂度图像的推理需求，需更高效的动态计算方法。

ai_content.conclusion: A-ViT无需额外参数或硬件修改，通过动态token减少显著提升ViT推理效率，验证了自适应计算的有效性。

search_text: AdaViT: Adaptive Tokens for Efficient Vision Transformer AdaViT：高效视觉变压器的自适应代币 We introduce A-ViT, a method that adaptively adjusts the inference cost of vision transformer (ViT) for images of different complexity. A-ViT achieves this by automatically reducing the number of tokens in vision transformers that are processed in the network as inference proceeds. We reformulate Adaptive Computation Time (ACT) for this task, extending halting to discard redundant spatial tokens. The appealing architectural properties of vision transformers enables our adaptive token reduction mechanism to speed up inference without modifying the network architecture or inference hardware. We demonstrate that A-ViT requires no extra parameters or sub-network for halting, as we base the learning of adaptive halting on the original network parameters. We further introduce distributional prior regularization that stabilizes training compared to prior ACT approaches. On the image classification task (ImageNet1K), we show that our proposed A-ViT yields high efficacy in filtering informative spatial features and cutting down on the overall compute. The proposed method improves the throughput of DeiT-Tiny by 62% and DeiT-Small by 38% with only 0.3% accuracy drop, outperforming prior art by a large margin. Project page at https://a-vit.github.io/ 我们引入了 A-ViT，一种针对不同复杂度的图像自适应调整视觉变换器（ViT）的推理成本的方法。 A-ViT 通过自动减少视觉转换器中的标记数量来实现这一目标，这些标记在推理过程中在网络中进行处理。我们为此任务重新制定了自适应计算时间（ACT），延长了暂停时间以丢弃冗余的空间标记。视觉转换器具有吸引力的架构特性使我们的自适应令牌缩减机制能够加速推理，而无需修改网络架构或推理硬件。我们证明 A-ViT 不需要额外的参数或子网络来停止，因为我们将自适应停止的学习基于原始网络参数。我们进一步引入了分布式先验正则化，与之前的 ACT 方法相比，它可以稳定训练。在图像分类任务 (ImageNet1K) 上，我们表明我们提出的 A-ViT 在过滤信息空间特征和减少整体计算方面具有高效能。所提出的方法将 DeiT-Tiny 的吞吐量提高了 62%，将 DeiT-Small 的吞吐量提高了 38%，而准确率仅下降了 0.3%，大大优于现有技术。项目页面 https://a-vit.github.io/ 本文提出A-ViT方法，通过自适应调整视觉Transformer的token数量以提升推理效率。 Hongxu Yin,Arash Vahdat,Jose Alvarez,Arun Mallya,Jan Kautz,Pavlo Molchanov cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ankita Pasad,Felix Wu,Suwon Shon,Karen Livescu,Kyu J. Han
title: On the Use of External Data for Spoken Named Entity Recognition
title_zh: 关于使用外部数据进行口语命名实体识别
comment: Accepted at NAACL 2022. Codebase available at https://github.com/asappresearch/spoken-ner
comments: Accepted at NAACL 2022. Codebase available at https://github.com/asappresearch/spoken-ner
abstract: Spoken language understanding (SLU) tasks involve mapping from speech audio signals to semantic labels. Given the complexity of such tasks, good performance might be expected to require large labeled datasets, which are difficult to collect for each new task and domain. However, recent advances in self-supervised speech representations have made it feasible to consider learning SLU models with limited labeled data. In this work we focus on low-resource spoken named entity recognition (NER) and address the question: Beyond self-supervised pre-training, how can we use external speech and/or text data that are not annotated for the task? We draw on a variety of approaches, including self-training, knowledge distillation, and transfer learning, and consider their applicability to both end-to-end models and pipeline (speech recognition followed by text NER model) approaches. We find that several of these approaches improve performance in resource-constrained settings beyond the benefits from pre-trained representations alone. Compared to prior work, we find improved F1 scores of up to 16%. While the best baseline model is a pipeline approach, the best performance when using external data is ultimately achieved by an end-to-end model. We provide detailed comparisons and analyses, showing for example that end-to-end models are able to focus on the more NER-specific words.
summary: Spoken language understanding (SLU) tasks involve mapping from speech audio signals to semantic labels. Given the complexity of such tasks, good performance might be expected to require large labeled datasets, which are difficult to collect for each new task and domain. However, recent advances in self-supervised speech representations have made it feasible to consider learning SLU models with limited labeled data. In this work we focus on low-resource spoken named entity recognition (NER) and address the question: Beyond self-supervised pre-training, how can we use external speech and/or text data that are not annotated for the task? We draw on a variety of approaches, including self-training, knowledge distillation, and transfer learning, and consider their applicability to both end-to-end models and pipeline (speech recognition followed by text NER model) approaches. We find that several of these approaches improve performance in resource-constrained settings beyond the benefits from pre-trained representations alone. Compared to prior work, we find improved F1 scores of up to 16%. While the best baseline model is a pipeline approach, the best performance when using external data is ultimately achieved by an end-to-end model. We provide detailed comparisons and analyses, showing for example that end-to-end models are able to focus on the more NER-specific words.
abstract_zh: 口语理解 (SLU) 任务涉及从语音音频信号到语义标签的映射。考虑到此类任务的复杂性，良好的性能可能需要大型标记数据集，而这些数据集很难为每个新任务和领域收集。然而，自监督语音表示的最新进展使得考虑使用有限的标记数据学习 SLU 模型变得可行。在这项工作中，我们专注于低资源口语命名实体识别（NER）并解决以下问题：除了自我监督的预训练之外，我们如何使用未针对任务进行注释的外部语音和/或文本数据？我们利用了多种方法，包括自我训练、知识蒸馏和迁移学习，并考虑它们对端到端模型和管道（先进行语音识别，后进行文本 NER 模型）方法的适用性。我们发现，其中几种方法在资源受限的环境中提高了性能，而不仅仅是预训练表示带来的好处。与之前的工作相比，我们发现 F1 分数提高了高达 16%。虽然最好的基线模型是管道方法，但使用外部数据时的最佳性能最终是通过端到端模型实现的。我们提供详细的比较和分析，例如表明端到端模型能够专注于更特定于 NER 的单词。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在低资源条件下，如何利用未标注的外部语音和文本数据提升口语命名实体识别（NER）性能。
AI.motivation: 口语理解任务需要大量标注数据，但收集成本高。自监督预训练虽有效，但如何进一步利用外部数据提升模型表现仍需探索。
AI.method: 采用自训练、知识蒸馏和迁移学习方法，对比端到端模型与流水线模型（语音识别+文本NER）在外部数据辅助下的效果。
AI.result: 外部数据使F1分数提升最高达16%，端到端模型在结合外部数据时表现优于流水线模型。
AI.conclusion: 端到端模型能更聚焦NER相关词汇，外部数据有效补充标注不足，显著提升低资源场景下的口语NER性能。

authors_text: Siwei Zhang,Qianli Ma,Yan Zhang,Zhiyin Qian,Taein Kwon,Marc Pollefeys,Federica Bogo,Siyu Tang
title: EgoBody: Human Body Shape and Motion of Interacting People from Head-Mounted Devices
title_zh: EgoBody：通过头戴式设备进行交互的人体形状和运动
comment: Camera ready version for ECCV 2022, appendix included
comments: Camera ready version for ECCV 2022, appendix included
abstract: Understanding social interactions from egocentric views is crucial for many applications, ranging from assistive robotics to AR/VR. Key to reasoning about interactions is to understand the body pose and motion of the interaction partner from the egocentric view. However, research in this area is severely hindered by the lack of datasets. Existing datasets are limited in terms of either size, capture/annotation modalities, ground-truth quality, or interaction diversity. We fill this gap by proposing EgoBody, a novel large-scale dataset for human pose, shape and motion estimation from egocentric views, during interactions in complex 3D scenes. We employ Microsoft HoloLens2 headsets to record rich egocentric data streams (including RGB, depth, eye gaze, head and hand tracking). To obtain accurate 3D ground truth, we calibrate the headset with a multi-Kinect rig and fit expressive SMPL-X body meshes to multi-view RGB-D frames, reconstructing 3D human shapes and poses relative to the scene, over time. We collect 125 sequences, spanning diverse interaction scenarios, and propose the first benchmark for 3D full-body pose and shape estimation of the social partner from egocentric views. We extensively evaluate state-of-the-art methods, highlight their limitations in the egocentric scenario, and address such limitations leveraging our high-quality annotations. Data and code are available at https://sanweiliti.github.io/egobody/egobody.html.
summary: Understanding social interactions from egocentric views is crucial for many applications, ranging from assistive robotics to AR/VR. Key to reasoning about interactions is to understand the body pose and motion of the interaction partner from the egocentric view. However, research in this area is severely hindered by the lack of datasets. Existing datasets are limited in terms of either size, capture/annotation modalities, ground-truth quality, or interaction diversity. We fill this gap by proposing EgoBody, a novel large-scale dataset for human pose, shape and motion estimation from egocentric views, during interactions in complex 3D scenes. We employ Microsoft HoloLens2 headsets to record rich egocentric data streams (including RGB, depth, eye gaze, head and hand tracking). To obtain accurate 3D ground truth, we calibrate the headset with a multi-Kinect rig and fit expressive SMPL-X body meshes to multi-view RGB-D frames, reconstructing 3D human shapes and poses relative to the scene, over time. We collect 125 sequences, spanning diverse interaction scenarios, and propose the first benchmark for 3D full-body pose and shape estimation of the social partner from egocentric views. We extensively evaluate state-of-the-art methods, highlight their limitations in the egocentric scenario, and address such limitations leveraging our high-quality annotations. Data and code are available at https://sanweiliti.github.io/egobody/egobody.html.
abstract_zh: 从以自我为中心的角度理解社交互动对于从辅助机器人到 AR/VR 等许多应用来说至关重要。推理交互的关键是从自我中心的角度理解交互伙伴的身体姿势和运动。然而，该领域的研究因缺乏数据集而受到严重阻碍。现有数据集在大小、捕获/注释模式、真实质量或交互多样性方面受到限制。我们通过提出 EgoBody 来填补这一空白，这是一个新颖的大规模数据集，用于在复杂 3D 场景中的交互过程中从以自我为中心的视图中估计人体姿势、形状和运动。我们使用 Microsoft HoloLens2 耳机来记录丰富的以自我为中心的数据流（包括 RGB、深度、眼睛注视、头部和手部跟踪）。为了获得准确的 3D 地面实况，我们使用多 Kinect 装备校准耳机，并将富有表现力的 SMPL-X 身体网格拟合到多视图 RGB-D 帧，随着时间的推移重建相对于场景的 3D 人体形状和姿势。我们收集了 125 个序列，涵盖不同的交互场景，并提出了第一个从自我中心的角度对社交伙伴进行 3D 全身姿势和形状估计的基准。我们广泛评估最先进的方法，强调它们在以自我为中心的场景中的局限性，并利用我们的高质量注释解决这些局限性。数据和代码可在 https://sanweiliti.github.io/egobody/egobody.html 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EgoBody数据集，用于从第一人称视角估计互动中的人体姿态、形状和运动。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集在规模、模态多样性、标注质量或互动场景多样性方面存在不足，阻碍了第一人称视角下社交互动理解的研究。
AI.method: 使用Microsoft HoloLens2采集RGB、深度、眼动等多模态数据，结合多Kinect校准和SMPL-X模型拟合，重建场景中互动对象的三维人体形状与姿态。
AI.result: 构建包含125个序列的多样化数据集，建立首个第一人称视角三维全身姿态与形状估计基准，并分析现有方法的局限性。
AI.conclusion: EgoBody填补了第一人称社交互动数据集的空白，通过高质量标注推动相关算法改进与应用发展。

conclusion: EgoBody填补了第一人称社交互动数据集的空白，通过高质量标注推动相关算法改进与应用发展。
search_text: EgoBody: Human Body Shape and Motion of Interacting People from Head-Mounted Devices EgoBody：通过头戴式设备进行交互的人体形状和运动 Understanding social interactions from egocentric views is crucial for many applications, ranging from assistive robotics to AR/VR. Key to reasoning about interactions is to understand the body pose and motion of the interaction partner from the egocentric view. However, research in this area is severely hindered by the lack of datasets. Existing datasets are limited in terms of either size, capture/annotation modalities, ground-truth quality, or interaction diversity. We fill this gap by proposing EgoBody, a novel large-scale dataset for human pose, shape and motion estimation from egocentric views, during interactions in complex 3D scenes. We employ Microsoft HoloLens2 headsets to record rich egocentric data streams (including RGB, depth, eye gaze, head and hand tracking). To obtain accurate 3D ground truth, we calibrate the headset with a multi-Kinect rig and fit expressive SMPL-X body meshes to multi-view RGB-D frames, reconstructing 3D human shapes and poses relative to the scene, over time. We collect 125 sequences, spanning diverse interaction scenarios, and propose the first benchmark for 3D full-body pose and shape estimation of the social partner from egocentric views. We extensively evaluate state-of-the-art methods, highlight their limitations in the egocentric scenario, and address such limitations leveraging our high-quality annotations. Data and code are available at https://sanweiliti.github.io/egobody/egobody.html. 从以自我为中心的角度理解社交互动对于从辅助机器人到 AR/VR 等许多应用来说至关重要。推理交互的关键是从自我中心的角度理解交互伙伴的身体姿势和运动。然而，该领域的研究因缺乏数据集而受到严重阻碍。现有数据集在大小、捕获/注释模式、真实质量或交互多样性方面受到限制。我们通过提出 EgoBody 来填补这一空白，这是一个新颖的大规模数据集，用于在复杂 3D 场景中的交互过程中从以自我为中心的视图中估计人体姿势、形状和运动。我们使用 Microsoft HoloLens2 耳机来记录丰富的以自我为中心的数据流（包括 RGB、深度、眼睛注视、头部和手部跟踪）。为了获得准确的 3D 地面实况，我们使用多 Kinect 装备校准耳机，并将富有表现力的 SMPL-X 身体网格拟合到多视图 RGB-D 帧，随着时间的推移重建相对于场景的 3D 人体形状和姿势。我们收集了 125 个序列，涵盖不同的交互场景，并提出了第一个从自我中心的角度对社交伙伴进行 3D 全身姿势和形状估计的基准。我们广泛评估最先进的方法，强调它们在以自我为中心的场景中的局限性，并利用我们的高质量注释解决这些局限性。数据和代码可在 https://sanweiliti.github.io/egobody/egobody.html 获取。 本文提出EgoBody数据集，用于从第一人称视角估计互动中的人体姿态、形状和运动。 Siwei Zhang,Qianli Ma,Yan Zhang,Zhiyin Qian,Taein Kwon,Marc Pollefeys,Federica Bogo,Siyu Tang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yoav Kolumbus,Noam Nisan
title: How and Why to Manipulate Your Own Agent: On the Incentives of Users of Learning Agents
title_zh: 如何以及为何操纵自己的代理：关于学习代理用户的激励
comment: This paper was published In Proceeding of NeurIPS 2022
comments: This paper was published In Proceeding of NeurIPS 2022
abstract: The usage of automated learning agents is becoming increasingly prevalent in many online economic applications such as online auctions and automated trading. Motivated by such applications, this paper is dedicated to fundamental modeling and analysis of the strategic situations that the users of automated learning agents are facing. We consider strategic settings where several users engage in a repeated online interaction, assisted by regret-minimizing learning agents that repeatedly play a "game" on their behalf. We propose to view the outcomes of the agents' dynamics as inducing a "meta-game" between the users. Our main focus is on whether users can benefit in this meta-game from "manipulating" their own agents by misreporting their parameters to them. We define a general framework to model and analyze these strategic interactions between users of learning agents for general games and analyze the equilibria induced between the users in three classes of games. We show that, generally, users have incentives to misreport their parameters to their own agents, and that such strategic user behavior can lead to very different outcomes than those anticipated by standard analysis.
summary: The usage of automated learning agents is becoming increasingly prevalent in many online economic applications such as online auctions and automated trading. Motivated by such applications, this paper is dedicated to fundamental modeling and analysis of the strategic situations that the users of automated learning agents are facing. We consider strategic settings where several users engage in a repeated online interaction, assisted by regret-minimizing learning agents that repeatedly play a "game" on their behalf. We propose to view the outcomes of the agents' dynamics as inducing a "meta-game" between the users. Our main focus is on whether users can benefit in this meta-game from "manipulating" their own agents by misreporting their parameters to them. We define a general framework to model and analyze these strategic interactions between users of learning agents for general games and analyze the equilibria induced between the users in three classes of games. We show that, generally, users have incentives to misreport their parameters to their own agents, and that such strategic user behavior can lead to very different outcomes than those anticipated by standard analysis.
abstract_zh: 自动学习代理的使用在许多在线经济应用中变得越来越普遍，例如在线拍卖和自动交易。受此类应用的推动，本文致力于对自动学习代理用户所面临的战略形势进行基本建模和分析。我们考虑的策略设置是，多个用户在代表他们重复玩“游戏”的最小化遗憾的学习代理的协助下进行重复的在线交互。我们建议将代理动态的结果视为引发用户之间的“元游戏”。我们的主要关注点是用户是否可以通过向自己的代理错误报告参数来“操纵”他们自己的代理，从而在这个元游戏中受益。我们定义了一个通用框架来建模和分析一般游戏的学习代理用户之间的这些策略交互，并分析三类游戏中用户之间引起的均衡。我们表明，一般来说，用户有动机向自己的代理错误报告其参数，并且这种策略性用户行为可能会导致与标准分析预期的结果截然不同的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究用户如何通过操纵自身学习代理的参数来影响元游戏结果，并分析其战略行为对均衡的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着自动化学习代理在在线经济场景（如拍卖和交易）中的广泛应用，用户需要理解如何通过战略操控代理参数以获取优势。
AI.method: 构建元游戏框架建模用户间互动，分析三类游戏中的用户均衡，探讨参数误报对结果的影响。
AI.result: 用户普遍有动机向代理误报参数，此类行为会导致与传统分析显著不同的系统均衡结果。
AI.conclusion: 用户操纵代理参数的行为可能破坏系统预期效果，需设计更鲁棒的机制应对此类战略交互。

authors_text: Zhao Song,Lichen Zhang,Ruizhe Zhang
title: Training Multi-Layer Over-Parametrized Neural Network in Subquadratic Time
title_zh: 在次二次方时间内训练多层超参数化神经网络
abstract: We consider the problem of training a multi-layer over-parametrized neural network to minimize the empirical risk induced by a loss function. In the typical setting of over-parametrization, the network width $m$ is much larger than the data dimension $d$ and the number of training samples $n$ ($m=\mathrm{poly}(n,d)$), which induces a prohibitive large weight matrix $W\in \mathbb{R}^{m\times m}$ per layer. Naively, one has to pay $O(m^2)$ time to read the weight matrix and evaluate the neural network function in both forward and backward computation. In this work, we show how to reduce the training cost per iteration. Specifically, we propose a framework that uses $m^2$ cost only in the initialization phase and achieves \emph{a truly subquadratic cost per iteration} in terms of $m$, i.e., $m^{2-Ω(1)}$ per iteration. Our result has implications beyond standard over-parametrization theory, as it can be viewed as designing an efficient data structure on top of a pre-trained large model to further speed up the fine-tuning process, a core procedure to deploy large language models (LLM).
summary: We consider the problem of training a multi-layer over-parametrized neural network to minimize the empirical risk induced by a loss function. In the typical setting of over-parametrization, the network width $m$ is much larger than the data dimension $d$ and the number of training samples $n$ ($m=\mathrm{poly}(n,d)$), which induces a prohibitive large weight matrix $W\in \mathbb{R}^{m\times m}$ per layer. Naively, one has to pay $O(m^2)$ time to read the weight matrix and evaluate the neural network function in both forward and backward computation. In this work, we show how to reduce the training cost per iteration. Specifically, we propose a framework that uses $m^2$ cost only in the initialization phase and achieves \emph{a truly subquadratic cost per iteration} in terms of $m$, i.e., $m^{2-Ω(1)}$ per iteration. Our result has implications beyond standard over-parametrization theory, as it can be viewed as designing an efficient data structure on top of a pre-trained large model to further speed up the fine-tuning process, a core procedure to deploy large language models (LLM).
abstract_zh: 我们考虑训练多层超参数化神经网络以最小化损失函数引起的经验风险的问题。在典型的过参数化设置中，网络宽度 $m$ 远大于数据维度 $d$ 和训练样本数量 $n$ ($m=\mathrm{poly}(n,d)$)，这会导致每层权重矩阵 $W\in \mathbb{R}^{m\times m}$ 过大。天真地说，人们必须花费 $O(m^2)$ 时间来读取权重矩阵并在前向和后向计算中评估神经网络函数。在这项工作中，我们展示了如何降低每次迭代的训练成本。具体来说，我们提出了一个仅在初始化阶段使用 $m^2$ 成本的框架，并以 $m$ 为单位实现 \emph{每次迭代真正的次二次成本}，即每次迭代 $m^{2-Ω(1)}$。我们的结果具有超出标准超参数化理论的意义，因为它可以被视为在预先训练的大型模型之上设计一个有效的数据结构，以进一步加快微调过程，这是部署大型语言模型（LLM）的核心过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在子二次时间内训练多层超参数化神经网络的方法，通过优化权重矩阵的处理方式降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 超参数化神经网络的权重矩阵规模庞大，导致传统训练方法的计算复杂度高达O(m²)，严重影响训练效率，亟需更高效的算法。
AI.method: 设计了一种框架，在初始化阶段承担O(m²)成本，后续迭代中通过优化计算流程，将每次迭代的复杂度降至m^{2-Ω(1)}。
AI.result: 实现了每次迭代的子二次时间复杂度，显著提升训练效率，并可应用于大规模预训练模型的微调过程。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了传统超参数化理论的计算瓶颈，为高效部署大型语言模型提供了关键技术支撑。

authors_text: Zelin Ye,Min Chen
title: Visualizing Ensemble Predictions of Music Mood
title_zh: 音乐情绪的可视化合奏预测
comment: 11 pages, 7 figures, Final accepted version for VIS 2022
comments: 11 pages, 7 figures, Final accepted version for VIS 2022
abstract: Music mood classification has been a challenging problem in comparison with other music classification problems (e.g., genre, composer, or period). One solution for addressing this challenge is to use an ensemble of machine learning models. In this paper, we show that visualization techniques can effectively convey the popular prediction as well as uncertainty at different music sections along the temporal axis while enabling the analysis of individual ML models in conjunction with their application to different musical data. In addition to the traditional visual designs, such as stacked line graph, ThemeRiver, and pixel-based visualization, we introduce a new variant of ThemeRiver, called "dual-flux ThemeRiver", which allows viewers to observe and measure the most popular prediction more easily than stacked line graph and ThemeRiver. Together with pixel-based visualization, dual-flux ThemeRiver plots can also assist in model-development workflows, in addition to annotating music using ensemble model predictions.
summary: Music mood classification has been a challenging problem in comparison with other music classification problems (e.g., genre, composer, or period). One solution for addressing this challenge is to use an ensemble of machine learning models. In this paper, we show that visualization techniques can effectively convey the popular prediction as well as uncertainty at different music sections along the temporal axis while enabling the analysis of individual ML models in conjunction with their application to different musical data. In addition to the traditional visual designs, such as stacked line graph, ThemeRiver, and pixel-based visualization, we introduce a new variant of ThemeRiver, called "dual-flux ThemeRiver", which allows viewers to observe and measure the most popular prediction more easily than stacked line graph and ThemeRiver. Together with pixel-based visualization, dual-flux ThemeRiver plots can also assist in model-development workflows, in addition to annotating music using ensemble model predictions.
abstract_zh: 与其他音乐分类问题（例如流派、作曲家或时期）相比，音乐情绪分类一直是一个具有挑战性的问题。解决这一挑战的一个解决方案是使用机器学习模型的集合。在本文中，我们表明可视化技术可以有效地传达流行的预测以及沿时间轴不同音乐部分的不确定性，同时能够结合单个 ML 模型及其在不同音乐数据中的应用进行分析。除了传统的视觉设计，例如堆叠线图、ThemeRiver 和基于像素的可视化之外，我们还引入了 ThemeRiver 的新变体，称为“双通量 ThemeRiver”，它允许观众比堆叠线图和 ThemeRiver 更容易地观察和测量最流行的预测。与基于像素的可视化相结合，除了使用集成模型预测来注释音乐之外，双通量 ThemeRiver 图还可以协助模型开发工作流程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可视化方法，用于展示音乐情绪分类中集成学习模型的预测结果及不确定性。
AI.motivation: 音乐情绪分类相较于其他音乐分类任务更具挑战性，传统方法难以有效展示模型预测的不确定性及不同音乐片段的动态变化。
AI.method: 结合堆叠折线图、ThemeRiver和像素级可视化技术，提出双流ThemeRiver（dual-flux ThemeRiver）新方法，以更直观展示主流预测结果及模型不确定性。
AI.result: 双流ThemeRiver能更清晰呈现音乐各段落的主流情绪预测，辅助模型开发流程及基于集成模型的音乐标注。
AI.conclusion: 所提可视化技术有效融合了集成模型预测与不确定性分析，为音乐情绪分类的模型优化与应用提供了新工具。

authors_text: Kaiwen Liu,Nan Li,H. Eric Tseng,Ilya Kolmanovsky,Anouck Girard
title: Interaction-Aware Trajectory Prediction and Planning for Autonomous Vehicles in Forced Merge Scenarios
title_zh: 强制并道场景中自动驾驶车辆的交互感知轨迹预测和规划
abstract: Merging is, in general, a challenging task for both human drivers and autonomous vehicles, especially in dense traffic, because the merging vehicle typically needs to interact with other vehicles to identify or create a gap and safely merge into. In this paper, we consider the problem of autonomous vehicle control for forced merge scenarios. We propose a novel game-theoretic controller, called the Leader-Follower Game Controller (LFGC), in which the interactions between the autonomous ego vehicle and other vehicles with a priori uncertain driving intentions is modeled as a partially observable leader-follower game. The LFGC estimates the other vehicles' intentions online based on observed trajectories, and then predicts their future trajectories and plans the ego vehicle's own trajectory using Model Predictive Control (MPC) to simultaneously achieve probabilistically guaranteed safety and merging objectives. To verify the performance of LFGC, we test it in simulations and with the NGSIM data, where the LFGC demonstrates a high success rate of 97.5% in merging.
summary: Merging is, in general, a challenging task for both human drivers and autonomous vehicles, especially in dense traffic, because the merging vehicle typically needs to interact with other vehicles to identify or create a gap and safely merge into. In this paper, we consider the problem of autonomous vehicle control for forced merge scenarios. We propose a novel game-theoretic controller, called the Leader-Follower Game Controller (LFGC), in which the interactions between the autonomous ego vehicle and other vehicles with a priori uncertain driving intentions is modeled as a partially observable leader-follower game. The LFGC estimates the other vehicles' intentions online based on observed trajectories, and then predicts their future trajectories and plans the ego vehicle's own trajectory using Model Predictive Control (MPC) to simultaneously achieve probabilistically guaranteed safety and merging objectives. To verify the performance of LFGC, we test it in simulations and with the NGSIM data, where the LFGC demonstrates a high success rate of 97.5% in merging.
abstract_zh: 一般来说，对于人类驾驶员和自动驾驶车辆来说，并道都是一项具有挑战性的任务，尤其是在交通密集的情况下，因为并道车辆通常需要与其他车辆交互以识别或创造间隙并安全地并入。在本文中，我们考虑强制并道场景下的自动车辆控制问题。我们提出了一种新颖的博弈论控制器，称为领导者-跟随者博弈控制器（LFGC），其中自主车辆与具有先验不确定驾驶意图的其他车辆之间的交互被建模为部分可观察的领导者-跟随者博弈。 LFGC根据观察到的轨迹在线估计其他车辆的意图，然后预测它们的未来轨迹并使用模型预测控制（MPC）规划自我车辆自身的轨迹，以同时实现概率保证的安全和合并目标。为了验证 LFGC 的性能，我们在模拟和 NGSIM 数据中对其进行了测试，其中 LFGC 的合并成功率高达 97.5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种交互感知的轨迹预测与规划方法，解决自动驾驶车辆在强制合并场景下的安全合并问题。
AI.motivation: 合并操作在密集交通中极具挑战性，需处理其他车辆不确定的驾驶意图，传统方法难以同时保证安全性和合并效率。
AI.method: 设计基于博弈论的Leader-Follower Game Controller（LFGC），将车辆交互建模为部分可观测博弈，结合在线意图估计与模型预测控制（MPC）进行轨迹规划。
AI.result: 在仿真与NGSIM数据集测试中，LFGC实现97.5%的合并成功率，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: LFGC通过建模车辆交互不确定性，实现了安全与高效合并，为自动驾驶提供了新的控制框架。

authors_text: Manas Gaur,Kalpa Gunaratna,Vijay Srinivasan,Hongxia Jin
title: ISEEQ: Information Seeking Question Generation using Dynamic Meta-Information Retrieval and Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: ISEEQ：使用动态元信息检索和知识图生成信息搜索问题
comment: Accepted at AAAI 2022, preprint version. Supplementary materials are provided in the paper and alternatively can be found at https://github.com/manasgaur/AAAI-22
comments: Accepted at AAAI 2022, preprint version. Supplementary materials are provided in the paper and alternatively can be found at https://github.com/manasgaur/AAAI-22
abstract: Conversational Information Seeking (CIS) is a relatively new research area within conversational AI that attempts to seek information from end-users in order to understand and satisfy users' needs. If realized, such a system has far-reaching benefits in the real world; for example, a CIS system can assist clinicians in pre-screening or triaging patients in healthcare. A key open sub-problem in CIS that remains unaddressed in the literature is generating Information Seeking Questions (ISQs) based on a short initial query from the end-user. To address this open problem, we propose Information SEEking Question generator (ISEEQ), a novel approach for generating ISQs from just a short user query, given a large text corpus relevant to the user query. Firstly, ISEEQ uses a knowledge graph to enrich the user query. Secondly, ISEEQ uses the knowledge-enriched query to retrieve relevant context passages to ask coherent ISQs adhering to a conceptual flow. Thirdly, ISEEQ introduces a new deep generative-adversarial reinforcement learning-based approach for generating ISQs. We show that ISEEQ can generate high-quality ISQs to promote the development of CIS agents. ISEEQ significantly outperforms comparable baselines on five ISQ evaluation metrics across four datasets having user queries from diverse domains. Further, we argue that ISEEQ is transferable across domains for generating ISQs, as it shows the acceptable performance when trained and tested on different pairs of domains. The qualitative human evaluation confirms ISEEQ-generated ISQs are comparable in quality to human-generated questions and outperform the best comparable baseline.
summary: Conversational Information Seeking (CIS) is a relatively new research area within conversational AI that attempts to seek information from end-users in order to understand and satisfy users' needs. If realized, such a system has far-reaching benefits in the real world; for example, a CIS system can assist clinicians in pre-screening or triaging patients in healthcare. A key open sub-problem in CIS that remains unaddressed in the literature is generating Information Seeking Questions (ISQs) based on a short initial query from the end-user. To address this open problem, we propose Information SEEking Question generator (ISEEQ), a novel approach for generating ISQs from just a short user query, given a large text corpus relevant to the user query. Firstly, ISEEQ uses a knowledge graph to enrich the user query. Secondly, ISEEQ uses the knowledge-enriched query to retrieve relevant context passages to ask coherent ISQs adhering to a conceptual flow. Thirdly, ISEEQ introduces a new deep generative-adversarial reinforcement learning-based approach for generating ISQs. We show that ISEEQ can generate high-quality ISQs to promote the development of CIS agents. ISEEQ significantly outperforms comparable baselines on five ISQ evaluation metrics across four datasets having user queries from diverse domains. Further, we argue that ISEEQ is transferable across domains for generating ISQs, as it shows the acceptable performance when trained and tested on different pairs of domains. The qualitative human evaluation confirms ISEEQ-generated ISQs are comparable in quality to human-generated questions and outperform the best comparable baseline.
abstract_zh: 会话信息搜索（CIS）是会话人工智能中一个相对较新的研究领域，它试图从最终用户那里寻求信息，以理解和满足用户的需求。如果实现，这样的系统将在现实世界中带来深远的好处；例如，CIS 系统可以帮助临床医生在医疗保健中对患者进行预筛查或分类。 CIS 中一个在文献中尚未解决的关键开放子问题是根据最终用户的简短初始查询生成信息搜索问题 (ISQ)。为了解决这个悬而未决的问题，我们提出了信息搜索问题生成器（ISEEQ），这是一种在给定与用户查询相关的大型文本语料库的情况下，从简短的用户查询生成 ISQ 的新颖方法。首先，ISEEQ使用知识图来丰富用户查询。其次，ISEEQ 使用知识丰富的查询来检索相关上下文段落，以询问符合概念流程的连贯 ISQ。第三，ISEEQ 引入了一种新的基于深度生成对抗强化学习的方法来生成 ISQ。我们证明ISEEQ可以生成高质量的ISQ来促进CIS代理的发展。 ISEEQ 在具有来自不同领域的用户查询的四个数据集的五个 ISQ 评估指标上显着优于可比较的基线。此外，我们认为 ISEEQ 可以跨域转移以生成 ISQ，因为它在不同的域对上进行训练和测试时显示出可接受的性能。人类定性评估证实 ISEEQ 生成的 ISQ 在质量上与人类生成的问题相当，并且优于最佳可比较基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ISEEQ方法，通过动态元信息检索和知识图谱生成信息寻求问题（ISQ），以提升对话式信息检索系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 对话式信息检索（CIS）在医疗等领域有广泛应用，但如何从用户短查询生成高质量ISQ仍是未解决的挑战，现有方法在跨领域适应性和问题质量上存在不足。
AI.method: ISEEQ分三步：1）利用知识图谱增强用户查询；2）基于增强后查询检索相关上下文段落；3）采用生成对抗强化学习框架生成符合语义逻辑的ISQ。
AI.result: ISEEQ在四个跨领域数据集的五项评估指标上显著优于基线方法，且在不同领域间具有可迁移性，人工评估显示其生成问题质量可与人类标注相当。
AI.conclusion: ISEEQ通过结合知识图谱与深度生成模型有效解决了ISQ生成难题，为CIS智能体发展提供了可跨领域部署的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出ISEEQ方法，通过动态元信息检索和知识图谱生成信息寻求问题（ISQ），以提升对话式信息检索系统的性能。
ai_content.motivation: 对话式信息检索（CIS）在医疗等领域有广泛应用，但如何从用户短查询生成高质量ISQ仍是未解决的挑战，现有方法在跨领域适应性和问题质量上存在不足。

ai_content.conclusion: ISEEQ通过结合知识图谱与深度生成模型有效解决了ISQ生成难题，为CIS智能体发展提供了可跨领域部署的解决方案。

search_text: ISEEQ: Information Seeking Question Generation using Dynamic Meta-Information Retrieval and Knowledge Graphs ISEEQ：使用动态元信息检索和知识图生成信息搜索问题 Conversational Information Seeking (CIS) is a relatively new research area within conversational AI that attempts to seek information from end-users in order to understand and satisfy users' needs. If realized, such a system has far-reaching benefits in the real world; for example, a CIS system can assist clinicians in pre-screening or triaging patients in healthcare. A key open sub-problem in CIS that remains unaddressed in the literature is generating Information Seeking Questions (ISQs) based on a short initial query from the end-user. To address this open problem, we propose Information SEEking Question generator (ISEEQ), a novel approach for generating ISQs from just a short user query, given a large text corpus relevant to the user query. Firstly, ISEEQ uses a knowledge graph to enrich the user query. Secondly, ISEEQ uses the knowledge-enriched query to retrieve relevant context passages to ask coherent ISQs adhering to a conceptual flow. Thirdly, ISEEQ introduces a new deep generative-adversarial reinforcement learning-based approach for generating ISQs. We show that ISEEQ can generate high-quality ISQs to promote the development of CIS agents. ISEEQ significantly outperforms comparable baselines on five ISQ evaluation metrics across four datasets having user queries from diverse domains. Further, we argue that ISEEQ is transferable across domains for generating ISQs, as it shows the acceptable performance when trained and tested on different pairs of domains. The qualitative human evaluation confirms ISEEQ-generated ISQs are comparable in quality to human-generated questions and outperform the best comparable baseline. 会话信息搜索（CIS）是会话人工智能中一个相对较新的研究领域，它试图从最终用户那里寻求信息，以理解和满足用户的需求。如果实现，这样的系统将在现实世界中带来深远的好处；例如，CIS 系统可以帮助临床医生在医疗保健中对患者进行预筛查或分类。 CIS 中一个在文献中尚未解决的关键开放子问题是根据最终用户的简短初始查询生成信息搜索问题 (ISQ)。为了解决这个悬而未决的问题，我们提出了信息搜索问题生成器（ISEEQ），这是一种在给定与用户查询相关的大型文本语料库的情况下，从简短的用户查询生成 ISQ 的新颖方法。首先，ISEEQ使用知识图来丰富用户查询。其次，ISEEQ 使用知识丰富的查询来检索相关上下文段落，以询问符合概念流程的连贯 ISQ。第三，ISEEQ 引入了一种新的基于深度生成对抗强化学习的方法来生成 ISQ。我们证明ISEEQ可以生成高质量的ISQ来促进CIS代理的发展。 ISEEQ 在具有来自不同领域的用户查询的四个数据集的五个 ISQ 评估指标上显着优于可比较的基线。此外，我们认为 ISEEQ 可以跨域转移以生成 ISQ，因为它在不同的域对上进行训练和测试时显示出可接受的性能。人类定性评估证实 ISEEQ 生成的 ISQ 在质量上与人类生成的问题相当，并且优于最佳可比较基线。 本文提出ISEEQ方法，通过动态元信息检索和知识图谱生成信息寻求问题（ISQ），以提升对话式信息检索系统的性能。 Manas Gaur,Kalpa Gunaratna,Vijay Srinivasan,Hongxia Jin cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Oren Barkan,Roy Hirsch,Ori Katz,Avi Caciularu,Jonathan Weill,Noam Koenigstein
title: Cold Item Integration in Deep Hybrid Recommenders via Tunable Stochastic Gates
title_zh: 通过可调随机门将冷项集成到深度混合推荐器中
abstract: A major challenge in collaborative filtering methods is how to produce recommendations for cold items (items with no ratings), or integrate cold item into an existing catalog. Over the years, a variety of hybrid recommendation models have been proposed to address this problem by utilizing items' metadata and content along with their ratings or usage patterns. In this work, we wish to revisit the cold start problem in order to draw attention to an overlooked challenge: the ability to integrate and balance between (regular) warm items and completely cold items. In this case, two different challenges arise: (1) preserving high quality performance on warm items, while (2) learning to promote cold items to relevant users. First, we show that these two objectives are in fact conflicting, and the balance between them depends on the business needs and the application at hand. Next, we propose a novel hybrid recommendation algorithm that bridges these two conflicting objectives and enables a harmonized balance between preserving high accuracy for warm items while effectively promoting completely cold items. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm on movies, apps, and articles recommendations, and provide an empirical analysis of the cold-warm trade-off.
summary: A major challenge in collaborative filtering methods is how to produce recommendations for cold items (items with no ratings), or integrate cold item into an existing catalog. Over the years, a variety of hybrid recommendation models have been proposed to address this problem by utilizing items' metadata and content along with their ratings or usage patterns. In this work, we wish to revisit the cold start problem in order to draw attention to an overlooked challenge: the ability to integrate and balance between (regular) warm items and completely cold items. In this case, two different challenges arise: (1) preserving high quality performance on warm items, while (2) learning to promote cold items to relevant users. First, we show that these two objectives are in fact conflicting, and the balance between them depends on the business needs and the application at hand. Next, we propose a novel hybrid recommendation algorithm that bridges these two conflicting objectives and enables a harmonized balance between preserving high accuracy for warm items while effectively promoting completely cold items. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithm on movies, apps, and articles recommendations, and provide an empirical analysis of the cold-warm trade-off.
abstract_zh: 协同过滤方法的一个主要挑战是如何为冷项（没有评级的项）生成推荐，或将冷项集成到现有目录中。多年来，人们提出了各种混合推荐模型，通过利用项目的元数据和内容及其评级或使用模式来解决这个问题。在这项工作中，我们希望重新审视冷启动问题，以便引起人们对一个被忽视的挑战的关注：在（常规）热项目和完全冷项目之间集成和平衡的能力。在这种情况下，会出现两个不同的挑战：（1）保持热商品的高质量性能，同时（2）学习向相关用户推广冷商品。首先，我们表明这两个目标实际上是相互冲突的，它们之间的平衡取决于业务需求和当前的应用程序。接下来，我们提出了一种新颖的混合推荐算法，可以弥合这两个相互冲突的目标，并在保持热商品的高精度与有效推广完全冷商品之间实现协调平衡。我们证明了所提出的算法在电影、应用程序和文章推荐上的有效性，并提供了冷暖权衡的实证分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过可调随机门机制的深度混合推荐算法，解决推荐系统中冷启动物品与已有物品的整合与平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有混合推荐模型在处理冷启动物品时，难以同时保持对已有物品的高推荐质量并有效推广冷启动物品，两者目标存在冲突。
AI.method: 设计可调随机门结构，动态平衡冷启动物品与已有物品的权重，通过门控机制实现两者在推荐中的协调优化。
AI.result: 在电影、应用和文章推荐场景中验证了算法有效性，实证分析展示了冷启动与已有物品推荐效果的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合算法能有效协调冷启动物品推广与已有物品推荐质量的矛盾，为实际推荐系统提供可行解决方案。

authors_text: Han Zheng,Zimu Li,Junyu Liu,Sergii Strelchuk,Risi Kondor
title: Speeding up Learning Quantum States through Group Equivariant Convolutional Quantum Ansätze
title_zh: 通过群等变卷积量子 Ansätze 加速学习量子态
abstract: We develop a theoretical framework for $S_n$-equivariant convolutional quantum circuits with SU$(d)$-symmetry, building on and significantly generalizing Jordan's Permutational Quantum Computing (PQC) formalism based on Schur-Weyl duality connecting both SU$(d)$ and $S_n$ actions on qudits. In particular, we utilize the Okounkov-Vershik approach to prove Harrow's statement (Ph.D. Thesis 2005 p.160) on the equivalence between $\operatorname{SU}(d)$ and $S_n$ irrep bases and to establish the $S_n$-equivariant Convolutional Quantum Alternating Ansätze ($S_n$-CQA) using Young-Jucys-Murphy (YJM) elements. We prove that $S_n$-CQA is able to generate any unitary in any given $S_n$ irrep sector, which may serve as a universal model for a wide array of quantum machine learning problems with the presence of SU($d$) symmetry. Our method provides another way to prove the universality of Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) and verifies that 4-local SU($d$) symmetric unitaries are sufficient to build generic SU($d$) symmetric quantum circuits up to relative phase factors. We present numerical simulations to showcase the effectiveness of the ansätze to find the ground state energy of the $J_1$--$J_2$ antiferromagnetic Heisenberg model on the rectangular and Kagome lattices. Our work provides the first application of the celebrated Okounkov-Vershik's $S_n$ representation theory to quantum physics and machine learning, from which to propose quantum variational ansätze that strongly suggests to be classically intractable tailored towards a specific optimization problem.
summary: We develop a theoretical framework for $S_n$-equivariant convolutional quantum circuits with SU$(d)$-symmetry, building on and significantly generalizing Jordan's Permutational Quantum Computing (PQC) formalism based on Schur-Weyl duality connecting both SU$(d)$ and $S_n$ actions on qudits. In particular, we utilize the Okounkov-Vershik approach to prove Harrow's statement (Ph.D. Thesis 2005 p.160) on the equivalence between $\operatorname{SU}(d)$ and $S_n$ irrep bases and to establish the $S_n$-equivariant Convolutional Quantum Alternating Ansätze ($S_n$-CQA) using Young-Jucys-Murphy (YJM) elements. We prove that $S_n$-CQA is able to generate any unitary in any given $S_n$ irrep sector, which may serve as a universal model for a wide array of quantum machine learning problems with the presence of SU($d$) symmetry. Our method provides another way to prove the universality of Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) and verifies that 4-local SU($d$) symmetric unitaries are sufficient to build generic SU($d$) symmetric quantum circuits up to relative phase factors. We present numerical simulations to showcase the effectiveness of the ansätze to find the ground state energy of the $J_1$--$J_2$ antiferromagnetic Heisenberg model on the rectangular and Kagome lattices. Our work provides the first application of the celebrated Okounkov-Vershik's $S_n$ representation theory to quantum physics and machine learning, from which to propose quantum variational ansätze that strongly suggests to be classically intractable tailored towards a specific optimization problem.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了一个具有 SU$(d)$ 对称性的 $S_n$ 等变卷积量子电路的理论框架，该框架建立在并显着推广了 Jordan 的排列量子计算 (PQC) 形式主义上，该形式主义基于连接 SU$(d)$ 和 $S_n$ 对量子的动作的 Schur-Weyl 对偶性。特别是，我们利用 Okounkov-Vershik 方法来证明 Harrow 关于 $\operatorname{SU}(d)$ 和 $S_n$ irrep 基之间的等价性的陈述（Ph.D. Thesis 2005 p.160），并使用 Young-Jucys-Murphy 建立 $S_n$ 等变卷积量子交替 Ansätze ($S_n$-CQA) （YJM）元素。我们证明 $S_n$-CQA 能够在任何给定的 $S_n$ 无表示扇区中生成任何幺正，这可以作为存在 SU($d$) 对称性的各种量子机器学习问题的通用模型。我们的方法提供了另一种方法来证明量子近似优化算法（QAOA）的普适性，并验证了 4 局部 SU($d$) 对称幺正足以构建达到相对相位因子的通用 SU($d$) 对称量子电路。我们提出数值模拟来展示 ansätze 在矩形和 Kagome 晶格上查找 $J_1$-$J_2$ 反铁磁海森堡模型的基态能量的有效性。我们的工作首次将著名的 Okounkov-Vershik 的 $S_n$ 表示理论应用于量子物理和机器学习，从中提出了量子变分分析，强烈建议针对特定的优化问题进行经典的棘手处理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于S_n等变卷积量子电路的理论框架，结合SU(d)对称性，用于加速量子态学习。
AI.motivation: 为了解决具有SU(d)对称性的量子机器学习问题，需要更高效的量子电路模型以利用对称性提升计算效率。
AI.method: 基于Okounkov-Vershik表示论方法和Young-Jucys-Murphy元素，构建S_n等变卷积量子交替变分算法(S_n-CQA)，并结合Schur-Weyl对偶性理论证明其普适性。
AI.result: 证明S_n-CQA可生成任意S_n不可约表示子空间中的酉算符，通过数值模拟验证其在J1-J2反铁磁海森堡模型中的有效性，并建立与QAOA算法的关联。
AI.conclusion: 首次将Okounkov-Vershik的S_n表示论应用于量子物理与机器学习，提出的变分量子电路对特定优化问题具有经典计算难以模拟的优势。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于S_n等变卷积量子电路的理论框架，结合SU(d)对称性，用于加速量子态学习。

ai_content.method: 基于Okounkov-Vershik表示论方法和Young-Jucys-Murphy元素，构建S_n等变卷积量子交替变分算法(S_n-CQA)，并结合Schur-Weyl对偶性理论证明其普适性。

ai_content.conclusion: 首次将Okounkov-Vershik的S_n表示论应用于量子物理与机器学习，提出的变分量子电路对特定优化问题具有经典计算难以模拟的优势。

search_text: Speeding up Learning Quantum States through Group Equivariant Convolutional Quantum Ansätze 通过群等变卷积量子 Ansätze 加速学习量子态 We develop a theoretical framework for $S_n$-equivariant convolutional quantum circuits with SU$(d)$-symmetry, building on and significantly generalizing Jordan's Permutational Quantum Computing (PQC) formalism based on Schur-Weyl duality connecting both SU$(d)$ and $S_n$ actions on qudits. In particular, we utilize the Okounkov-Vershik approach to prove Harrow's statement (Ph.D. Thesis 2005 p.160) on the equivalence between $\operatorname{SU}(d)$ and $S_n$ irrep bases and to establish the $S_n$-equivariant Convolutional Quantum Alternating Ansätze ($S_n$-CQA) using Young-Jucys-Murphy (YJM) elements. We prove that $S_n$-CQA is able to generate any unitary in any given $S_n$ irrep sector, which may serve as a universal model for a wide array of quantum machine learning problems with the presence of SU($d$) symmetry. Our method provides another way to prove the universality of Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) and verifies that 4-local SU($d$) symmetric unitaries are sufficient to build generic SU($d$) symmetric quantum circuits up to relative phase factors. We present numerical simulations to showcase the effectiveness of the ansätze to find the ground state energy of the $J_1$--$J_2$ antiferromagnetic Heisenberg model on the rectangular and Kagome lattices. Our work provides the first application of the celebrated Okounkov-Vershik's $S_n$ representation theory to quantum physics and machine learning, from which to propose quantum variational ansätze that strongly suggests to be classically intractable tailored towards a specific optimization problem. 我们开发了一个具有 SU$(d)$ 对称性的 $S_n$ 等变卷积量子电路的理论框架，该框架建立在并显着推广了 Jordan 的排列量子计算 (PQC) 形式主义上，该形式主义基于连接 SU$(d)$ 和 $S_n$ 对量子的动作的 Schur-Weyl 对偶性。特别是，我们利用 Okounkov-Vershik 方法来证明 Harrow 关于 $\operatorname{SU}(d)$ 和 $S_n$ irrep 基之间的等价性的陈述（Ph.D. Thesis 2005 p.160），并使用 Young-Jucys-Murphy 建立 $S_n$ 等变卷积量子交替 Ansätze ($S_n$-CQA) （YJM）元素。我们证明 $S_n$-CQA 能够在任何给定的 $S_n$ 无表示扇区中生成任何幺正，这可以作为存在 SU($d$) 对称性的各种量子机器学习问题的通用模型。我们的方法提供了另一种方法来证明量子近似优化算法（QAOA）的普适性，并验证了 4 局部 SU($d$) 对称幺正足以构建达到相对相位因子的通用 SU($d$) 对称量子电路。我们提出数值模拟来展示 ansätze 在矩形和 Kagome 晶格上查找 $J_1$-$J_2$ 反铁磁海森堡模型的基态能量的有效性。我们的工作首次将著名的 Okounkov-Vershik 的 $S_n$ 表示理论应用于量子物理和机器学习，从中提出了量子变分分析，强烈建议针对特定的优化问题进行经典的棘手处理。 本文提出了一种基于S_n等变卷积量子电路的理论框架，结合SU(d)对称性，用于加速量子态学习。 Han Zheng,Zimu Li,Junyu Liu,Sergii Strelchuk,Risi Kondor quant-ph,cs.AI,cs.LG,math-ph,stat.ML

authors_text: Nandana Mihindukulasooriya,Mohnish Dubey,Alfio Gliozzo,Jens Lehmann,Axel-Cyrille Ngonga Ngomo,Ricardo Usbeck,Gaetano Rossiello,Uttam Kumar
title: Semantic Answer Type and Relation Prediction Task (SMART 2021)
title_zh: 语义答案类型和关系预测任务（SMART 2021）
abstract: Each year the International Semantic Web Conference organizes a set of Semantic Web Challenges to establish competitions that will advance state-of-the-art solutions in some problem domains. The Semantic Answer Type and Relation Prediction Task (SMART) task is one of the ISWC 2021 Semantic Web challenges. This is the second year of the challenge after a successful SMART 2020 at ISWC 2020. This year's version focuses on two sub-tasks that are very important to Knowledge Base Question Answering (KBQA): Answer Type Prediction and Relation Prediction. Question type and answer type prediction can play a key role in knowledge base question answering systems providing insights about the expected answer that are helpful to generate correct queries or rank the answer candidates. More concretely, given a question in natural language, the first task is, to predict the answer type using a target ontology (e.g., DBpedia or Wikidata. Similarly, the second task is to identify relations in the natural language query and link them to the relations in a target ontology. This paper discusses the task descriptions, benchmark datasets, and evaluation metrics. For more information, please visit https://smart-task.github.io/2021/.
summary: Each year the International Semantic Web Conference organizes a set of Semantic Web Challenges to establish competitions that will advance state-of-the-art solutions in some problem domains. abstract_zh: 每年，国际语义网会议都会组织一系列语义网挑战赛，以举办竞赛，推动某些问题领域的最先进解决方案。语义答案类型和关系预测任务 (SMART) 任务是 ISWC 2021 语义 Web 挑战之一。继ISWC 2020上成功举办SMART 2020之后，今年是该挑战的第二年。今年的版本重点关注对知识库问答（KBQA）非常重要的两个子任务：答案类型预测和关系预测。问题类型和答案类型预测可以在知识库问答系统中发挥关键作用，提供有关预期答案的见解，有助于生成正确的查询或对候选答案进行排名。更具体地说，给定一个自然语言问题，第一个任务是使用目标本体（例如 DBpedia 或 Wikidata）来预测答案类型。类似地，第二个任务是识别自然语言查询中的关系并将其链接到目标本体中的关系。本文讨论了任务描述、基准数据集和评估指标。有关更多信息，请访问 https://smart-task.github.io/2021/。

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了ISWC 2021语义网络挑战赛中的SMART任务，聚焦知识库问答（KBQA）中的答案类型预测和关系预测两个子任务。
AI.motivation: 答案类型和关系预测对知识库问答系统至关重要，能够帮助生成正确查询或排序答案候选，从而提升系统准确性和效率。
AI.method: 通过定义基准数据集和评估指标，明确两个子任务的规则：基于自然语言问题预测答案类型（如DBpedia/Wikidata中的实体类型），并识别问题中的自然语言关系并映射到目标本体中的关系。
AI.result: 论文阐述了任务框架、数据集设计及评估标准，但未具体披露参赛模型的性能结果，需参考挑战赛官网获取详细实验数据。
AI.conclusion: SMART任务为KBQA领域提供了标准化评估平台，推动答案类型和关系预测技术的发展，促进语义网络研究的进展。

authors_text: Emanuele La Malfa,Marta Kwiatkowska
title: The King is Naked: on the Notion of Robustness for Natural Language Processing
title_zh: 国王是裸体的：关于自然语言处理的鲁棒性概念
abstract: There is growing evidence that the classical notion of adversarial robustness originally introduced for images has been adopted as a de facto standard by a large part of the NLP research community. We show that this notion is problematic in the context of NLP as it considers a narrow spectrum of linguistic phenomena. In this paper, we argue for semantic robustness, which is better aligned with the human concept of linguistic fidelity. We characterize semantic robustness in terms of biases that it is expected to induce in a model. We study semantic robustness of a range of vanilla and robustly trained architectures using a template-based generative test bed. We complement the analysis with empirical evidence that, despite being harder to implement, semantic robustness can improve performance %gives guarantees for on complex linguistic phenomena where models robust in the classical sense fail.
summary: There is growing evidence that the classical notion of adversarial robustness originally introduced for images has been adopted as a de facto standard by a large part of the NLP research community. We show that this notion is problematic in the context of NLP as it considers a narrow spectrum of linguistic phenomena. In this paper, we argue for semantic robustness, which is better aligned with the human concept of linguistic fidelity. We characterize semantic robustness in terms of biases that it is expected to induce in a model. We study semantic robustness of a range of vanilla and robustly trained architectures using a template-based generative test bed. We complement the analysis with empirical evidence that, despite being harder to implement, semantic robustness can improve performance %gives guarantees for on complex linguistic phenomena where models robust in the classical sense fail.
abstract_zh: 越来越多的证据表明，最初为图像引入的对抗鲁棒性的经典概念已被大部分 NLP 研究界采用作为事实上的标准。我们表明，这个概念在 NLP 的背景下是有问题的，因为它考虑的语言现象范围很窄。在本文中，我们主张语义鲁棒性，这更符合人类的语言保真度概念。我们根据预期在模型中引起的偏差来描述语义鲁棒性。我们使用基于模板的生成测试床研究一系列普通和经过严格训练的架构的语义鲁棒性。我们用经验证据补充分析，尽管语义鲁棒性更难实现，但语义鲁棒性可以提高性能，为经典意义上的鲁棒模型失败的复杂语言现象提供了保证。

AI.tldr: 本文质疑自然语言处理领域沿用图像领域对抗鲁棒性的有效性，提出更符合语言语义的鲁棒性概念并进行验证。
AI.motivation: 传统对抗鲁棒性概念未能涵盖自然语言处理中复杂的语言现象，导致模型在实际应用中存在语义层面的脆弱性。
AI.method: 通过定义语义鲁棒性指标，构建基于模板的生成测试框架，对比分析多种模型架构在语义鲁棒性任务中的表现。
AI.result: 实验证明语义鲁棒性方法在处理复杂语言现象时优于传统鲁棒性方法，尽管实现难度更高但能提供更强的语义保证。
AI.conclusion: 应重新定义符合语言本质的鲁棒性标准，语义鲁棒性为提升NLP模型可靠性提供了新方向。

method: 通过定义语义鲁棒性指标，构建基于模板的生成测试框架，对比分析多种模型架构在语义鲁棒性任务中的表现。
result: 实验证明语义鲁棒性方法在处理复杂语言现象时优于传统鲁棒性方法，尽管实现难度更高但能提供更强的语义保证。
conclusion: 应重新定义符合语言本质的鲁棒性标准，语义鲁棒性为提升NLP模型可靠性提供了新方向。
search_text: The King is Naked: on the Notion of Robustness for Natural Language Processing 国王是裸体的：关于自然语言处理的鲁棒性概念 There is growing evidence that the classical notion of adversarial robustness originally introduced for images has been adopted as a de facto standard by a large part of the NLP research community. We show that this notion is problematic in the context of NLP as it considers a narrow spectrum of linguistic phenomena. In this paper, we argue for semantic robustness, which is better aligned with the human concept of linguistic fidelity. We characterize semantic robustness in terms of biases that it is expected to induce in a model. We study semantic robustness of a range of vanilla and robustly trained architectures using a template-based generative test bed. We complement the analysis with empirical evidence that, despite being harder to implement, semantic robustness can improve performance %gives guarantees for on complex linguistic phenomena where models robust in the classical sense fail. 越来越多的证据表明，最初为图像引入的对抗鲁棒性的经典概念已被大部分 NLP 研究界采用作为事实上的标准。我们表明，这个概念在 NLP 的背景下是有问题的，因为它考虑的语言现象范围很窄。在本文中，我们主张语义鲁棒性，这更符合人类的语言保真度概念。我们根据预期在模型中引起的偏差来描述语义鲁棒性。我们使用基于模板的生成测试床研究一系列普通和经过严格训练的架构的语义鲁棒性。我们用经验证据补充分析，尽管语义鲁棒性更难实现，但语义鲁棒性可以提高性能，为经典意义上的鲁棒模型失败的复杂语言现象提供了保证。 本文质疑自然语言处理领域沿用图像领域对抗鲁棒性的有效性，提出更符合语言语义的鲁棒性概念并进行验证。 Emanuele La Malfa,Marta Kwiatkowska cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Givi Meishvili,Attila Szabó,Simon Jenni,Paolo Favaro
title: Learning to Deblur and Rotate Motion-Blurred Faces
title_zh: 学习去模糊和旋转运动模糊的面孔
abstract: We propose a solution to the novel task of rendering sharp videos from new viewpoints from a single motion-blurred image of a face. Our method handles the complexity of face blur by implicitly learning the geometry and motion of faces through the joint training on three large datasets: FFHQ and 300VW, which are publicly available, and a new Bern Multi-View Face Dataset (BMFD) that we built. The first two datasets provide a large variety of faces and allow our model to generalize better. BMFD instead allows us to introduce multi-view constraints, which are crucial to synthesizing sharp videos from a new camera view. It consists of high frame rate synchronized videos from multiple views of several subjects displaying a wide range of facial expressions. We use the high frame rate videos to simulate realistic motion blur through averaging. Thanks to this dataset, we train a neural network to reconstruct a 3D video representation from a single image and the corresponding face gaze. We then provide a camera viewpoint relative to the estimated gaze and the blurry image as input to an encoder-decoder network to generate a video of sharp frames with a novel camera viewpoint. We demonstrate our approach on test subjects of our multi-view dataset and VIDTIMIT.
summary: We propose a solution to the novel task of rendering sharp videos from new viewpoints from a single motion-blurred image of a face. Our method handles the complexity of face blur by implicitly learning the geometry and motion of faces through the joint training on three large datasets: FFHQ and 300VW, which are publicly available, and a new Bern Multi-View Face Dataset (BMFD) that we built. The first two datasets provide a large variety of faces and allow our model to generalize better. BMFD instead allows us to introduce multi-view constraints, which are crucial to synthesizing sharp videos from a new camera view. It consists of high frame rate synchronized videos from multiple views of several subjects displaying a wide range of facial expressions. We use the high frame rate videos to simulate realistic motion blur through averaging. Thanks to this dataset, we train a neural network to reconstruct a 3D video representation from a single image and the corresponding face gaze. We then provide a camera viewpoint relative to the estimated gaze and the blurry image as input to an encoder-decoder network to generate a video of sharp frames with a novel camera viewpoint. We demonstrate our approach on test subjects of our multi-view dataset and VIDTIMIT.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新任务的解决方案，即从单个运动模糊的面部图像的新视角渲染清晰的视频。我们的方法通过对三个大型数据集（公开可用的 FFHQ 和 300VW，以及我们构建的新伯尔尼多视图人脸数据集（BMFD））的联合训练，隐式学习人脸的几何形状和运动来处理人脸模糊的复杂性。前两个数据集提供了各种各样的面孔，使我们的模型能够更好地泛化。相反，BMFD 允许我们引入多视图约束，这对于从新的摄像机视图合成清晰的视频至关重要。它由来自多个主题的多个视图的高帧率同步视频组成，显示各种面部表情。我们使用高帧率视频通过平均来模拟真实的运动模糊。借助这个数据集，我们训练了一个神经网络，根据单个图像和相应的面部注视重建 3D 视频表示。然后，我们提供相对于估计注视的相机视点和模糊图像作为编码器-解码器网络的输入，以生成具有新颖相机视点的清晰帧的视频。我们在多视图数据集和 VIDTIMIT 的测试对象上展示了我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从单张运动模糊人脸图像生成新视角清晰视频的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时处理运动模糊和视角变换，且缺乏多视角约束导致重建效果不佳。
AI.method: 联合训练FFHQ、300VW和自建BMFD数据集，利用高帧率视频模拟运动模糊，通过神经网络重建3D视频表示并生成新视角清晰帧。
AI.result: 在多视角测试集和VIDTIMIT数据集上验证了方法有效性，实现了模糊图像到多视角清晰视频的转换。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多数据集联合训练和多视角约束，有效解决了运动模糊人脸的去模糊与视角重定向问题。

authors_text: Johannes K. Fichte,Sarah Alice Gaggl,Dominik Rusovac
title: Rushing and Strolling among Answer Sets -- Navigation Made Easy
title_zh: 在答案集中奔波、漫步——导航变得简单
abstract: Answer set programming (ASP) is a popular declarative programming paradigm with a wide range of applications in artificial intelligence. Oftentimes, when modeling an AI problem with ASP, and in particular when we are interested beyond simple search for optimal solutions, an actual solution, differences between solutions, or number of solutions of the ASP program matter. For example, when a user aims to identify a specific answer set according to her needs, or requires the total number of diverging solutions to comprehend probabilistic applications such as reasoning in medical domains. Then, there are only certain problem specific and handcrafted encoding techniques available to navigate the solution space of ASP programs, which is oftentimes not enough. In this paper, we propose a formal and general framework for interactive navigation towards desired subsets of answer sets analogous to faceted browsing. Our approach enables the user to explore the solution space by consciously zooming in or out of sub-spaces of solutions at a certain configurable pace. We illustrate that weighted faceted navigation is computationally hard. Finally, we provide an implementation of our approach that demonstrates the feasibility of our framework for incomprehensible solution spaces.
summary: Answer set programming (ASP) is a popular declarative programming paradigm with a wide range of applications in artificial intelligence. Oftentimes, when modeling an AI problem with ASP, and in particular when we are interested beyond simple search for optimal solutions, an actual solution, differences between solutions, or number of solutions of the ASP program matter. For example, when a user aims to identify a specific answer set according to her needs, or requires the total number of diverging solutions to comprehend probabilistic applications such as reasoning in medical domains. Then, there are only certain problem specific and handcrafted encoding techniques available to navigate the solution space of ASP programs, which is oftentimes not enough. In this paper, we propose a formal and general framework for interactive navigation towards desired subsets of answer sets analogous to faceted browsing. Our approach enables the user to explore the solution space by consciously zooming in or out of sub-spaces of solutions at a certain configurable pace. We illustrate that weighted faceted navigation is computationally hard. Finally, we provide an implementation of our approach that demonstrates the feasibility of our framework for incomprehensible solution spaces.
abstract_zh: 答案集编程（ASP）是一种流行的声明式编程范例，在人工智能领域有着广泛的应用。通常，当使用 ASP 对 AI 问题进行建模时，特别是当我们的兴趣超出了简单搜索最佳解决方案时，实际解决方案、解决方案之间的差异或 ASP 程序的解决方案数量都很重要。例如，当用户旨在根据她的需要识别特定答案集，或者需要不同解决方案的总数来理解概率应用（例如医学领域的推理）时。然后，只有某些针对特定问题的手工编码技术可用于导航 ASP 程序的解决方案空间，这通常是不够的。在本文中，我们提出了一个正式且通用的框架，用于交互式导航到所需的答案集子集，类似于分面浏览。我们的方法使用户能够通过以某种可配置的速度有意识地放大或缩小解决方案的子空间来探索解决方案空间。我们说明加权分面导航在计算上是困难的。最后，我们提供了我们的方法的实现，证明了我们的框架对于难以理解的解决方案空间的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于答案集编程（ASP）解决方案空间交互式导航的通用框架，类似于分面浏览，使用户能以可配置的速度探索子空间。
AI.motivation: 现有ASP解决方案导航方法多为特定问题的手工编码，难以满足用户对特定答案集、解决方案差异或数量的需求，尤其在医疗等概率推理领域存在不足。
AI.method: 设计了一种形式化框架，通过分面浏览技术实现用户对解决方案子空间的动态缩放，并证明加权分面导航的计算复杂性，最终通过实现验证框架可行性。
AI.result: 框架成功展示了在不可理解的解决方案空间中的实用性，同时证明了加权分面导航的计算复杂性，为ASP应用提供了新工具。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为ASP解决方案空间探索提供了有效方法，尽管加权导航存在计算难度，但其交互式特性对复杂问题具有重要意义。

authors_text: Srimanta Mandal,Kuldeep Purohit,A. N. Rajagopalan
title: Mitigating Channel-wise Noise for Single Image Super Resolution
title_zh: 减轻单图像超分辨率的通道噪声
abstract: In practice, images can contain different amounts of noise for different color channels, which is not acknowledged by existing super-resolution approaches. In this paper, we propose to super-resolve noisy color images by considering the color channels jointly. Noise statistics are blindly estimated from the input low-resolution image and are used to assign different weights to different color channels in the data cost. Implicit low-rank structure of visual data is enforced via nuclear norm minimization in association with adaptive weights, which is added as a regularization term to the cost. Additionally, multi-scale details of the image are added to the model through another regularization term that involves projection onto PCA basis, which is constructed using similar patches extracted across different scales of the input image. The results demonstrate the super-resolving capability of the approach in real scenarios.
summary: In practice, images can contain different amounts of noise for different color channels, which is not acknowledged by existing super-resolution approaches. In this paper, we propose to super-resolve noisy color images by considering the color channels jointly. Noise statistics are blindly estimated from the input low-resolution image and are used to assign different weights to different color channels in the data cost. Implicit low-rank structure of visual data is enforced via nuclear norm minimization in association with adaptive weights, which is added as a regularization term to the cost. Additionally, multi-scale details of the image are added to the model through another regularization term that involves projection onto PCA basis, which is constructed using similar patches extracted across different scales of the input image. The results demonstrate the super-resolving capability of the approach in real scenarios.
abstract_zh: 实际上，图像对于不同的颜色通道可能包含不同数量的噪声，这是现有的超分辨率方法所不承认的。在本文中，我们建议通过联合考虑颜色通道来超分辨率噪声彩色图像。噪声统计数据是根据输入的低分辨率图像盲目估计的，并用于在数据成本中为不同颜色通道分配不同的权重。视觉数据的隐式低秩结构是通过与自适应权重相关的核范数最小化来强制执行的，自适应权重作为正则化项添加到成本中。此外，图像的多尺度细节通过另一个正则化项添加到模型中，该正则化项涉及到 PCA 基础上的投影，该正则化项是使用在输入图像的不同尺度上提取的相似补丁构建的。结果证明了该方法在实际场景中的超分辨能力。

AI.tldr: 提出一种联合处理不同颜色通道噪声的单图像超分辨率方法。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率方法未考虑不同颜色通道的噪声差异，导致处理效果受限，需提出新方法解决此问题。
AI.method: 通过盲估噪声统计量分配通道权重，结合核范数最小化和多尺度PCA正则化项优化模型。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在实际场景中能有效提升超分辨率效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过联合处理通道噪声和多尺度细节，有效提升超分辨率性能，适用于真实场景。
