authors_text: Nitish Gupta
title: Real-time SIL Emulation Architecture for Cooperative Automated Vehicles
title_zh: 适用于协作自动驾驶车辆的实时 SIL 仿真架构
abstract: The development of safety applications for Connected Automated Vehicles requires testing in many different scenarios. However, the recreation of test scenarios for evaluating safety applications is a very challenging task. This is mainly due to the randomness in communication, difficulty in recreating vehicle movements precisely, and safety concerns for certain scenarios. We propose to develop a standalone Remote Vehicle Emulator that can reproduce V2V messages of remote vehicles from simulations or previous tests. This is expected to accelerate the development cycle significantly. Remote Vehicle Emulator is a unique and easily configurable emulation cum simulation setup to allow Software in the Loop (SIL) testing of connected vehicle applications realistically and safely. It will help in tailoring numerous test scenarios, expediting algorithm development and validation, and increasing the probability of finding failure modes. This, in turn, will help improve the quality of safety applications while saving testing time and reducing cost.
summary: The development of safety applications for Connected Automated Vehicles requires testing in many different scenarios. However, the recreation of test scenarios for evaluating safety applications is a very challenging task. This is mainly due to the randomness in communication, difficulty in recreating vehicle movements precisely, and safety concerns for certain scenarios. We propose to develop a standalone Remote Vehicle Emulator that can reproduce V2V messages of remote vehicles from simulations or previous tests. This is expected to accelerate the development cycle significantly. Remote Vehicle Emulator is a unique and easily configurable emulation cum simulation setup to allow Software in the Loop (SIL) testing of connected vehicle applications realistically and safely. It will help in tailoring numerous test scenarios, expediting algorithm development and validation, and increasing the probability of finding failure modes. This, in turn, will help improve the quality of safety applications while saving testing time and reducing cost.
abstract_zh: 联网自动驾驶汽车的安全应用程序的开发需要在许多不同的场景中进行测试。然而，重新创建用于评估安全应用的测试场景是一项非常具有挑战性的任务。这主要是由于通信的随机性、精确再现车辆运动的困难以及某些场景的安全问题。我们建议开发一个独立的远程车辆模拟器，可以从模拟或之前的测试中重现远程车辆的 V2V 消息。预计这将显着加快开发周期。远程车辆仿真器是一种独特且易于配置的仿真和模拟设置，可真实、安全地对联网车辆应用程序进行软件在环 (SIL) 测试。它将有助于定制大量测试场景，加快算法开发和验证，并增加发现故障模式的可能性。反过来，这将有助于提高安全应用的质量，同时节省测试时间并降低成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于协作式自动驾驶车辆的实时软件在环（SIL）仿真架构，旨在通过远程车辆仿真器加速安全应用的开发与测试。
AI.motivation: 现有测试场景重建面临通信随机性、车辆运动精确复现困难及部分场景安全风险等挑战，亟需一种高效、安全的仿真方法以提升安全应用开发效率。
AI.method: 开发独立的远程车辆仿真器，通过模拟或历史测试数据生成远程车辆的V2V消息，构建可配置的仿真环境以支持SIL测试。
AI.result: 该架构显著缩短开发周期，支持多样化测试场景设计，提升算法验证效率与故障模式发现概率，同时降低测试成本与时间消耗。
AI.conclusion: 提出的远程车辆仿真器有效解决了测试场景重建难题，为自动驾驶安全应用的高质量开发提供了可靠的技术支持。

authors_text: Cameron Hickert,Sirui Li,Cathy Wu
title: Cooperation for Scalable Supervision of Autonomy in Mixed Traffic
title_zh: 合作扩大混合交通自主监管
comment: 24 pages, 20 figures, in IEEE Transactions on Robotics
comments: 24 pages, 20 figures, in IEEE Transactions on Robotics
abstract: Advances in autonomy offer the potential for dramatic positive outcomes in a number of domains, yet enabling their safe deployment remains an open problem. This work's motivating question is: In safety-critical settings, can we avoid the need to have one human supervise one machine at all times? The work formalizes this scalable supervision problem by considering remotely located human supervisors and investigating how autonomous agents can cooperate to achieve safety. This article focuses on the safety-critical context of autonomous vehicles (AVs) merging into traffic consisting of a mixture of AVs and human drivers. The analysis establishes high reliability upper bounds on human supervision requirements. It further shows that AV cooperation can improve supervision reliability by orders of magnitude and counterintuitively requires fewer supervisors (per AV) as more AVs are adopted. These analytical results leverage queuing-theoretic analysis, order statistics, and a conservative, reachability-based approach. A key takeaway is the potential value of cooperation in enabling the deployment of autonomy at scale. While this work focuses on AVs, the scalable supervision framework may be of independent interest to a broader array of autonomous control challenges.
summary: Advances in autonomy offer the potential for dramatic positive outcomes in a number of domains, yet enabling their safe deployment remains an open problem. This work's motivating question is: In safety-critical settings, can we avoid the need to have one human supervise one machine at all times? The work formalizes this scalable supervision problem by considering remotely located human supervisors and investigating how autonomous agents can cooperate to achieve safety. This article focuses on the safety-critical context of autonomous vehicles (AVs) merging into traffic consisting of a mixture of AVs and human drivers. The analysis establishes high reliability upper bounds on human supervision requirements. It further shows that AV cooperation can improve supervision reliability by orders of magnitude and counterintuitively requires fewer supervisors (per AV) as more AVs are adopted. These analytical results leverage queuing-theoretic analysis, order statistics, and a conservative, reachability-based approach. A key takeaway is the potential value of cooperation in enabling the deployment of autonomy at scale. While this work focuses on AVs, the scalable supervision framework may be of independent interest to a broader array of autonomous control challenges.
abstract_zh: 自动化技术的进步有可能在许多领域取得巨大的积极成果，但如何实现它们的安全部署仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。这项工作的激励问题是：在安全关键的环境中，我们是否可以避免需要一个人始终监督一台机器？这项工作通过考虑远程人类监管者并研究自主代理如何合作以实现安全，将这种可扩展的监管问题正式化。本文重点讨论自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 融入由自动驾驶汽车和人类驾驶员组成的交通中的安全关键环境。该分析确定了人类监督要求的高可靠性上限。它进一步表明，AV 合作可以将监督可靠性提高几个数量级，并且随着更多 AV 的采用，反直觉地需要更少的监督者（每个 AV）。这些分析结果利用了排队理论分析、订单统计和保守的、基于可达性的方法。一个关键要点是合作在实现大规模部署自治方面的潜在价值。虽然这项工作的重点是自动驾驶汽车，但可扩展的监管框架可能对更广泛的自主控制挑战具有独立的意义。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在混合交通环境中通过自动驾驶车辆（AV）协作实现可扩展监督的方法，以减少对持续人工监督的需求。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶技术的安全部署需要解决持续人工监督的高成本问题，尤其是在安全关键场景中，如何通过协作降低监督需求是核心挑战。
AI.method: 结合排队论分析、顺序统计学和保守的可达性分析方法，建立人类监督需求的可靠性上界模型，并验证AV协作对监督可靠性的提升效果。
AI.result: 分析表明，AV协作可将监督可靠性提升多个数量级，且随着AV数量增加，每辆车所需的监督人员数量反而减少。
AI.conclusion: 协作机制能有效支持自动驾驶的大规模部署，该监督框架对其他自主控制系统具有普适性价值。

method: 结合排队论分析、顺序统计学和保守的可达性分析方法，建立人类监督需求的可靠性上界模型，并验证AV协作对监督可靠性的提升效果。
result: 分析表明，AV协作可将监督可靠性提升多个数量级，且随着AV数量增加，每辆车所需的监督人员数量反而减少。
conclusion: 协作机制能有效支持自动驾驶的大规模部署，该监督框架对其他自主控制系统具有普适性价值。
search_text: Cooperation for Scalable Supervision of Autonomy in Mixed Traffic 合作扩大混合交通自主监管 Advances in autonomy offer the potential for dramatic positive outcomes in a number of domains, yet enabling their safe deployment remains an open problem. This work's motivating question is: In safety-critical settings, can we avoid the need to have one human supervise one machine at all times? The work formalizes this scalable supervision problem by considering remotely located human supervisors and investigating how autonomous agents can cooperate to achieve safety. This article focuses on the safety-critical context of autonomous vehicles (AVs) merging into traffic consisting of a mixture of AVs and human drivers. The analysis establishes high reliability upper bounds on human supervision requirements. It further shows that AV cooperation can improve supervision reliability by orders of magnitude and counterintuitively requires fewer supervisors (per AV) as more AVs are adopted. These analytical results leverage queuing-theoretic analysis, order statistics, and a conservative, reachability-based approach. A key takeaway is the potential value of cooperation in enabling the deployment of autonomy at scale. While this work focuses on AVs, the scalable supervision framework may be of independent interest to a broader array of autonomous control challenges. 自动化技术的进步有可能在许多领域取得巨大的积极成果，但如何实现它们的安全部署仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。这项工作的激励问题是：在安全关键的环境中，我们是否可以避免需要一个人始终监督一台机器？这项工作通过考虑远程人类监管者并研究自主代理如何合作以实现安全，将这种可扩展的监管问题正式化。本文重点讨论自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 融入由自动驾驶汽车和人类驾驶员组成的交通中的安全关键环境。该分析确定了人类监督要求的高可靠性上限。它进一步表明，AV 合作可以将监督可靠性提高几个数量级，并且随着更多 AV 的采用，反直觉地需要更少的监督者（每个 AV）。这些分析结果利用了排队理论分析、订单统计和保守的、基于可达性的方法。一个关键要点是合作在实现大规模部署自治方面的潜在价值。虽然这项工作的重点是自动驾驶汽车，但可扩展的监管框架可能对更广泛的自主控制挑战具有独立的意义。 本文研究在混合交通环境中通过自动驾驶车辆（AV）协作实现可扩展监督的方法，以减少对持续人工监督的需求。 Cameron Hickert,Sirui Li,Cathy Wu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.MA,eess.SY

authors_text: Letitia Parcalabescu,Michele Cafagna,Lilitta Muradjan,Anette Frank,Iacer Calixto,Albert Gatt
title: VALSE: A Task-Independent Benchmark for Vision and Language Models Centered on Linguistic Phenomena
title_zh: VALSE：以语言现象为中心的视觉和语言模型的任务独立基准
comment: Paper accepted for publication at ACL 2022 Main; 28 pages, 4 figures, 11 tables
comments: Paper accepted for publication at ACL 2022 Main; 28 pages, 4 figures, 11 tables
abstract: We propose VALSE (Vision And Language Structured Evaluation), a novel benchmark designed for testing general-purpose pretrained vision and language (V&L) models for their visio-linguistic grounding capabilities on specific linguistic phenomena. VALSE offers a suite of six tests covering various linguistic constructs. Solving these requires models to ground linguistic phenomena in the visual modality, allowing more fine-grained evaluations than hitherto possible. We build VALSE using methods that support the construction of valid foils, and report results from evaluating five widely-used V&L models. Our experiments suggest that current models have considerable difficulty addressing most phenomena. Hence, we expect VALSE to serve as an important benchmark to measure future progress of pretrained V&L models from a linguistic perspective, complementing the canonical task-centred V&L evaluations.
summary: We propose VALSE (Vision And Language Structured Evaluation), a novel benchmark designed for testing general-purpose pretrained vision and language (V&L) models for their visio-linguistic grounding capabilities on specific linguistic phenomena. VALSE offers a suite of six tests covering various linguistic constructs. Solving these requires models to ground linguistic phenomena in the visual modality, allowing more fine-grained evaluations than hitherto possible. We build VALSE using methods that support the construction of valid foils, and report results from evaluating five widely-used V&L models. Our experiments suggest that current models have considerable difficulty addressing most phenomena. Hence, we expect VALSE to serve as an important benchmark to measure future progress of pretrained V&L models from a linguistic perspective, complementing the canonical task-centred V&L evaluations.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 VALSE（视觉和语言结构化评估），这是一种新颖的基准，旨在测试通用预训练视觉和语言 (V&L) 模型在特定语言现象上的视觉语言基础能力。 VALSE 提供了一套涵盖各种语言结构的六项测试。解决这些问题需要模型将语言现象置于视觉模态中，从而允许比迄今为止更细粒度的评估。我们使用支持构建有效箔片的方法构建 VALSE，并报告评估五种广泛使用的 V&L 模型的结果。我们的实验表明，当前的模型在解决大多数现象方面存在相当大的困难。因此，我们期望 VALSE 成为从语言角度衡量预训练 V&L 模型未来进展的重要基准，补充以任务为中心的规范 V&L 评估。

AI.tldr: 提出VALSE基准，用于评估视觉语言模型在特定语言现象上的视觉语言基础能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言评估过于任务导向，缺乏对语言现象的细致分析，需更精细的评估方法。
AI.method: 构建包含六个测试的基准套件，覆盖多种语言结构，通过有效干扰项构建方法，评估五类主流模型。
AI.result: 实验表明当前模型在处理大部分语言现象时表现不足，暴露出现有技术的局限性。
AI.conclusion: VALSE可作为补充基准，推动从语言学视角评估预训练视觉语言模型的进展。

authors_text: Vivien Sainte Fare Garnot,Loic Landrieu,Nesrine Chehata
title: Multi-Modal Temporal Attention Models for Crop Mapping from Satellite Time Series
title_zh: 用于卫星时间序列作物绘图的多模态时间注意力模型
abstract: Optical and radar satellite time series are synergetic: optical images contain rich spectral information, while C-band radar captures useful geometrical information and is immune to cloud cover. Motivated by the recent success of temporal attention-based methods across multiple crop mapping tasks, we propose to investigate how these models can be adapted to operate on several modalities. We implement and evaluate multiple fusion schemes, including a novel approach and simple adjustments to the training procedure, significantly improving performance and efficiency with little added complexity. We show that most fusion schemes have advantages and drawbacks, making them relevant for specific settings. We then evaluate the benefit of multimodality across several tasks: parcel classification, pixel-based segmentation, and panoptic parcel segmentation. We show that by leveraging both optical and radar time series, multimodal temporal attention-based models can outmatch single-modality models in terms of performance and resilience to cloud cover. To conduct these experiments, we augment the PASTIS dataset with spatially aligned radar image time series. The resulting dataset, PASTIS-R, constitutes the first large-scale, multimodal, and open-access satellite time series dataset with semantic and instance annotations.
summary: Optical and radar satellite time series are synergetic: optical images contain rich spectral information, while C-band radar captures useful geometrical information and is immune to cloud cover. Motivated by the recent success of temporal attention-based methods across multiple crop mapping tasks, we propose to investigate how these models can be adapted to operate on several modalities. We implement and evaluate multiple fusion schemes, including a novel approach and simple adjustments to the training procedure, significantly improving performance and efficiency with little added complexity. We show that most fusion schemes have advantages and drawbacks, making them relevant for specific settings. We then evaluate the benefit of multimodality across several tasks: parcel classification, pixel-based segmentation, and panoptic parcel segmentation. We show that by leveraging both optical and radar time series, multimodal temporal attention-based models can outmatch single-modality models in terms of performance and resilience to cloud cover. To conduct these experiments, we augment the PASTIS dataset with spatially aligned radar image time series. The resulting dataset, PASTIS-R, constitutes the first large-scale, multimodal, and open-access satellite time series dataset with semantic and instance annotations.
abstract_zh: 光学和雷达卫星时间序列是协同的：光学图像包含丰富的光谱信息，而C波段雷达捕获有用的几何信息并且不受云层影响。受近期基于时间注意力的方法在多种作物绘图任务中取得成功的推动，我们建议研究如何调整这些模型以在多种模式下运行。我们实施并评估了多种融合方案，包括新颖的方法和对训练程序的简单调整，显着提高了性能和效率，同时几乎不增加复杂性。我们证明大多数融合方案都有优点和缺点，使它们与特定的设置相关。然后，我们评估多模态在多个任务中的优势：地块分类、基于像素的分割和全景地块分割。我们证明，通过利用光学和雷达时间序列，基于多模态时间注意力的模型可以在性能和云覆盖恢复能力方面超越单模态模型。为了进行这些实验，我们使用空间对齐的雷达图像时间序列来增强 PASTIS 数据集。由此产生的数据集 PASTIS-R 构成了第一个具有语义和实例注释的大规模、多模式、开放访问的卫星时间序列数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多模态时间注意力模型，结合光学与雷达卫星时间序列数据，提升作物制图的性能与抗云能力，并构建了首个大规模多模态卫星数据集PASTIS-R。
AI.motivation: 光学与雷达数据各有优势（光谱信息vs几何信息及抗云能力），但现有时间注意力模型多针对单模态，未充分探索多模态融合潜力。
AI.method: 实现多种多模态融合方案（含新方法及训练调整），在地块分类、像素分割及全景分割任务中评估不同融合策略的有效性。
AI.result: 多模态模型在性能与抗云能力上优于单模态模型，PASTIS-R数据集成为首个开放获取的多模态卫星时间序列标注数据集。
AI.conclusion: 多模态时间注意力模型能有效提升作物制图效果，数据集的构建为后续研究提供了重要基础。

authors_text: Akash Gupta,Anirudh Reddy,CV Jawahar,PK Vinod
title: Classification of histopathology images using ConvNets to detect Lupus Nephritis
title_zh: 使用 ConvNet 对组织病理学图像进行分类以检测狼疮性肾炎
comment: Accepted in the 2021 Medical Imaging meets NeurIPS Workshop
comments: Accepted in the 2021 Medical Imaging meets NeurIPS Workshop
abstract: Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) is an autoimmune disease in which the immune system of the patient starts attacking healthy tissues of the body. Lupus Nephritis (LN) refers to the inflammation of kidney tissues resulting in renal failure due to these attacks. The International Society of Nephrology/Renal Pathology Society (ISN/RPS) has released a classification system based on various patterns observed during renal injury in SLE. Traditional methods require meticulous pathological assessment of the renal biopsy and are time-consuming. Recently, computational techniques have helped to alleviate this issue by using virtual microscopy or Whole Slide Imaging (WSI). With the use of deep learning and modern computer vision techniques, we propose a pipeline that is able to automate the process of 1) detection of various glomeruli patterns present in these whole slide images and 2) classification of each image using the extracted glomeruli features.
summary: Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) is an autoimmune disease in which the immune system of the patient starts attacking healthy tissues of the body. Lupus Nephritis (LN) refers to the inflammation of kidney tissues resulting in renal failure due to these attacks. The International Society of Nephrology/Renal Pathology Society (ISN/RPS) has released a classification system based on various patterns observed during renal injury in SLE. Traditional methods require meticulous pathological assessment of the renal biopsy and are time-consuming. Recently, computational techniques have helped to alleviate this issue by using virtual microscopy or Whole Slide Imaging (WSI). With the use of deep learning and modern computer vision techniques, we propose a pipeline that is able to automate the process of 1) detection of various glomeruli patterns present in these whole slide images and 2) classification of each image using the extracted glomeruli features.
abstract_zh: 系统性红斑狼疮 (SLE) 是一种自身免疫性疾病，患者的免疫系统开始攻击身体的健康组织。狼疮性肾炎 (LN) 是指肾脏组织发炎，导致肾功能衰竭。国际肾脏病学会/肾脏病理学会 (ISN/RPS) 发布了基于 SLE 肾损伤期间观察到的各种模式的分类系统。传统方法需要对肾活检进行细致的病理评估，并且非常耗时。最近，计算技术通过使用虚拟显微镜或全玻片成像（WSI）帮助缓解了这个问题。通过使用深度学习和现代计算机视觉技术，我们提出了一种能够自动执行以下过程的流程：1）检测这些整个幻灯片图像中存在的各种肾小球模式；2）使用提取的肾小球特征对每个图像进行分类。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用卷积神经网络（ConvNets）对组织病理学图像进行分类，以自动检测狼疮性肾炎（LN）。
AI.motivation: 传统狼疮性肾炎病理评估方法依赖人工显微镜检查，耗时且效率低，需通过计算技术实现自动化检测。
AI.method: 利用深度学习和计算机视觉技术，构建流水线自动检测全切片图像中的肾小球模式，并基于提取的特征进行分类。
AI.result: 实现了肾小球模式的自动检测与图像分类，提高了诊断效率和准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为狼疮性肾炎的自动化病理分析提供了有效工具，具有临床应用潜力。

search_text: Classification of histopathology images using ConvNets to detect Lupus Nephritis 使用 ConvNet 对组织病理学图像进行分类以检测狼疮性肾炎 Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) is an autoimmune disease in which the immune system of the patient starts attacking healthy tissues of the body. Lupus Nephritis (LN) refers to the inflammation of kidney tissues resulting in renal failure due to these attacks. The International Society of Nephrology/Renal Pathology Society (ISN/RPS) has released a classification system based on various patterns observed during renal injury in SLE. Traditional methods require meticulous pathological assessment of the renal biopsy and are time-consuming. Recently, computational techniques have helped to alleviate this issue by using virtual microscopy or Whole Slide Imaging (WSI). With the use of deep learning and modern computer vision techniques, we propose a pipeline that is able to automate the process of 1) detection of various glomeruli patterns present in these whole slide images and 2) classification of each image using the extracted glomeruli features. 系统性红斑狼疮 (SLE) 是一种自身免疫性疾病，患者的免疫系统开始攻击身体的健康组织。狼疮性肾炎 (LN) 是指肾脏组织发炎，导致肾功能衰竭。国际肾脏病学会/肾脏病理学会 (ISN/RPS) 发布了基于 SLE 肾损伤期间观察到的各种模式的分类系统。传统方法需要对肾活检进行细致的病理评估，并且非常耗时。最近，计算技术通过使用虚拟显微镜或全玻片成像（WSI）帮助缓解了这个问题。通过使用深度学习和现代计算机视觉技术，我们提出了一种能够自动执行以下过程的流程：1）检测这些整个幻灯片图像中存在的各种肾小球模式；2）使用提取的肾小球特征对每个图像进行分类。 本文提出使用卷积神经网络（ConvNets）对组织病理学图像进行分类，以自动检测狼疮性肾炎（LN）。 Akash Gupta,Anirudh Reddy,CV Jawahar,PK Vinod eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG,q-bio.TO

authors_text: Athul Paul Jacob,David J. Wu,Gabriele Farina,Adam Lerer,Hengyuan Hu,Anton Bakhtin,Jacob Andreas,Noam Brown
title: Modeling Strong and Human-Like Gameplay with KL-Regularized Search
title_zh: 使用 KL 正则化搜索建模强大且类人的游戏玩法
abstract: We consider the task of building strong but human-like policies in multi-agent decision-making problems, given examples of human behavior. Imitation learning is effective at predicting human actions but may not match the strength of expert humans, while self-play learning and search techniques (e.g. AlphaZero) lead to strong performance but may produce policies that are difficult for humans to understand and coordinate with. We show in chess and Go that regularizing search based on the KL divergence from an imitation-learned policy results in higher human prediction accuracy and stronger performance than imitation learning alone. We then introduce a novel regret minimization algorithm that is regularized based on the KL divergence from an imitation-learned policy, and show that using this algorithm for search in no-press Diplomacy yields a policy that matches the human prediction accuracy of imitation learning while being substantially stronger.
summary: We consider the task of building strong but human-like policies in multi-agent decision-making problems, given examples of human behavior. Imitation learning is effective at predicting human actions but may not match the strength of expert humans, while self-play learning and search techniques (e.g. AlphaZero) lead to strong performance but may produce policies that are difficult for humans to understand and coordinate with. We show in chess and Go that regularizing search based on the KL divergence from an imitation-learned policy results in higher human prediction accuracy and stronger performance than imitation learning alone. We then introduce a novel regret minimization algorithm that is regularized based on the KL divergence from an imitation-learned policy, and show that using this algorithm for search in no-press Diplomacy yields a policy that matches the human prediction accuracy of imitation learning while being substantially stronger.
abstract_zh: 考虑到人类行为的例子，我们考虑在多主体决策问题中建立强大但类似人类的政策的任务。模仿学习可以有效地预测人类行为，但可能无法与人类专家的实力相匹配，而自我博弈学习和搜索技术（例如 AlphaZero）可以带来强大的性能，但可能会产生人类难以理解和协调的策略。我们在国际象棋和围棋中证明，基于模仿学习策略的 KL 散度的正则化搜索比单独的模仿学习能带来更高的人类预测准确性和更强的性能。然后，我们引入了一种新颖的遗憾最小化算法，该算法基于模仿学习策略的 KL 散度进行正则化，并表明使用该算法在无新闻外交中进行搜索会产生一种与模仿学习的人类预测准确性相匹配的策略，同时性能更强。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过KL散度正则化搜索方法，结合模仿学习与强化学习优势，生成既强大又符合人类行为特征的多智能体决策策略。
AI.motivation: 现有模仿学习虽能预测人类行为但强度不足，而自博弈学习（如AlphaZero）虽性能强大却难以与人类协调，需平衡策略强度与人类可理解性。
AI.method: 基于KL散度对搜索过程进行正则化约束，结合模仿学习策略；并提出新型KL正则化遗憾最小化算法用于复杂博弈场景。
AI.result: 在国际象棋/围棋中提升人类预测准确率与胜率，在无压外交（Diplomacy）游戏中实现与模仿学习相当的人类预测精度但显著更强的实战表现。
AI.conclusion: KL正则化搜索有效融合人类行为特征与算法强度，为多智能体决策提供了兼具可解释性与性能的新型训练框架。

authors_text: Colin Bellinger,Andriy Drozdyuk,Mark Crowley,Isaac Tamblyn
title: Scientific Discovery and the Cost of Measurement -- Balancing Information and Cost in Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 科学发现与测量成本——强化学习中信息与成本的平衡
comment: To appear in: 1st Annual AAAI Workshop on AI to Accelerate Science and Engineering (AI2ASE)
comments: To appear in: 1st Annual AAAI Workshop on AI to Accelerate Science and Engineering (AI2ASE)
abstract: The use of reinforcement learning (RL) in scientific applications, such as materials design and automated chemistry, is increasing. A major challenge, however, lies in fact that measuring the state of the system is often costly and time consuming in scientific applications, whereas policy learning with RL requires a measurement after each time step. In this work, we make the measurement costs explicit in the form of a costed reward and propose a framework that enables off-the-shelf deep RL algorithms to learn a policy for both selecting actions and determining whether or not to measure the current state of the system at each time step. In this way, the agents learn to balance the need for information with the cost of information. Our results show that when trained under this regime, the Dueling DQN and PPO agents can learn optimal action policies whilst making up to 50\% fewer state measurements, and recurrent neural networks can produce a greater than 50\% reduction in measurements. We postulate the these reduction can help to lower the barrier to applying RL to real-world scientific applications.
summary: The use of reinforcement learning (RL) in scientific applications, such as materials design and automated chemistry, is increasing. A major challenge, however, lies in fact that measuring the state of the system is often costly and time consuming in scientific applications, whereas policy learning with RL requires a measurement after each time step. In this work, we make the measurement costs explicit in the form of a costed reward and propose a framework that enables off-the-shelf deep RL algorithms to learn a policy for both selecting actions and determining whether or not to measure the current state of the system at each time step. In this way, the agents learn to balance the need for information with the cost of information. Our results show that when trained under this regime, the Dueling DQN and PPO agents can learn optimal action policies whilst making up to 50\% fewer state measurements, and recurrent neural networks can produce a greater than 50\% reduction in measurements. We postulate the these reduction can help to lower the barrier to applying RL to real-world scientific applications.
abstract_zh: 强化学习 (RL) 在材料设计和自动化化学等科学应用中的使用正在增加。然而，一个主要挑战在于，在科学应用中测量系统状态通常成本高昂且耗时，而强化学习的策略学习则需要在每个时间步骤后进行测量。在这项工作中，我们以成本奖励的形式明确了测量成本，并提出了一个框架，使现成的深度强化学习算法能够学习选择动作和确定是否在每个时间步骤测量系统当前状态的策略。通过这种方式，代理学会平衡信息需求和信息成本。我们的结果表明，在这种制度下进行训练时，决斗 DQN 和 PPO 代理可以学习最佳行动策略，同时减少多达 50% 的状态测量，并且循环神经网络可以减少超过 50% 的测量。我们假设这些减少有助于降低将强化学习应用于现实世界科学应用的障碍。

AI.tldr: 提出一种强化学习框架，使智能体在科学应用中平衡信息获取与测量成本，减少测量次数。
AI.motivation: 在科学应用中，测量成本高且耗时，而传统强化学习需要每个时间步测量，导致效率低下，需寻找平衡信息获取与成本的方法。
AI.method: 将测量成本转化为成本奖励，利用现成深度RL算法（如Dueling DQN和PPO）训练智能体同时学习动作选择与测量决策。
AI.result: 实验显示，Dueling DQN和PPO减少50%测量次数，RNN减少超50%，表明该框架有效降低测量需求。
AI.conclusion: 减少测量次数可降低RL在现实科学应用中的应用门槛，促进其在材料设计等领域的应用。

search_text: Scientific Discovery and the Cost of Measurement -- Balancing Information and Cost in Reinforcement Learning 科学发现与测量成本——强化学习中信息与成本的平衡 The use of reinforcement learning (RL) in scientific applications, such as materials design and automated chemistry, is increasing. A major challenge, however, lies in fact that measuring the state of the system is often costly and time consuming in scientific applications, whereas policy learning with RL requires a measurement after each time step. In this work, we make the measurement costs explicit in the form of a costed reward and propose a framework that enables off-the-shelf deep RL algorithms to learn a policy for both selecting actions and determining whether or not to measure the current state of the system at each time step. In this way, the agents learn to balance the need for information with the cost of information. Our results show that when trained under this regime, the Dueling DQN and PPO agents can learn optimal action policies whilst making up to 50\% fewer state measurements, and recurrent neural networks can produce a greater than 50\% reduction in measurements. We postulate the these reduction can help to lower the barrier to applying RL to real-world scientific applications. 强化学习 (RL) 在材料设计和自动化化学等科学应用中的使用正在增加。然而，一个主要挑战在于，在科学应用中测量系统状态通常成本高昂且耗时，而强化学习的策略学习则需要在每个时间步骤后进行测量。在这项工作中，我们以成本奖励的形式明确了测量成本，并提出了一个框架，使现成的深度强化学习算法能够学习选择动作和确定是否在每个时间步骤测量系统当前状态的策略。通过这种方式，代理学会平衡信息需求和信息成本。我们的结果表明，在这种制度下进行训练时，决斗 DQN 和 PPO 代理可以学习最佳行动策略，同时减少多达 50% 的状态测量，并且循环神经网络可以减少超过 50% 的测量。我们假设这些减少有助于降低将强化学习应用于现实世界科学应用的障碍。 提出一种强化学习框架，使智能体在科学应用中平衡信息获取与测量成本，减少测量次数。 Colin Bellinger,Andriy Drozdyuk,Mark Crowley,Isaac Tamblyn cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: John Kallaugher,Michael Kapralov,Eric Price
title: Simulating Random Walks in Random Streams
title_zh: 模拟随机流中的随机游走
abstract: The random order graph streaming model has received significant attention recently, with problems such as matching size estimation, component counting, and the evaluation of bounded degree constant query testable properties shown to admit surprisingly space efficient algorithms. The main result of this paper is a space efficient single pass random order streaming algorithm for simulating nearly independent random walks that start at uniformly random vertices. We show that the distribution of $k$-step walks from $b$ vertices chosen uniformly at random can be approximated up to error $\varepsilon$ per walk using $(1/\varepsilon)^{O(k)} 2^{O(k^2)}\cdot b$ words of space with a single pass over a randomly ordered stream of edges, solving an open problem of Peng and Sohler [SODA `18]. Applications of our result include the estimation of the average return probability of the $k$-step walk (the trace of the $k^\text{th}$ power of the random walk matrix) as well as the estimation of PageRank. We complement our algorithm with a strong impossibility result for directed graphs.
summary: The random order graph streaming model has received significant attention recently, with problems such as matching size estimation, component counting, and the evaluation of bounded degree constant query testable properties shown to admit surprisingly space efficient algorithms. The main result of this paper is a space efficient single pass random order streaming algorithm for simulating nearly independent random walks that start at uniformly random vertices. We show that the distribution of $k$-step walks from $b$ vertices chosen uniformly at random can be approximated up to error $\varepsilon$ per walk using $(1/\varepsilon)^{O(k)} 2^{O(k^2)}\cdot b$ words of space with a single pass over a randomly ordered stream of edges, solving an open problem of Peng and Sohler [SODA `18]. Applications of our result include the estimation of the average return probability of the $k$-step walk (the trace of the $k^\text{th}$ power of the random walk matrix) as well as the estimation of PageRank. We complement our algorithm with a strong impossibility result for directed graphs.
abstract_zh: 随机顺序图流模型最近受到了极大的关注，其匹配大小估计、组件计数和有界度常量查询可测试属性的评估等问题显示出令人惊讶的空间高效算法。本文的主要成果是一种空间高效的单通道随机顺序流算法，用于模拟从均匀随机顶点开始的几乎独立的随机游走。我们证明，使用 $(1/\varepsilon)^{O(k)} 2^{O(k^2)}\cdot b$ 空间字，随机均匀选择的 $b$ 顶点的 $k$ 步行走的分布可以近似于每次行走的误差 $\varepsilon$，单次通过随机排序的边流，解决了 Peng 和 Sohler 的开放问题 [SODA `18]。我们的结果的应用包括 $k$ 步游走的平均返回概率的估计（随机游走矩阵的 $k^\text{th}$ 次幂的迹）以及 PageRank 的估计。我们用有向图的强不可能结果来补充我们的算法。

AI.tldr: 在随机顺序图流模型中使用单遍流算法模拟从均匀随机顶点出发的近乎独立的随机游走。
AI.motivation: 随机顺序图流模型近期受到广泛关注，但如何高效模拟随机游走仍是一个开放问题。Peng和Sohler在SODA '18中提出了这一开放问题，本文旨在解决该问题。
AI.method: 提出一种单遍随机顺序流算法，使用$(1/\varepsilon)^{O(k)} 2^{O(k^2)}\cdot b$字空间，对从$b$个均匀随机顶点出发的$k$步游走分布进行近似，每个游走的误差为$\varepsilon$。
AI.result: 成功解决了Peng和Sohler的开放问题，并进一步将算法应用于平均返回概率估计和PageRank估计。此外，针对有向图给出了一个强不可能性结果。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在无向图的随机顺序流模型下实现了空间高效的随机游走模拟，并展示了其应用价值；同时指出在有向图中该问题本质困难。

authors_text: Daniel Schaudt,Christopher Kloth,Christian Spaete,Andreas Hinteregger,Meinrad Beer,Reinhold von Schwerin
title: Improving COVID-19 CXR Detection with Synthetic Data Augmentation
title_zh: 通过合成数据增强改进 COVID-19 CXR 检测
comment: This paper has been accepted at the Upper-Rhine Artificial Intelligence Symposium 2021 arXiv:2112.05657
comments: This paper has been accepted at the Upper-Rhine Artificial Intelligence Symposium 2021 arXiv:2112.05657
abstract: Since the beginning of the COVID-19 pandemic, researchers have developed deep learning models to classify COVID-19 induced pneumonia. As with many medical imaging tasks, the quality and quantity of the available data is often limited. In this work we train a deep learning model on publicly available COVID-19 image data and evaluate the model on local hospital chest X-ray data. The data has been reviewed and labeled by two radiologists to ensure a high quality estimation of the generalization capabilities of the model. Furthermore, we are using a Generative Adversarial Network to generate synthetic X-ray images based on this data. Our results show that using those synthetic images for data augmentation can improve the model's performance significantly. This can be a promising approach for many sparse data domains.
summary: Since the beginning of the COVID-19 pandemic, researchers have developed deep learning models to classify COVID-19 induced pneumonia. As with many medical imaging tasks, the quality and quantity of the available data is often limited. In this work we train a deep learning model on publicly available COVID-19 image data and evaluate the model on local hospital chest X-ray data. The data has been reviewed and labeled by two radiologists to ensure a high quality estimation of the generalization capabilities of the model. Furthermore, we are using a Generative Adversarial Network to generate synthetic X-ray images based on this data. Our results show that using those synthetic images for data augmentation can improve the model's performance significantly. This can be a promising approach for many sparse data domains.
abstract_zh: 自 COVID-19 大流行开始以来，研究人员开发了深度学习模型来对 COVID-19 引起的肺炎进行分类。与许多医学成像任务一样，可用数据的质量和数量通常是有限的。在这项工作中，我们在公开的 COVID-19 图像数据上训练深度学习模型，并根据当地医院的胸部 X 射线数据评估该模型。数据已由两名放射科医生进行审查和标记，以确保对模型的泛化能力进行高质量估计。此外，我们正在使用生成对抗网络根据这些数据生成合成 X 射线图像。我们的结果表明，使用这些合成图像进行数据增强可以显着提高模型的性能。对于许多稀疏数据域来说，这可能是一种有前途的方法。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在通过合成数据增强技术提升COVID-19胸部X光检测的准确性
AI.motivation: 医疗影像数据常面临质量与数量不足的挑战，限制了深度学习模型的泛化能力，需探索有效数据增强方法
AI.method: 基于公开数据训练深度学习模型，结合本地医院经放射科医生标注的验证数据，采用生成对抗网络生成合成X光图像进行数据增强
AI.result: 实验结果表明，使用合成图像进行数据增强显著提高了模型性能
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明合成数据增强是解决医疗数据稀缺问题的有效策略，具有广泛的应用前景

authors_text: Dominik Filipiak,Piotr Tempczyk,Marek Cygan
title: n-CPS: Generalising Cross Pseudo Supervision to n Networks for Semi-Supervised Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: n-CPS：将交叉伪监督推广到 n 个网络以进行半监督语义分割
abstract: We present n-CPS - a generalisation of the recent state-of-the-art cross pseudo supervision (CPS) approach for the task of semi-supervised semantic segmentation. In n-CPS, there are n simultaneously trained subnetworks that learn from each other through one-hot encoding perturbation and consistency regularisation. We also show that ensembling techniques applied to subnetworks outputs can significantly improve the performance. To the best of our knowledge, n-CPS paired with CutMix outperforms CPS and sets the new state-of-the-art for Pascal VOC 2012 with (1/16, 1/8, 1/4, and 1/2 supervised regimes) and Cityscapes (1/16 supervised).
summary: We present n-CPS - a generalisation of the recent state-of-the-art cross pseudo supervision (CPS) approach for the task of semi-supervised semantic segmentation. In n-CPS, there are n simultaneously trained subnetworks that learn from each other through one-hot encoding perturbation and consistency regularisation. We also show that ensembling techniques applied to subnetworks outputs can significantly improve the performance. To the best of our knowledge, n-CPS paired with CutMix outperforms CPS and sets the new state-of-the-art for Pascal VOC 2012 with (1/16, 1/8, 1/4, and 1/2 supervised regimes) and Cityscapes (1/16 supervised).
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 n-CPS——最近最先进的交叉伪监督（CPS）方法的泛化，用于半监督语义分割任务。在 n-CPS 中，有 n 个同时训练的子网络，它们通过 one-hot 编码扰动和一致性正则化相互学习。我们还表明，应用于子网络输出的集成技术可以显着提高性能。据我们所知，n-CPS 与 CutMix 配合使用优于 CPS，并为 Pascal VOC 2012（1/16、1/8、1/4 和 1/2 监督制度）和 Cityscapes（1/16 监督）设定了新的最先进水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为n-CPS的方法，用于半监督语义分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有的跨伪监督（CPS）方法在半监督语义分割任务中表现良好，但其仅适用于两个子网络，无法扩展到更多网络。
AI.method: n-CPS方法通过同时训练n个子网络，并利用one-hot编码扰动和一致性正则化进行相互学习。此外，还应用了集成技术来提升性能。
AI.result: n-CPS结合CutMix方法在Pascal VOC 2012和Cityscapes数据集上均取得了新的最先进结果。
AI.conclusion: n-CPS方法通过扩展CPS到多个子网络并结合集成技术，显著提升了半监督语义分割的性能。

ai_content.conclusion: n-CPS方法通过扩展CPS到多个子网络并结合集成技术，显著提升了半监督语义分割的性能。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为n-CPS的方法，用于半监督语义分割任务。
motivation: 现有的跨伪监督（CPS）方法在半监督语义分割任务中表现良好，但其仅适用于两个子网络，无法扩展到更多网络。
method: n-CPS方法通过同时训练n个子网络，并利用one-hot编码扰动和一致性正则化进行相互学习。此外，还应用了集成技术来提升性能。
result: n-CPS结合CutMix方法在Pascal VOC 2012和Cityscapes数据集上均取得了新的最先进结果。
conclusion: n-CPS方法通过扩展CPS到多个子网络并结合集成技术，显著提升了半监督语义分割的性能。
search_text: n-CPS: Generalising Cross Pseudo Supervision to n Networks for Semi-Supervised Semantic Segmentation n-CPS：将交叉伪监督推广到 n 个网络以进行半监督语义分割 We present n-CPS - a generalisation of the recent state-of-the-art cross pseudo supervision (CPS) approach for the task of semi-supervised semantic segmentation. In n-CPS, there are n simultaneously trained subnetworks that learn from each other through one-hot encoding perturbation and consistency regularisation. We also show that ensembling techniques applied to subnetworks outputs can significantly improve the performance. To the best of our knowledge, n-CPS paired with CutMix outperforms CPS and sets the new state-of-the-art for Pascal VOC 2012 with (1/16, 1/8, 1/4, and 1/2 supervised regimes) and Cityscapes (1/16 supervised). 我们提出了 n-CPS——最近最先进的交叉伪监督（CPS）方法的泛化，用于半监督语义分割任务。在 n-CPS 中，有 n 个同时训练的子网络，它们通过 one-hot 编码扰动和一致性正则化相互学习。我们还表明，应用于子网络输出的集成技术可以显着提高性能。据我们所知，n-CPS 与 CutMix 配合使用优于 CPS，并为 Pascal VOC 2012（1/16、1/8、1/4 和 1/2 监督制度）和 Cityscapes（1/16 监督）设定了新的最先进水平。 本文提出了一种名为n-CPS的方法，用于半监督语义分割任务。 Dominik Filipiak,Piotr Tempczyk,Marek Cygan cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yang Chen,Yu Wang,Yingwei Pan,Ting Yao,Xinmei Tian,Tao Mei
title: A Style and Semantic Memory Mechanism for Domain Generalization
title_zh: 领域泛化的风格和语义记忆机制
abstract: Mainstream state-of-the-art domain generalization algorithms tend to prioritize the assumption on semantic invariance across domains. Meanwhile, the inherent intra-domain style invariance is usually underappreciated and put on the shelf. In this paper, we reveal that leveraging intra-domain style invariance is also of pivotal importance in improving the efficiency of domain generalization. We verify that it is critical for the network to be informative on what domain features are invariant and shared among instances, so that the network sharpens its understanding and improves its semantic discriminative ability. Correspondingly, we also propose a novel "jury" mechanism, which is particularly effective in learning useful semantic feature commonalities among domains. Our complete model called STEAM can be interpreted as a novel probabilistic graphical model, for which the implementation requires convenient constructions of two kinds of memory banks: semantic feature bank and style feature bank. Empirical results show that our proposed framework surpasses the state-of-the-art methods by clear margins.
summary: Mainstream state-of-the-art domain generalization algorithms tend to prioritize the assumption on semantic invariance across domains. Meanwhile, the inherent intra-domain style invariance is usually underappreciated and put on the shelf. In this paper, we reveal that leveraging intra-domain style invariance is also of pivotal importance in improving the efficiency of domain generalization. We verify that it is critical for the network to be informative on what domain features are invariant and shared among instances, so that the network sharpens its understanding and improves its semantic discriminative ability. Correspondingly, we also propose a novel "jury" mechanism, which is particularly effective in learning useful semantic feature commonalities among domains. Our complete model called STEAM can be interpreted as a novel probabilistic graphical model, for which the implementation requires convenient constructions of two kinds of memory banks: semantic feature bank and style feature bank. Empirical results show that our proposed framework surpasses the state-of-the-art methods by clear margins.
abstract_zh: 主流最先进的领域泛化算法倾向于优先考虑跨领域语义不变性的假设。与此同时，固有的域内风格不变性通常被低估并被束之高阁。在本文中，我们揭示了利用领域内风格不变性对于提高领域泛化的效率也至关重要。我们验证了网络了解哪些领域特征是不变的并且在实例之间共享的信息至关重要，以便网络加深其理解并提高其语义判别能力。相应地，我们还提出了一种新颖的“陪审团”机制，该机制在学习领域之间有用的语义特征共性方面特别有效。我们称为 STEAM 的完整模型可以解释为一种新颖的概率图形模型，其实现需要方便地构建两种记忆库：语义特征库和风格特征库。实证结果表明，我们提出的框架明显超越了最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合风格与语义记忆机制的领域泛化框架STEAM，通过挖掘域内风格不变性与跨域语义共性提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有领域泛化方法过度关注跨域语义不变性，忽视了域内样本间风格特征的共性，导致模型未能充分利用域内信息提升泛化效率。
AI.method: 设计STEAM模型包含语义特征库与风格特征库，引入'jury'机制学习跨域语义共性并强化域内风格不变性，通过概率图模型框架实现双记忆库的协同优化。
AI.result: 在多个领域泛化基准数据集上，STEAM框架相较现有SOTA方法取得显著性能提升，验证了风格-语义联合建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合建模域内风格不变性与跨域语义共性，STEAM框架为领域泛化任务提供了新的理论视角与有效解决方案。
